programme.title: Modern Family: She Crazy

programme.title: Modern Family: The Verdict

programme.title: Modern Family: The More You Ignore Me

programme.title: Modern Family: Playdates

programme.title: Modern Family: Spread Your Wings

programme.desc: Ben Gates reunites with his treasure hunting friends to prove his great-grandfather's innocence, when new evidence suggests he may have played a part in the Lincoln assassination. The search leads him to clues about a City of Gold.

programme.title: Bones: Death in the Saddle
programme.desc: An investigation into a murder leads the team to an S&M retreat in Virginia. Evidence makes deciphering the killer extremely difficult. Meanwhile, Angela agrees to go under hypnosis in an effort to discover the name of her previous husband.

programme.title: Bones: The Secret in the Soil
programme.desc: Booth and Brennan go in to investigate when teenagers find a severely decomposed body on the grounds of the V.A. hospital. The team is puzzled when the body's high temperature reveals that it had been cooked or incinerated.

programme.title: Bones: The Mummy in the Maze
programme.desc: When a terrified young Halloween reveller finds the mummified remains of a teenage girl in a Halloween pumpkin patch maze, Brennan and Booth are called to the scene to investigate.

programme.title: Bones: Intern in the Incinerator
programme.desc: The charred remains of a young Jeffersonian intern are found in the building's incinerator. The team is forced to suspect their own colleagues, and questions everyone from the upper echelons of the scientists to the victim's fellow interns.

programme.title: Movie: Divergent
programme.desc: In a dystopian future, a young woman who doesn't fit into any one faction of society finds her life threatened when she learns of a conspiracy to do away with her kind.

programme.title: Movie: Insurgent
programme.desc: In the wake of the uprising, Tris Prior finds herself on the run, along with Four, as they flee the leaders of the Erudite faction. They search for answers as they try to figure out what it was that Tris' loved ones sacrificed their lives to protect.

programme.title: Movie: The Divergent Series: Allegiant
programme.desc: Tris must escape with Four beyond the wall that encircles Chicago, to finally discover the shocking truth of the world around them.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Love Hurts
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a petty officer found in a Mardi Gras float storage facility with an engagement ring and proposal plan in hand. However, the case takes a mysterious turn when the team is unable to locate his supposed girlfriend.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Chasing Ghosts
programme.desc: After a stolen navy-issued gun is found to belong to a Chief Petty officer who died 40 years ago, the team reopens the cold case, one that Wade has tracked and investigated for years. Also, the team prepares for their annual Thanksgiving dinner together.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Man on Fire
programme.desc: After a decorated petty officer is found dead inside a sports arena, evidence leads Pride and the team to a kidnapping case of a petty officer who was last seen in Mexico.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Escape Plan
programme.desc: The team must rescue one of their own after Sebastian is kidnapped while at a restaurant with his mother. While being held by his captors, he's forced to use his gaming skills in a prison break.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Course Correction
programme.desc: NCIS and the FBI investigate a private plane crash in the bayou that killed three sailors. Also, Sonja and Lasalle interview candidates for the team's open agent position.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: One Good Man
programme.desc: The team reviews unorthodox training exercises after a Navy Seal candidate is found murdered weeks before his graduation. Also, a concerned Wade turns to Pride after her adopted son, Danny, announces his plan to enter the Navy.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Outlaws
programme.desc: The team investigates the murder of a sailor during a rowdy motorcycle rally in the city. Also, Lasalle turns to Gregorio for advice on his personal life.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Music to My Ears
programme.desc: After a petty officer and member of the prestigious United States Navy Band is murdered in her home, Pride takes temporary custody of the victim's nephew, who is the sole witness to the crime.

programme.title: Movie: The Lord of the Rings: The Two Towers

programme.title: Movie: Snow Bride
programme.desc: A reporter pretends to be the girlfriend of the son of a famous politician to help him save face over Christmas. She becomes torn between exposing newsworthy scoops about the famous family and trusting that she's falling in love for real.

programme.title: Movie: Mingle All the Way
programme.desc: A young entrepreneur invents a new dating app designed to help singles find dates to events. She personally tests it out in the weeks before Christmas and is connected with a like-minded individual whom she's already dated, several times.

programme.title: Movie: A Shoe Addict's Christmas
programme.desc: A self-professed 'Christmas hater' is locked in a department store on Christmas Eve. There, she meets a woman who claims to be her 'guardian angel' and shares with her three Christmas ghosts.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Town
programme.desc: A woman leaves behind a life in Boston to embark on a new adventure. Unbeknownst to her, she ends up on an unexpected detour that changes both her life, and her romantic future.

programme.title: Movie: Switched for Christmas
programme.desc: Identical twin sisters decide to swap lives for the holidays, learning valuable lessons along the way.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas at the Palace
programme.desc: A woman agrees to help put on a skating pageant for a Christmas obsessed kingdom. Her joy, and love for the sport, catches the eye of the king, and they instantly fall for each other.

programme.title: Movie: The Christmas Cure
programme.desc: An emergency room doctor returns home for Christmas and reunites with old friends and family and is asked to take over her dad's old practice. The doctor must now choose between a new life and an old one.

programme.title: Movie: A Perfect Christmas
programme.desc: Newlywed couple celebrates their first Christmas by inviting their families to join them. When he gets laid off and she finds out she is pregnant, they try and keep their secrets hidden to have a smooth holiday.

programme.title: Movie: A Cheerful Christmas
programme.desc: As a 'Christmas Coach' a woman provides her clients with all the magic of the holidays. In order to make her new clients vision a success, she is tasked with working with their son, to find out all of their holiday traditions.

programme.title: Movie: The Sweetest Christmas
programme.desc: A pastry chef makes it to the final round of a renowned baking competition and finds herself asking her high school sweetheart for help. As they grow closer, she realizes the must embrace the Christmas spirit or risk losing a chance at love.

programme.title: Movie: Cherished Memories: A Gift to Remember
programme.desc: A couple celebrate their second Christmas together, but, an unexpected guest, and a fight to save their town's community centre, ensures they have a Christmas they have never forget.

programme.title: Movie: The Christmas Cottage
programme.desc: An interior designer is made-of-honour at her friend’s wedding. Before the big day, she ends up stranded in the Christmas Cottage, where rumour has it, all guests will find everlasting love, with the brother of the bride.

programme.title: South Park
programme.desc: The antics of pre-pubescent school children Kyle, Cartman, Kenny and Stan, as they stumble through the deranged misadventures of their hometown, South Park.

programme.title: South Park: A Scause for Applause
programme.desc: A serious doping scandal shakes everyone's faith in a beloved icon. Everyone who once supported the fallen hero is now cutting off their symbolic yellow wristbands.

programme.title: South Park: Probably
programme.desc: When their church's answers aren't sufficient to sate the boys' fear, they break off from their church and Cartman takes on the role of evangelical preacher. Meanwhile in Hell, the feud between Chris and Saddam continues.

programme.title: South Park: The Entity
programme.desc: Mr. Garrison gets fed up with long lines, delayed flights and the airline industry in general and invents his own transportation device. Meanwhile, Kyle tries to ditch his cousin, also named Kyle, who comes to South Park for an extended visit.

programme.title: South Park: All About the Mormons?
programme.desc: A Mormon kid moves to South Park and it's up to Stan to beat him up. But when Stan and his dad meet their new Mormon neighbours, they become fascinated with how genuinely nice they are.

programme.title: South Park: Towelie
programme.desc: When the government steals their new Gamesphere, the boys will stop at nothing to get it back. There is also a new dysfunctional character in South Park who tries to recruit the boys to his cause.

programme.title: South Park: The Return of the Fellowship of the Ring to the Two Towers
programme.desc: The boys embark upon a mythical quest as they set out to return their copy of the 'The Lord of the Rings' movie to the Two Towers video store. Unknown to them, they are really carrying the most degraded porno ever made.

programme.title: South Park: Imaginationland
programme.desc: When the entire contents of the world's imagination lay open before them, Stan and Kyle step right in. Back in South Park, Cartman swears he's seen a leprechaun.

programme.title: South Park: Imaginationland: Episode II
programme.desc: After the wall in Imaginationland is blown up by terrorists, the evil side crosses over. Cartman tracks down Kyle and Stan at the Pentagon and demands Kyle makes good on their agreement. Meanwhile, U.S. troops cross over into Imaginationland.

programme.title: South Park: Imaginationland: Episode III
programme.desc: Inside Imaginationland, Stan and Butters engage in the battle of their lives as they fight the army of evil imaginary forces. Meanwhile, Cartman goes all the way to the Supreme Court to get Kyle to pay up on their bet.

programme.title: South Park: Casa Bonita
programme.desc: Kyle chooses Stan, Kenny and Butters to celebrate his birthday at Casa Bonita. When Cartman finds out he's not invited, he arranges for Butters to conveniently go 'missing.'

programme.title: South Park: Scott Tenorman Must Die
programme.desc: Cartman is excited that he has finally entered puberty when he gets pubes of his very own. After the other boys explain that pubes don't count unless you grow them, Cartman realizes he been tricked and sets in motion a dastardly plot for revenge.

programme.title: South Park: Chickenlover
programme.desc: During a crime spree, Barbrady is forced to admit he can't read and must return to school. Anarchy ensues when the town realizes they are without law enforcement, so Barbrady makes the boys deputies to help keep the peace.

programme.title: South Park: Breast Cancer Show Ever
programme.desc: Wendy gets into trouble when she threatens to beat up Cartman after school is out.

programme.title: South Park: Dances With Smurfs
programme.desc: Cartman is chosen to do the morning announcements at South Park Elementary.

programme.title: South Park: Poor and Stupid
programme.desc: Cartman dreams of becoming a NASCAR driver and he's willing to do whatever it takes to make it happen, even if that means giving up all of his toys and money.

programme.title: South Park: The Snuke
programme.desc: When a new Muslim student joins the class, Cartman immediately suspects him of being a terrorist. Plus, the town is visited by Hillary Clinton.

programme.title: South Park: Bebe's Boobs Destroy Society

programme.desc: A woman who seemingly has it all secretly endures abuse at the hands of her controlling husband. Seeking to escape her marriage, she finds friendship with a fan of her writing, but soon realizes this relationship may be more dangerous than her marriage.

programme.title: Movie: The Wrong Crush
programme.desc: A high school student running from her troubled past becomes the target of affection from an unwanted admirer.

programme.title: Movie: The Wrong Son
programme.desc: A woman grows suspicious after her missing son returns home following the death of his father.

programme.title: Movie: Psycho Ex-Girlfriend
programme.desc: A psycho ex-girlfriend comes back to haunt her ex-boyfriend and his new girlfriend with violent threats.

programme.title: Forensic Files
programme.desc: Profiles of intriguing crimes, accidents and outbreaks of disease from around the world are examined.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Innocence
programme.desc: When a prominent criminal defence attorney is found murdered in his own home, police suspect it may have come at the hands of one of his questionable clientele.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Hunting
programme.desc: When a successful real estate agent is brutally murdered, panicked townspeople begin looking over their shoulders and locking their doors.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Political Thriller
programme.desc: When a Nevada politician dies in the midst of a cutthroat re-election campaign, the only clue investigators have to go on are the tiny punctures on her skin. As they dig deeper, they hone in upon the deceased's husband, a critical care nurse.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pinned by the Evidence
programme.desc: A street fight takes the life of a wrestler. A jury believes the accused killed in cold blood. He gets sentenced to twenty years in prison. Six years later, he is granted another trial when a forensic animator offers a different explanation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cries Unheard
programme.desc: When a 19-year-old girl is first found dead in her car, it seems to be an apparent suicide. Unsatisfied investigators probe the case further and discover the girl was involved in a complicated love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Making the Collar
programme.desc: A 16-year-old girl goes missing, and nine months later, her body is found. Forensic scientists narrow it down to a postal worker with a dog and red carpet, just with the evidence found on the girl's body.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Financial Downfall
programme.desc: A beautiful young woman is found dead after what seems like a tragic, accidental fall over a cliff. After a closer look at photographs from the scene, police get a new, more sinister theory about the young woman's death.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Army of Evidence
programme.desc: A mother of two children is found dead near suicide notes and a pistol. At first it is assumed to be a suicide, but when police learn she had nearly been killed in a fire three years earlier, new suspicions are raised.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shear Luck
programme.desc: Investigators have to reassemble a computer disk that has been cut to pieces with shears, in order to determine the guilt or innocence of an Air Force serviceman suspected of brutally murdering his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg Up on Crime
programme.desc: The case of a decomposed body found in an irrigation canal goes unsolved until shoe prints left by the careless criminal while dumping the body of his second victim give authorities the evidence they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tight-Fitting Genes
programme.desc: A behavioral profile is helpful in a murder investigation, but it's not an answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Potion
programme.desc: When a woman comes down with flu-like symptoms and eventually dies, a neurologist suspects she was poisoned with radioactive thallium. The FBI suspects her neighbour, who had a very extensive background in chemistry.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Killing Room
programme.desc: Investigators faced a daunting task: to prove Scott Dunn had been murdered, even though they had no body, no weapon, and no witnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Jean Pool
programme.desc: When new DNA technology becomes available, cold case investigators in Tennessee think they'll finally be able to find out who killed a local college student.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traffic Violations
programme.desc: When a young woman is found dead police immediately focus their attention on her husband. Not until they examine cell phone records and a unique shoe print do they realize the real killer has been a bit too close for comfort the entire time.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Muffled Cries
programme.desc: An attractive university student was forcibly abducted from a mall parking lot and never seen alive again.

programme.title: Forensic Files: If I Were You
programme.desc: A retired school teacher vanishes, but even though he was missing his bills are paid on time and he continues to correspond with his family.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dockter Visit
programme.desc: The investigation into the murder of a World War II veteran is impeded when detectives' prime suspect provides a solid alibi, but forensic scientists are able to make a key discovery due to the killer's preference for a distinctive style of footwear.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A woman suffering from depression apparently took her own life. But her sister told police, that a year before her death, she said if anything were to happen to her, there was a note in the china cabinet. Investigators found the note and the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Logged
programme.desc: An Ohio woman and her two daughters go missing while vacationing in Florida and their bodies are found floating in Tampa Bay. Five years later, investigators track down the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Low Maintenance
programme.desc: When a young college student is found dead in her apartment, an autopsy rules the suspicious death a homicide. Months later, investigators learn about an incident from the victim's past which gives them some clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Curve
programme.desc: On the way to Yosemite National Park, a car carrying three Secret Service agents collided with a car driven by a deputy from the local sheriff's office.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Visibility Zero
programme.desc: Analyzing the Amtrack Sunset Limited crash in 1993.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Disappearance of Helle Crafts
programme.desc: A flight attendant was reported missing from her home after hiring an investigator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Killer Fog
programme.desc: Investigators set out to determine if the dense, thick fog that caused the deadliest automobile accident on American history was a natural phenomenon, or the result of something else.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sex, Lies and DNA
programme.desc: While Earl Morris was vacationing in California, he learned his wife had gone missing from their home in Arizona. The search for Ruby Morris involved dozens of investigators and scientists, even the coast guard.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Deadly Delivery
programme.desc: A serial bomber was waging a vendetta against the legal profession: A judge, two attorneys and even a courthouse had been targeted. Investigators used evidence from the bombs to lead them to the perpetrator.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bitter Potion
programme.desc: When a woman comes down with flu-like symptoms and eventually dies, a neurologist suspects she was poisoned with radioactive thallium. The FBI suspects her neighbour, who had a very extensive background in chemistry.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Killing Room
programme.desc: Investigators faced a daunting task: to prove Scott Dunn had been murdered, even though they had no body, no weapon, and no witnesses.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Stick 'em Up
programme.desc: When a bank president is found floating in a nearby lake, taped to a chair, forensic experts start piecing together the tape and discover a missing piece. It's this piece, and tips pouring in from residents, that will lead to a capture.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Head Games
programme.desc: To celebrate one year of marriage, a young couple goes on a camping trip. When the husband is shot and killed, the wife is so distraught she gives two different stories of what happened. When forensic psychiatry intervenes, the truth is finally learned.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Road Rage
programme.desc: Bloody sneakers and a purse found in a sleeping bag leads police to the body of a young woman. After collecting, sorting, and analyzing all sorts of evidence, it's a simple mark on the woman's body that will solve the case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hunter or Hunted?
programme.desc: A women is killed in the woods on the last day of hunting season, and police assume it was an accident until a suspicious letter arrives.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Over and Out
programme.desc: A pipe bomb explodes in a house, killing a man and wounding his mother. Police use a lot number on a battery and a mailing label to track down the bomber, and determine his motive.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Duelling Confessions
programme.desc: When a teenage girl is found dead on the side of the road her boyfriend becomes the prime suspect. He eventually confessed to her murder, but so did another man. It would take forty years, an author and an expert in pedestrian accidents to find the truth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wood-Be Killer
programme.desc: A murderer thought he could cover his tracks by setting fire to the crime scene, but in doing so, he provided the forensic evidence needed to convict him; a new forensic tool used to examine the kindling proved to be his undoing.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Wired for Disaster
programme.desc: A 29-year-old woman is killed instantly when a bomb explodes in her home. The bomber not only had knowledge and skill, but also a motive for murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Novel Idea
programme.desc: When a frantic call from a man claiming his wife fell down the stairs brings investigators to their home, they are concerned by the unusually large number of bloodstains, and how big they are.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Grave Danger
programme.desc: A young man dies in a mysterious car crash, but was it an accident? Forensic science uncovered what really caused the crash, and the truth devastated three different families.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Internal Affair
programme.desc: Friends and family of a woman gone missing were determined to find her until their worst fears were confirmed weeks later. Blood evidence and computer forensics helped investigators to catch the killer, and convince the jury of his guilt.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Water Hazard
programme.desc: The victim had ingested a massive amount of cyanide. An unlikely clue, a flaw on a mailing envelope, exposed a murderer who was willing to kill innocent people to get the one person he wanted.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Leave No Gold Behind
programme.desc: Parker questions the ground he's mining and his new foremen. Tony makes a big decision to move the family's entire operation. Rick's mechanic arrives at a critical moment. Then, the Dakota Boys work together in the hunt for gold in Alaska's raging waters.

programme.title: Gold Rush: We're Gonna Need A Bigger Bucket
programme.desc: Parker commands a huge engineering challenge to his team. Rick makes a huge upgrade to his operation. Mike and Monica team-up. At the start of the season, the Dakota Boys split up in their hunt for gold in the raging white waters of the Chilkat mountains.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Monster Red Lives
programme.desc: In search of big nuggets, Rick buys a monster washplant. A flood puts Tony's new claim in jeopardy. Parker needs to move Big Red in record time. Dustin's crew finds a claim, but must make it through the waterfall's pound zone. Fred introduces a new miner.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Motherlode Mountain
programme.desc: Rick must decide whether to mine gold or put his new washplant together. Parker tests his new co-foreman.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Make or Break
programme.desc: Rick races to get Monster Red running after losing his only way to mine gold. Meanwhile, Parker sinks money into a new claim. The Beets Family run a test on daughter Monica's Hunker Creek claim that could make or break their season.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Human Kannonball
programme.desc: With odds stacked against them, a bodyguard, a firefighter and an ultra-fit football coach take on three massive grizzlies in a gauntlet of challenges. As they fight for a place in the finale, each discovers just how badly bears don't like to lose.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Hit or Miss
programme.desc: Todd, Jack and their crew leave their homes with hopes of striking gold in Alaska. Todd and Jack clash as they face challenges that threaten to shut down the season. The tension is at an all-time high as families arrive asking why no gold has been found.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Basic Instinct
programme.desc: An Army veteran, an ultra-marathoner, and a world record weightlifter face the biggest battles of their lives as they take on Bart, Honey Bump, and Tank in challenges of strength, speed, and strategy, but it's the underdog who shocks Bear Mountain.

programme.title: Gold Rush: The Pain Barrier
programme.desc: The miners continue to run dirt but an equipment malfunction brings the operation to a halt. James Harness collapses and Jimmy Dorsey drives a wedge between himself and the crew when he takes on an extra job to earn cash.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Gold Fever
programme.desc: After 80 days, the miners are behind schedule and out of money. They need to find $10,000 worth of gold within two days or the families will be sent home. Meanwhile, after Dorsey struggles with the wave table, tensions flare and fists fly.

programme.title: Gold Rush: Going for Broke
programme.desc: With winter weather closing in, a gold recovery expert comes to help the rookies. Todd discovers a major design flaw in the equipment and is forced to make huge modifications.

programme.title: Major League Fishing's Pro Bass Tour: Bass Pro Tour: 2019 REDCREST Championship Round, La Crosse
programme.desc: The Championship Round of Major League Fishing's Bass Pro Tour REDCREST, from La Crosse Wisconsin.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Winter is Here: Part 2
programme.desc: Monte must fill his tanks fast to get home to his ailing father, while a shocking mishap leaves a Hansen family member grasping for life.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Tough Inheritance
programme.desc: As winter intensifies, Sean faces an engine room fire. Summer Bay deck boss suffers a season-threatening injury. Harley offers a newfound nephew a trial run at greenhorn. Monte races to fill Wizard's Bairdi quota so Keith can say farewell to their father.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Russian Roulette
programme.desc: Josh and Casey risk a 500 mile trek north to the icy Russian line. Jake tracks his own fast-moving crab horde. Sig does double duty on the Northwestern. The Bering sea cracks the Wizard's 74 year-old steel hull as the Colburns face the loss of their dad.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Curse of the Russian Line
programme.desc: Josh and Casey haul their all time biggest pots, starting a gold rush to the Russian line. Cpt. Bill gets inside intel, while Harley confirms numbers his own way.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Hell Hath No Fury
programme.desc: The wrath of Arctic Storm Elsa hits the Cornelia hardest as a breakaway pot thrashes Josh and Casey's crew. Captain Keith orders deckhands onto the stack as Elsa's icy blasts threaten to capsize the Wizard. No rest for Jake as the Saga takes a rogue wave.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Sixty Foot Monster
programme.desc: As arctic superstorm Elsa intensifies, a rare forecast warns of isolated waves of unusual size. Trapped in the crab-rich northern grounds, the Cornelia Marie, Wizard and Southern Wind haul pots as big as the waves, until one boat faces a 60 foot monster.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Crane Wreck
programme.desc: In storm-driven seas, Cornelia Marie's crane goes off the rails, smashing Josh and Casey's wheelhouse and injuring deckhand Taylor. Sig risks navigating a rocky passage in treacherous conditions, and the Wizard crew face a rogue wave without warning.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Judgement Day
programme.desc: Tania and Syngin struggle with communication. Juliana seeks independence. Religion divides Mike and Natalie. Mursel makes an important decision. Jasmin finds it hard to fit in. Anny's birthday gets wild. Angela hears news about Michael's visa.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Pillow Talk: Judgement Day
programme.desc: Tania and Syngin struggle with communication. Juliana seeks independence. Religion divides Mike and Natalie. Mursel makes an important decision. Jasmin finds it hard to fit in. Anny's birthday gets wild. Angela hears news about Michael's visa.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Most Outrageous Moments
programme.desc: Relive the most outrageous moments on the show as we look back at some of our favourite couples. Through unforgettable arrivals, culture clashes, lies, skeptical family and breakdowns, each couple has fought to find lasting love across the globe.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Nicole and Azan: The Full Story
programme.desc: Take a look back at the highs and lows of Nicole and Azan's journey.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Pillow Talk: Judgement Day
programme.desc: Tania and Syngin struggle with communication. Juliana seeks independence. Religion divides Mike and Natalie. Mursel makes an important decision. Jasmin finds it hard to fit in. Anny's birthday gets wild. Angela hears news about Michael's visa.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Pillow Talk: Judgement Day
programme.desc: Tania and Syngin struggle with communication. Juliana seeks independence. Religion divides Mike and Natalie. Mursel makes an important decision. Jasmin finds it hard to fit in. Anny's birthday gets wild. Angela hears news about Michael's visa.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and Potato Chips and Onion Dip
programme.desc: Karen has hired a samba-dancing troupe for her guests, while Alexis has planned a more scaled back wedding day.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and Dancing Zombies
programme.desc: Tinisha wants to impress with banquet hall surprises, while Rachel plans to have a tumbling flower girl and theatrics.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Wishing Lantern
programme.desc: Aurea's afternoon nuptials include a garden ceremony, and Lara treats her guests to a Viennese dessert hour.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Toast to Me
programme.desc: Shyremia's wedding will be shining with glitz and glamour; Lindsay's Jewish ceremony will be packed with emotion and joy.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Swamp Buggy
programme.desc: Sarah's groom arrives to their country themed wedding in a swamp buggy, while Janelle's guests ride on rickshaws to her Asian inspired reception.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Unity Fish Bowl
programme.desc: Brittany unites her fish and her family, while Jamie swaps her wedding cake for a ceremonial pizza.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and a Wild Goose
programme.desc: Kaity's fairy tale wedding is complete with a princess gown, while Michelle says her vows on a rustic farm.

programme.title: Four Weddings: ...and an Army Salute
programme.desc: Amanda receives a very special Army salute at her wedding, and Larissa's butterfly theme makes everyone's heart flutter.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Dr. Bikini
programme.desc: A man comes into the ER because he was hurt by a boat propeller. A patient creates a deadly chain reaction after they are discharged. The ER's head nurse and computers are down.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Heart in Hand
programme.desc: A doctor opens a nurse's chest and holds her heart in his hand in a desperate effort to save her life. Swords, severed limbs and suspicious stories lead to confusion in the ER.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Size Matters
programme.desc: A woman risks losing her finger after trying on an ill-fitting engagement ring. A body builder can't breathe and doctors are shocked to discover why. A doctor takes a break outside and is nearly struck by a car driven by her next patient.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Headaches and Zombies
programme.desc: A violent patient who cannot be sedated endangers a pregnant ER doctor. An unexplained headache turns life threatening for a mom during a vacation, while a man with a fencepost through his torso jumps the triage line on a busy night in the ER.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Rob Riggle
programme.desc: Comedian and actor Rob Riggle joins Rob, Steelo, and Chanel as they visit a "Ski Disaster Academy," celebrate some "North American Turds," and report the news while "Live on the Scene."

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Zach Holmes
programme.desc: Soulful singer Allen Stone joins Rob, Steelo, and Chanel to put smiles to the test in Testing Positive, get frustrated with technology in Tech Wrecked, and learn that dogs can sometimes be Man's Worst Enemy.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Brooks Wheelan
programme.desc: Comedian Brooks Wheelan shows Rob the dangers of being 'Drunk on Ebay,' does a little 'Critter Control' and feels the terror of being 'Snake Bait.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: O.T. Genasis
programme.desc: Rapper O.T. Genasis joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to find out why everybody's mad, feel the "cham-pain," and take a trip to Wrong Beach.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Kurt Busch
programme.desc: NASCAR great Kurt Busch joins Rob, Chanel, and Steelo to talk about Trackheads, what it means to be running hot, and the times you want to leave it in Vegas.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Ja Rule
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Sterling are joined by rapper and reality TV star Ja Rule to 'keep it on the green,' run in terror from 'Ja Ghouls' and be driven crazy by 'these damn kids.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Post Malone
programme.desc: Rapper Post Malone joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo for some Really White Iversons, to mess things up with Saucin' On You and to present some Knuckle Tats.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Mike Tyson
programme.desc: Mike Tyson joins Rob, Steelo, and Chanel to talk about knocking people out in the first, playing a game of "Peek-a-Boo," and the constant annoyance of "Flappy Dicks."

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Chanel and Sterling CL
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo and Chanel find out what makes you 'call the health inspector' and celebrate with some officers who've won the ‘cop lottery'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Machine Gun Kelly
programme.desc: Actor and rapper Machine Gun Kelly joins Rob to celebrate 'Wild Boys,' fend off the 'Fun Police' and learn you can never be too scared of 'Sky Coffins.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Keyshia Cole
programme.desc: Rapper Waka Flocka Flame joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to consider hiring some 'Qualified Rollers,' marvel at people who use 'No Hands,' and laugh at 'Craptical Jokers.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Wale
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo and Chanel hang out with Hip-Hop superstar Wale, meet a few women with 'no chill', see who's 'numb to the madness', and meet some 'fans of the district'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: T-Pain
programme.desc: Grammy-winning rapper and producer T-Pain joins Rob, Chanel and Sterling to sweeten the sound of people's slams in 'T-Pain your Pain' and talks about 'hard 180s.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Jay Rock
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo welcome rapper Jay Rock as they expose some "Fakers," check out some people who've been "Slammed Straight," and find out that there's no escaping "Karma Kraze."

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Mark Cuban
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo are joined by Mark Cuban to learn all about investing in the Mark Tank. Next, they try to sort out the Cuban Bathroom Crisis. Things get deep as they delve into the Dangers of Dunking.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Wiz Khalifa
programme.desc: Rapper Wiz Khalifa guest stars and he'll discuss with Rob why Grass Is Your Friend and the joys of Human Magnets. The fan favourite, Makeshift Thrill Rides, returns to the show.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Gary Owen
programme.desc: Gary Owen joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo to try out some SACKUPUNCTURE, watch couples get lost in a LOVE BUBBLE, and experience redheads reaching their boiling point in GINGER SNAPS.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Paul Rodriguez
programme.desc: Pro-skater Paul Rodriguez and Rob break down karate style in 'Enter The Donkey,' laugh at some 'Funny Dads,' and reveal the painful side of being 'Bad At Ledges.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Jermaine Dupri
programme.desc: Entertainment mogul Jermaine Dupri joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo to discuss "The Price of Likes," meet some "Sleep Ninjas," and help some musicians who are "Unproducible."

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Travis Pastrana
programme.desc: Action sports star Travis Pastrana helps Rob illustrate some Poorly Placed Trees and Whiskey Throttles.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Rob's Parents II
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Steelo welcome Rob's parents, Pat and Gene Dyrdek.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Riff Raff
programme.desc: Rapper Riff Raff shows off his brain freeze.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Ken Block
programme.desc: Rob and Gymkhana phenomenon Ken Black show us how not to be a 'Gymkhanabe' and we see first-hand what being a 'Death Dodger' is all about.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Derek Hough
programme.desc: Dancer and choreographer Derek Hough and Rob discuss the 'future of dance,' see what happens to people with 'garbage feet' and learn how to 'knock yourself out.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Vaughn Gittin, Jr.
programme.desc: Drift racing super-star, Vaughn Gittin, Jr., reunites with Rob to watch videos featuring Faulty Equipment and High Speed Chaos.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Ty Dolla Sign
programme.desc: Hip hop and R&B singer Ty Dolla $ign joins Rob, Steelo and Chanel to go to some Side Shows, do some Neck Prep and find some hot Porta-Parties.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Karl Anthony Towns
programme.desc: Basketball star Karl-Anthony Towns joins Rob, Chanel and Steelo as they listen in on some 'man thoughts', find the value of 'paper gold', and witness raging 'twitchers'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Big Black II
programme.desc: Big Black is back and he's showing off Black Lavender. See what happens When Bad Ideas Go Worse and people suffer a Failure to Launch.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Charlotte McKinney
programme.desc: Model and actress Charlotte Mckinney joins Rob, Sterling and Chanel to tell some 'dirty secrets,' taste some 'all natural beef' and clench for the category 'spike my butt.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Harley Morenstein
programme.desc: Harley 'Epic Mealtime' Morenstein and Rob expose some 'Epic Meal Crimes,' discover the shock of 'Human Bacon,' and unravel the big meaning of 'Balthazars'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Tory Lanez
programme.desc: Multi-talented recording artist Tory Lanez joins Rob, Steelo, and Chanel to talk about the idea of being TOO SWAVEY, people who are HARD TO LOVE, and what it's like living in MADHOUSES.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Sage the Gemini
programme.desc: Rob, Chanel and Sterling have rapper and producer Sage the Gemini on the show to find out if he's 'glide or die,' get 'over gassed' and announce to the world 'I love sparks.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Redfoo
programme.desc: Grammy-nominated recording artist Redfoo joins Rob and the gang to talk about the 'legends of campfoo' going 'lights out' and learn what it means to get 'party rock'd.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: G-Eazy
programme.desc: Rapper G-Eazy joins Chanel, Rob and Steelo for an education on the Dangers of Alone Time, indulge in the riches of The Almost Good Life and experience the sorrows of being Served a Curve.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Jessie J
programme.desc: Singer-songwriter Jessie J joins Rob, Steelo, and Chanel to learn how to do it like a dude, hear some harsh truths in 'Mom-splaining' and watch the bodies slam in 'Bang Bang'.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Wee Man and Preston
programme.desc: Rob shows some video clips to Jackass veterans Wee Man and Preston.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Bella Twins
programme.desc: Twin divas Nicole and Brianna stop by the set to show some of their backyard wrestling moves and how to make a perfect pain angel.

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Matt Shively
programme.desc: Rob, Steelo and Chanel are joined by actor Matt Shively to experience some 'paranorm-ish activity,' do some 'attempted man' and meet some animals that are 'milk ready.'

programme.title: Ridiculousness: Anderson .Paak
programme.desc: On an all-new episode of Ridiculousness, Rob, Steelo and Chanel welcome Grammy-winning artist Anderson .Paak to check out some 'social slams', celebrate people with 'signature smiles', and party down at some 'wild weddings'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: No Good Deed
programme.desc: Q, Sal, Murr and Joe compete in a focus group face-off, convincing people that their TV show ideas are the tops, and tonight's losers might get run out of town when they reveal their financial mismanagement plan to charity donors.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bogey Man
programme.desc: The laughing gas flows freely when the guys pose as dental assistants. Later, they make headlines for all the wrong reasons, and get burned giving some campfire tips. Plus, tonight’s big loser scores a hole in none on the links.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Hell on Wheels
programme.desc: The guys try and work out the kinks as physical therapists, then pitch some way out-of-the-box ideas for TV hosts. Plus, the big loser gets rolled over by some speedy ladies.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q take some customers for a wild ride, and things get messy when they ask fellow shoppers for a hand. Plus, the big losers suffer a monster punishment that leaves them crushed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Off the Reservation
programme.desc: Murr, Q, Joe and Sal participate in a fake documentary, then find themselves in the middle of a marshmallow throwing contest. Plus, tonight's big loser is the host with the least when he can't find customers' dinner reservations.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Show Stopper

programme.desc: A cosplayer meets with the doctors to make her body more comical. Later, Dr. Dubrow helps a woman whose previous plastic surgery left her with a heart on her butt, while Dr. Nassif operates on a woman who had her nose ruined over 30 years ago.

programme.title: Botched: Short Changed at the Nipple Bank
programme.desc: A transgender woman who got her rhinoplasty in Mexico seeks Dr. Nassif's help to fix her collapsed nose. Then, Dr. Dubrow tackles a botched double mastectomy, and a young woman travels from the UK to look faker than fake.

programme.title: Botched: Junk in the Trunk
programme.desc: After a dog ripped off half her lip, a 25-year-old seeks help from the doctors while a woman who pumps up her own 4600cc breasts at home gets some much needed advice. Meanwhile, Dr. Dubrow tackles a butt that's affected by spina bifida.

programme.title: Botched: Baby Got Boobs
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow has a lot to handle as he hopes to help a cancer survivor reconstruct her breasts and abdomen. A psychic who looks to remove her implants. The doctors try to reason with someone who could potentially become a plastic surgery addict.

programme.title: Botched: I Love New Boobs
programme.desc: Tiffany 'New York' Pollard is back to beat Breast Implant Illness (BII) and go au naturel, while another former patient with over injected lips returns hoping to restore them to normal and a cosplayer needs the Wizard of Boobs to save the day.

programme.title: Botched: Not OK From the UK

programme.title: Botched: Bums, Boobs, and Baklava

programme.title: Botched: Big Booty Problems
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow lifts a woman's spirit and her udderly disastrous sagging breasts while Dr. Nassif does a rhinoplasty on a woman who has beef with her 'pig nose'. Meanwhile, a viral sensation is desperate for help with her 'big booty problems'.

programme.title: Botched: Flipped Out Butt and a Pelican Neck
programme.desc: Dr. Dubrow helps a patient who is flippin' out over her flippin' butt implants, while Dr. Nassif tries to save a patient with a wrecked pelican neck. Meanwhile, a wannabe trophy wife seeks a bigger booty to find the man of her dreams.

programme.title: Botched: Boob Greed and Bump Its
programme.desc: A woman with four implants in her chest seeks Dr. Dubrow's help to remove them while a transgender patient from Australia wants to add two implants on top of her head to replace her Bump It.

programme.title: Botched: All I Want For Christmas ...

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: East Coast Comfort
programme.desc: Guy is making stops up and down the east coast for some home cooking. He checks out a Southern comfort join in Cambridge, Mass., pierogi in Fall River, and meatballs and fries in Providence.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Tacos and Tots
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's hitting the road for joints taking childhood favourites to a gourmet level. In Denver, an old-time bar is going all-out homemade on tater tots, pork rinds and a monster pastrami sandwich.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Dynamic Duos
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's checkin' out the combos that make some local hangouts a hit. In Denver, the double-duty corner bar smoking pork for its biscuits and topping pizzas with the bounty of the county.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Comfort and Soul
programme.desc: This trip, Guy's hittin' up some joints that'll warm the palate and the soul. In Portland, Ore., a funky neighbourhood cafe is cranking out comfort foods like the heartless artichoke sandwich and a curried lentil dish that hits all the right notes.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: All Vegas, All the Time
programme.desc: Guy heads off the Vegas strip, checks out a dive in Buffalo and a Bulgarian tapas joint.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Real Deal Roots
programme.desc: Guy digs into dishes with a personal connection, including a Jewish deli in Toronto.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Stuffed and Twisted
programme.desc: Guy is checking out funky foods from coast to coast. In Monterey California, the second generation Italian place is serving mom's recipes like meaty lasagne and minestrone.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Not Your Typical Joints
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's going off the beaten path to check out some funky finds. In Charlotte, N.C., an eatery tucked inside a beer store slings crazy waffle creations. In Houston, a not-your-everyday fusion joint mashes up killer barbecue with sushi.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: A World of Barbecue
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's firing up an entire world of barbecue on this trip. In Wilmington, a righteous spot is smokin' up chicken salad and off-the-chain chili.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Belly, Beef And Bratwurst
programme.desc: Guy Fieri is hittin' the road and diggin' into some serious meat. In Atlanta, a funky Asian spot putting out prime-time pork belly and wok-fried chicken. In Vancouver, an elevated diner dishing out duck pancakes and not-your-momma's meatloaf.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Creative Creations
programme.desc: On this trip, Guy Fieri is divin' into inventive eats. In Burlington, Vt., a funky joint cooking up mac and cheese pancakes. In Richmond, Va., a down-home spot loadin' up their biscuits and going gangbusters with grits.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: From Australian to Asian
programme.desc: Guy Fieri's hitting the road and grabbing all kinds of worldwide flavour. In Kauai, Hawaii, a Japanese-Hawaiian spot putting a quick spin on fish, burgers and burritos. In Kansas City, Mo., an Australian bakery cookin' up Down Under comfort food.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Food Truck Flavorfest
programme.desc: This trip, Guy Fieri's grabbin' some of the best meals on four wheels with some full-throttle food trucks. In Nashville, a joint transforming the classic grilled cheese into gourmet goodness.

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Playin' Chicken

programme.title: Diners, Drive-Ins and Dives: Delicious Discoveries

programme.title: Como Concepts: Maximizing Impact
programme.desc: Chris Como teaches how to add distance without changing clubhead speed. Chris reveals how increasing the angle of attack leads to crushing the driver, and the keys to the stinger shot made famous by former student Tiger Woods.

programme.title: Como Concepts: Ground Reaction Force

programme.title: Como Concepts: Backswing Builder

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Man Who Talked to Dogs
programme.desc: Celebrity dog trainer Mark Stover and his wife, Linda, built a thriving business and a beautiful home but their dream life didn't last. An affair led to a bitter divorce. Then Mark vanished in a mystery with the makings of a Hollywood thriller.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Plot Twist
programme.desc: For a group of stage actors, life seemed to be imitating art in the worst way when a young college student was killed. Police believed they knew who was responsible, but this mystery had a grand finale no one saw coming.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deep in the Woods
programme.desc: Kelli Bordeaux was just starting what she hoped to be a long career in the military, but fate had other plans. When she vanished, friends and family launched a frantic search, but it was stranger hell-bent on justice who uncovered the ugly truth.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Bondurants
programme.desc: A pair of larger than life identical twins commit a series of brutal attacks in a small Tennessee town. With each crime, the brothers grow more emboldened. As time goes on and with little evidence against them, there's no telling how far they'll go.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Brileys
programme.desc: Over a brutal 7-month stretch, a trio of brothers commit a series of increasingly violent crimes across the city of Richmond, leaving behind a growing body count. Even after their apprehension, these brothers prove difficult to contain.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Lewis and Machuca
programme.desc: In the summer of 1991, a pair of half-siblings creates panic across southern California when they embark on a spree of random crimes of the worst kind, targeting people out doing everyday tasks.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Rosas
programme.desc: After a man is found brutally murdered inside his own bar a murder mystery unfolds over the span of years. Detectives believe it's a business deal gone bad and must remain steadfastly dedicated to the case after hitting several dead ends.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Carrs
programme.desc: The Carr brothers arrive in Wichita intending to commit robberies, but their plans quickly escalate to a murderous spree the likes of which Kansas had never seen. The reign of terror by the brothers is later known as the 'Wichita Massacre.'

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Bevers
programme.desc: Sheltered teen brothers Robert and Michael Bever idolized serial killers and dreamed of being the most prolific murderers in history. With an arsenal of weapons, their plan for notoriety begins at home in their quiet Oklahoma suburb.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Williams
programme.desc: Raised in a strict home, sheltered from the outside world, Matthew and Tyler believe it's their duty to cleanse the world of those living in sin. When two men are found dead the brother's connection to them points toward a hateful trail of crime.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Stovalls
programme.desc: When their brother is convicted of murder, three siblings hatch a deadly plot to avenge him by targeting the star witness in his trial. The plan goes awry when the wrong person is on the receiving end of their vengeance.

programme.title: Killer Siblings: Gustafsons
programme.desc: When their brother is convicted of murder, three siblings hatch a deadly plot to avenge him by targeting the star witness in his trial. The plan goes awry when the wrong person is on the receiving end of their vengeance.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Buried Secrets
programme.desc: Judy Carlson lived in a painful limbo. Her son disappeared without a trace. Years went by and she may never have known his fate if not for a rookie detective’s dogged work but to solve this cold case, the investigator also need the help of a killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Who Killed the Radio Star
programme.desc: Steven B. Williams was a DJ with a golden voice. Then he vanished. It was a mystery that stretched from California to Montana. The clue to it all was wrapped in napkin tucked in a cabinet hidden in a library.

programme.title: Snapped: Behind Bars: Sheila Davalloo
programme.desc: The only convicted murderer featured on 'Snapped' twice, Davalloo tells her story in an exclusive prison interview. We look back at the crimes that put her behind bars, reveal more details from her past, and examine a possible connection to a cold case.

programme.title: The Piketon Family Murders
programme.desc: In rural Piketon, Ohio a family of 8 is murdered execution style across four different properties. As police investigate the attack, word of the brutal murders sends shockwaves through the community and destroys the lives of two families.

programme.title: Snapped: Sandy Locklear
programme.desc: The murder of a beloved widower leaves police wondering what secrets his marriage, to his much younger new wife, might be hiding.

programme.title: Snapped: Michelle Paet
programme.desc: An Air Force sergeant is gunned down in his garage revealing an elaborate conspiracy with an unlikely mastermind.

programme.title: Snapped: Laura Stelmasek
programme.desc: Police must unravel a mystery involving an Arizona couple, cross-country romance and a deadly plan.

programme.title: Snapped: Dawson McGehee
programme.desc: Halloween becomes a real-life horror story when police discover a beloved mother of four murdered. The panic intensifies as the investigation turns into a case populated by demons, masks and a potential psychopath on the loose.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Fool Monty
programme.desc: Mr. Burns is distraught at the less-than-sensitive response to his news that he has only weeks to live. When he ends up at the Simpson's home, Marge and Homer decide it's payback time, while Lisa stands up for the old man.

programme.title: The Simpsons: How Munched Is That Birdie in the Window?
programme.desc: When a pigeon flies through the Simpsons' home and suffers a broken wing, Bart makes it his duty to care for the bird and nurse it back to health. When the pigeon is ready to fly, Homer decides to enter it in a bird race.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Fight Before Christmas
programme.desc: Disappointed that she is spreading holiday cheer alone, Marge sends a letter to Martha Stewart to ask for her help to save the family's Christmas. Martha comes to the rescue and transforms the house into the North Pole chalet Marge has always dreamed of.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Donnie Fatso
programme.desc: Homer spends New Year's Eve in the Springfield Penitentiary after getting caught bribing an official. An FBI investigator offers to reduce his jail time if Homer agrees to go undercover as an informant to investigate Fat Tony.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Moms I'd Like to Forget
programme.desc: During a game of dodgeball, Bart discovers that a classmate has the same scar on his hand that he does. Puzzled by the matching blemishes, he asks Marge about it, who explains that she and her girlfriends formed 'The Cool Moms' club years earlier.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Flaming Moe
programme.desc: When Smithers offers to help transform Moe's dingy pub into a more refined and trendy lounge, the revamped Mo's quickly becomes Springfield's local gay hangout.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer the Father
programme.desc: Homer becomes obsessed with a 1980s family sitcom and models his parenting skills after the show's sensible father, much to Bart's chagrin.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Blue and the Gray
programme.desc: After spending another Valentine's Day alone, Moe attends a seminar to gain more confidence with women. Moe takes the doctor's advice and asks Homer to be his wingman, but then becomes distraught when women are drawn to Homer.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Angry Dad: The Movie
programme.desc: Bart's cartoon about an angry dad is turned into a movie and quickly becomes a critics' favourite. When Russell Brand presents the Golden Globe to Bart's film, Homer usurps the podium and gives his own acceptance speech.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Scorpion's Tale
programme.desc: At a field trip, Lisa discovers that desert water mysteriously makes combative creatures get along, so she brings some of the water home as a souvenir. When Grampa moves in, Homer secretly tests the desert water on Grampa.

programme.title: The Simpsons: A Midsummer's Nice Dream
programme.desc: The town is abuzz when Cheech and Chong announce a Springfield stop on their much-anticipated reunion tour. When Chong is unable to perform, Homer steps in and delivers all the jokes by heart. Impressed, Cheech invites Homer to go on tour with him.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Love Is a Many Strangled Thing
programme.desc: When Homer inadvertently humiliates Bart in front of a stadium crowd, Marge encourages Homer to enroll in a fathering enrichment class taught by therapist Dr. Zander.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Great Simpsina
programme.desc: Lisa becomes a magician's apprentice to the legendary Great Raymondo, who helps her develop her craft. A schoolgirl crush clouds her judgment when she is coaxed into revealing the Great Raymondo's most famous magic trick to his phony arch nemesis.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Real Housewives of Fat Tony
programme.desc: Fat Tony and Selma are in love and get married after a whirlwind courtship. To ease Marge's reservations about the marriage, Fat Tony invites Homer and Marge to a weekend getaway at the Jersey Shore.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer Scissorhands
programme.desc: When Homer discovers a genius talent for styling hair and opens his own salon, he becomes Springfield's most in-demand hair stylist.

programme.title: The Simpsons: 500 Keys
programme.desc: When the Simpsons discover a collection of keys, which open every door in Springfield, Lisa stumbles upon an eerie hidden classroom beneath Springfield Elementary School.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Ned-Liest Catch
programme.desc: Feeling guilty for getting Mrs. Krabappel suspended after one of his school pranks, Bart helps her escape detention, and Ned Flanders winds up saving her life in the process.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Falcon and the D'Ohman
programme.desc: Homer befriends a reserved security guard recently hired by the nuclear power plant. Plagued by violent flashbacks from his past as a CIA agent, he must overcome his tortured nightmares to save Homer from a Ukrainian terrorist.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart Stops to Smell the Roosevelts
programme.desc: Principal Skinner challenges superintendent Gary Chalmers to take over Bart's education after one of Bart's pranks leads to a school fundraiser debacle.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXII
programme.desc: Homer takes a dangerous dive into an isolated canyon on Candy Peak, but when a crashing boulder traps his arm, he channels the spirit of Aron Ralston to save himself.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Replaceable You
programme.desc: Bart's science fair project, a mechanical baby seal, outshines Lisa's asteroid model and becomes a popular pet among the retirement home patrons.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Food Wife
programme.desc: Marge takes Bart and Lisa on a weekend excursion and when an unexpected restaurant detour awakens their taste buds, fellow foodies inspire them to start a food blog.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Book Job
programme.desc: Lisa becomes disheartened when she learns the shocking truth behind the 'tween lit' industry and her beloved fantasy novel characters, but Homer decides to cash in on the craze and forms a team to group-write the next 'tween lit' hit.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Man in Blue Flannel Pants
programme.desc: The Simpsons host a tastemaker party at their home to promote Absolut Krusty, Krusty the Clown's own brand of liquor. Mr. Burns takes notice of the party's success and decides to promote Homer to 'Account Man' for the Springfield Nuclear Plant.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Ten-Per-Cent Solution
programme.desc: Krusty the Clown gets stuck in a rut when the television network pulls his show and his talent agency drops him. When the Simpsons introduce him to an agent, they're surprised to learn she was Krusty's first-ever agent.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Holidays of Future Passed
programme.desc: The Simpsons flash forward 30 years and find themselves in a tech-savvy, futuristic Springfield. Bart and Lisa have children of their own and decide to spend the holidays as one big family at Homer and Marge's house.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Politically Inept With Homer Simpson
programme.desc: Homer lands his own political talk show after a video featuring his impassioned rant on poor treatment at the airport goes viral. As his talk show quickly gains popularity nationwide, Homer becomes the spokesperson for the Gravy Movement.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The D'oh-cial Network
programme.desc: As the mastermind behind the online social networking phenomenon 'SpringFace,' Lisa is called to trial when Springfield's obsession with the site becomes chaotic and dysfunctional.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Moe Goes From Rags to Riches
programme.desc: After Moe is heckled for not having any real companions, Moe's best friend and beloved bar rag narrates his incredible 1,000-year journey to Springfield.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Daughter Also Rises
programme.desc: Marge and Lisa's mother-daughter Valentine's Day plans change when Lisa meets an intellectual romantic who shares her passion for culture, history and literature.

programme.title: The Simpsons: At Long Last Leave
programme.desc: When the Simpsons are evicted from Springfield, they join an off-the-grid community outside of town.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Exit Through the Kwik-E-Mart
programme.desc: In order to get even with his dad, Bart goes undercover as a street graffiti artist and plasters Homer's unflattering image all over Springfield.

programme.title: The Simpsons: How I Wet Your Mother
programme.desc: Karma gets the best of Homer after he gets his friends in trouble, and as a result, his bedwetting problem worsens. The family tries to infiltrate his dreams to search for clues in his subconscious to determine the source of his problem.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Them, Robot
programme.desc: Mr. Burns replaces the Springfield Power Plant's employees with robots, but decides to keep Homer as the sole human worker.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Beware My Cheating Bart
programme.desc: When Bart is forced to chaperone Jimbo's girlfriend at a movie, she ends up developing feelings for him, resulting in a whole bunch of trouble with the bullies at school.

programme.title: The Simpsons: A Totally Fun Thing Bart Will Never Do Again
programme.desc: When Bart sees a commercial for the ultimate cruise, he begs his parents for a family vacation. Low on cash, the only way they can go is if each family member sells one valuable item.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Spy Who Learned Me
programme.desc: Marge becomes upset when Homer blurts out embarrassing remarks throughout a movie. After Homer suffers a concussion on the job, he seeks help during his time off to learn how to become a better husband.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Ned 'N' Edna's Blend
programme.desc: When the town of Springfield learns that Ned and Edna secretly got hitched, Marge offers to throw them a congratulatory reception.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa Goes Gaga
programme.desc: Lisa tries to reverse her status as one of the least popular girls in school by ghostwriting positive things about herself on the school blog.

programme.title: The Longest Daycare
programme.desc: Maggie Simpson spends the day in the Ayn Rand School for Tots.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Moonshine River
programme.desc: The family travels to New York City in search of Bart's long-lost love who he wants to reconnect with. Lisa and Marge look forward to the trip and settle for the free 'Shakespeare In the Park,' which doesn't go as planned.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXIII
programme.desc: A Mayan Homer and Marge are witnesses to the prediction that 2012 will be the end of the world, the Springfield Subatomic Supercollider creates a black hole that terrorizes the city and Bart travels back in time to 1974.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Adventures in Baby Getting
programme.desc: When Marge's car falls into a sink hole, she buys the perfect replacement. However, she grows to hate it since, as she tells a shocked Homer, it would be too small if she wanted to have another baby.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Gone Abie Gone
programme.desc: When Grampa escapes from his retirement home, Homer and Marge frantically try to track him down by following clues that reveal secrets in Grampa's past.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Penny Wiseguys
programme.desc: Homer is shocked to discover that his bowling teammate is an accountant for Fat Tony.

programme.title: The Simpsons: A Tree Grows in Springfield
programme.desc: Lisa tries to cheer up a down-in-the-dumps Homer by winning him a 'MyPad' at the school auction. But he falls back into a funk when he breaks the magical tablet device.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Day the Earth Stood Cool
programme.desc: Homer wants a younger, hipper image, so he starts hanging out with Terrence and Emily - his cool new neighbours from Portland, Oregon, but Marge finds their trendy parenting methods extreme.

programme.title: The Simpsons: To Cur With Love
programme.desc: When a fire at the retirement home forces Grampa to move home with the Simpsons, Homer throws out his back on moving day and decides to stay home to recover.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer Goes to Prep School
programme.desc: Homer joins the 'Springfield Preppers,' an off-the-grid survivalist group whose leader has set up a top-secret retreat outside of town to prepare for the end of the world.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Midnight
programme.desc: The Doctor is trapped and powerless on the planet Midnight. A woman called Sky seems to hold the answers he needs, but paranoia takes hold of the Doctor and Sky turns his strengths against him.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Turn Left
programme.desc: Donna's entire world collapses but there is no sign of the Doctor. Instead, she finds help from a mysterious blond woman. As Donna and Rose Tyler combine forces, they may be too late to save the whole of creation from approaching darkness.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Stolen Earth
programme.desc: In the Doctor's absence, Harriet Jones assembles a secret army of Earth's greatest heroes to fight the Dalek Empire.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Journey's End
programme.desc: The Doctor is defenceless as the Daleks activate their master plan. The secret army sets out to battle Davros, knowing that it is prophesied that one of them will die.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Planet of the Dead
programme.desc: The Doctor finds himself and those around him in serious danger after a strange bus ride.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Waters of Mars
programme.desc: The Doctor helps combat a crisis from beneath Mars' surface.

programme.title: The Graham Norton Show
programme.desc: Graham's guests include John Boyega, Daisy Ridley, Henry Cavill, Ruth Jones, Rob Brydon and Robbie Williams.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Stolen Earth
programme.desc: In the Doctor's absence, Harriet Jones assembles a secret army of Earth's greatest heroes to fight the Dalek Empire.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Journey's End
programme.desc: The Doctor is defenceless as the Daleks activate their master plan. The secret army sets out to battle Davros, knowing that it is prophesied that one of them will die.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Eleventh Hour
programme.desc: A brand-new Doctor crashes to Earth with no time to ponder his new face and personality - he must save humanity from an alien threat. The Doctor also meets his new companion, Amy Pond, and she's been waiting for him a very long time.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Beast Below
programme.desc: The Doctor and Amy travel to Britain of the far-off future, where people live in a giant spaceship. The Doctor encounters someone who knew one of his previous incarnations, and Amy comes across the terrifying Smilers and an awful secret.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Victory of the Daleks
programme.desc: The Doctor and Amy arrive in one of the most important eras of Britain's past - World War Two. In a secret room beneath London, the infamous alien villains, the Daleks, are dreaming up a deadly plot.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Time of Angels
programme.desc: Trouble arrives when River Song returns to the Doctor's life. The last of the Weeping Angels is loose and the Doctor must track it down. Amy is warned not to blink but it may not be the right advice.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Flesh and Stone
programme.desc: Trouble arrives when River Song returns to the Doctor's life. The last of the Weeping Angels is loose and the Doctor must track it down. Amy is warned not to blink but it may not be the right advice.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Vampires in Venice
programme.desc: The Doctor takes Amy and Rory away for a romantic break but terror awaits in 16th century Venice. The House of Calvierri protects the city of Venice, but when blood-drained corpses start to show up in the streets, the Doctor suspects the Calvierri.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Amy's Choice
programme.desc: After being going for five years, the Doctor reappears in Amy's life and she is faced with having to make a terrible choice.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Hungry Earth
programme.desc: It's 2015 and scientists are drilling far into the Earth's crust, hoping to make history, but deep below the surface, something is not right.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Cold Blood
programme.desc: The Doctor battles to prevent an all out war between the Silurians and the humans. As a potential apocalypse looms, the Doctor discovers an even more horrifying danger waits for him.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Vincent and the Doctor
programme.desc: Amy finds herself battling a deadly alien in France with none other than Vincent Van Gogh.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Lodger
programme.desc: When people begin disappearing in a flat, the Doctor investigates a mysterious staircase in the building that you can walk up, but never down.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Pandorica Opens
programme.desc: The Doctor receives a message from his allies that the Pandorica, which allegedly holds the most fearsome being in the universe, is about to open.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Big Bang
programme.desc: Rory maintains a vigil for Amy while the Doctor is trapped in the Pandorica. The key to restoring the universe may lie with a little girl who still believes in stars.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Impossible Astronaut
programme.desc: The Doctor, Amy and Rory receive a secret summons that leads them to the Oval Office in 1969. Enlisting the help of a former FBI agent and the irrepressible River Song, the Doctor promises to assist the President.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: One for the Money
programme.desc: The quota is changing, and every crew fights harder than ever to fill its boat.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Blood in the Water
programme.desc: The smaller quota adds mounting pressure, as the captains must put meat on deck each day.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Thick as Thieves
programme.desc: Mechanical troubles plague the Falcon, and a new boat of young fishermen joins the fleet.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Sherman Tank
programme.desc: It’s Week 12 of fishing, and the captains make decisions that could make or break them.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Coming for the Crown
programme.desc: Captain Dave Carraro commands the top-earning boat on the leader board. Can he be defeated?

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: Pulling Out the Stops
programme.desc: With only two weeks left, captains will stop at nothing to get a paycheck.

programme.title: Wicked Tuna: The Final Tail
programme.desc: Time is up! The pressure explodes in the battle for the championship and final paychecks.

programme.title: The '90s: The Last Great Decade?: Exposed
programme.desc: It’s the countdown to the end of the century and the party of all parties, but pre-millennium tension is rising.

programme.title: The '90s: The Last Great Decade?: The Countdown
programme.desc: The world falls in love with a heartbroken Princess Diana and grieves her passing. Americans are shocked by the senseless killings at Columbine, and surprised by the 1998 midterm elections. 'The West Wing' reaches TV screens; Lewinsky affair continues.

programme.title: The '90s: The Last Great Decade?: America Goes to War
programme.desc: We tell the opening chapter of this decade. A time when everybody got wired, war went high-tech, reality TV became way too real and everyone became a celebrity.

programme.title: The '90s: The Last Great Decade?: Reality Bites
programme.desc: We tell the story of the early '90s growing obsession with sex, celebrity and reality TV. While some women, like Anita Hill, are fighting against becoming sex objects, others like Anna Nicole Smith can’t wait to get their clothes off.

programme.title: The '90s: The Last Great Decade?: Enemy Within
programme.desc: As the '90s progress, America becomes more divided and fragmented. In Waco, an obscure religious cult becomes a lightning rod for a fear of big government invading our homes.

programme.title: The '90s: The Last Great Decade?: Shock and Awe
programme.desc: In the '90s, new attitudes and new technology equal more freedom, more fragmentation, more diversity, but also more conflict.

programme.title: The '90s: The Last Great Decade?: Exposed
programme.desc: It’s the countdown to the end of the century and the party of all parties, but pre-millennium tension is rising.
