programme.title: What on Earth?: Lost City of Goliath
programme.desc: A lost city near Jerusalem might have been the home of Goliath. Bizarre underwater formations might point to a top-secret US weapons testing facility. A strange sighting in the Arctic could be a lost Nazi relic or the icy remains of prehistoric monsters.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Treasures of Valhalla
programme.desc: When experts investigate an ancient network of tunnels rumored to be the hiding place of lost royal treasure, they find evidence of human sacrifice for the Viking god Odin. An abandoned fortress in Siberia might shed new light on Genghis Khan.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Terror of the Ice Snake
programme.desc: Satellites discover a mysterious trail of sinister black objects in the snow and ice of Antarctica, and when experts discover that it's moving, they use cutting-edge tech to investigate who or what is behind this strange phenomenon.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Cannibal Death Pit
programme.desc: A strange circular forest is found next to a notorious cannibal site. Then, when an eerie crater is spotted in Siberia, experts uncover if it could be evidence of Nikola Tesla's doomsday device.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Gateway to Eden
programme.desc: A buried monument offers new evidence about one of the Bible's greatest mysteries. A giant ominous shadow engulfs the Pacific Ocean. Scientists have trouble explaining a strange lake that's shaped like a perfect circle, and is home to otherworldly life.

programme.title: Finding Atlantis: The New Evidence: Curse of the Lost City
programme.desc: The mystery of Atlantis is one of archaeology's greatest unexplained questions, but today, experts are using cutting-edge technology and the latest science to investigate the secret location of the lost city.

programme.title: Finding Atlantis: The New Evidence: Relics of the Deep
programme.desc: New discoveries have turned up hard evidence of a long-lost city beneath the waves, and using the latest archaeological methods, experts might finally prove if it's the mysterious city of Atlantis.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Aliens of the Infinity War
programme.desc: Experts wonder if a strange pattern that appears in a field is an extraterrestrial response to a message sent to an alien star cluster in 1974, and using cutting-edge science, they uncover its true origin.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Finding Sodom
programme.desc: Mike Barratt, an astronaut with NASA, explains the strange rings on the world's oldest lake that were photographed from the International Space Station. Since then, more rings have been seen and they continue to baffle scientists.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Phantoms in the Chamber of Secrets

programme.title: What on Earth?: The Minotaur's Lair
programme.desc: A strange lake in Transylvania is the home of an abandoned village, and a terrifying secret. When an labyrinth is discovered on an island once home to an ancient Greek civilization, experts investigate if it was the legendary home of the Minotaur.

programme.title: What on Earth?: Curse of the Ice Zombies
programme.desc: A zombie reindeer haunts the mountains of Norway. Strange circles appear in the sand by a secret US military base. A gigantic streak in the Arctic points towards alien life. Cutting-edge technology helps experts answer these mysteries from space.

programme.desc: Two innocent teenage girls are targeted by obsessed stalkers. One manages to survive, and after police raid her stalker's home, he's sent to prison. The other had no idea she had a stalker until he killed her, then himself.

programme.title: Look Who's Stalking

programme.title: Dead Silent: Secrets of the Santa Cruz Mountains
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Linda Jozavich vanishes from work one night in 1979, it just doesn't make sense to her Santa Cruz community. Years later, the murder of another local teen, Lois Sigala, sends investigators a step closer to solving Linda's case.

programme.title: Dead Silent: A History of Violence
programme.desc: In 1979, a walk in the woods turns out to be a deadly mistake for single mom, Marie Huckins. Twenty years later, her daughter Patricia finds a night out following in the same fateful footsteps.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Welcome to the Devil House
programme.desc: A mansion deep in the Georgia woods is said to house terrible secrets. Everyone in this rural county has heard the rumors, but no one knows the truth ... until a 1982 visit to Corpsewood Manor by a group of young locals turns deadly.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Picture of Evil
programme.desc: A picture-perfect dinner for two dissolves into a nightmare for University of Arkansas at Pine Bluff sophomore and cheerleader Dominique 'Nicky' Hurd and a fellow classmate after they become the targets of a deranged predator.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Run for Your Life
programme.desc: In a remote town in Oklahoma, Amanda Burney and her fiancée Ethan Walton are out running an errand that quickly becomes a run for their lives.

programme.title: Dead Silent: Out in the Sticks
programme.desc: After Heather Young and her boyfriend relocate to Michigan's tranquil Lower Peninsula, a nasty fight leads to an explosive and terrifying outcome.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: Murdered in the Cold of Winter
programme.desc: In the quiet town of Stamping Ground, Kentucky, the dead body of a young woman is found late at night by her brother and father. When detectives learn the victim was pregnant, they consider it a motive for murder and begin a homicide investigation.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: Stolen Memories
programme.desc: Leaving behind Scranton, Pennsylvania, a woman and her family head for the white sands of Florida to start a new life. When one of them disappears, their dream becomes a nightmare they must live over, and over again.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: A Sister's Loss
programme.desc: In the suburbs of central Ohio, a woman is found stabbed to death in her kitchen after she fails to show up for work. When a family heirloom is discovered during the investigation, the victim's sister is able to help detectives solve the case.

programme.title: The Night That Didn't End: Murder in the Wetlands
programme.desc: In the coastal town of Leland, North Carolina, a young mother is found dead in a swamp after she was reported missing just days before. As detectives speak with the victim's friends and family, they begin to unravel the truth behind a horrifying murder.

programme.title: Shattered: In the Shadows of South Hill
programme.desc: In October 1980, one brave woman falls victim to the notorious South Hill rapist. While a desperate detective hunts down the vile attacker, another man has no idea that the suspect they're all looking for has been under his nose the entire time.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Cold War II
programme.desc: By the end of the 70's, war between East and West has been raging for decades. Countless proxy wars have proven how destructive the Cold War can be. It's an arms race, a propaganda battle and at times a deadly game.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Revolution
programme.desc: A look at how Russia sealed themselves behind an Iron Curtain, a move that spawned the birth of revolutions across East Europe and beyond.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Warmonger
programme.desc: In the early 1980's, the next battlefield in the struggle between communism and democracy emerges, and it's in the United State's own backyard.

programme.desc: After killing a man, ex-con Rondell Reed crashes his getaway car and is sent to prison. He and his cellmate escape by squeezing through an air duct. Once free, he steals and carjacks his way north to Ohio where another chase leads to another car crash.

programme.desc: The Young Guns turn a shipping container into a sporting lodge that can accommodate an ATV and is decked out in camouflage design. Meanwhile, Donna and Toni build a playhouse that they will auction off and donate the money to a children's charity.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Flipping Two With a Little Help
programme.desc: Donna and Toni score two houses from the same lot. After they look at the scope of the work, they call their friends to help with the remodels. One team handles the fishing cabin while the other takes on a two-bedroom house with no hallway.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: An Old Piano Inspires a Country Melody Themed Home
programme.desc: The Snow sisters discover their new purchase has been partially gutted and needs a bit of work to reconfigure the interior floor plan. On top of other issues, the master suite is currently accessed only through another bedroom.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Young Guns Garage Reboot vs. Randy's Modern Makeover
programme.desc: The Lone Wolf wins a house that has a few major issues, such as missing part of the floor. His plan is to create an interior that will appeal to city guys. Meanwhile, The Young Guns take a chance on a small service building that could have been a garage.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: The Zen Den
programme.desc: Donna and Toni win a house with a bad layout and obnoxious paint colors. They realize this house needs to be toned down, and they create a design plan that is serene and relaxing, the total opposite of its original decor.

programme.title: Texas Flip and Move: Snow Sisters' Arched Abode
programme.desc: Donna and Toni are contacted by a member of a vocal group called the Texas Tenors to see if his home is worth renovating.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Lawn and Order
programme.desc: Dan and Sarah envied their neighbour's deck, and after receiving a too good to be true quote, hired the same person for the job. But the project was much bigger than anticipated and vastly underquoted. Mike arrives just in time to avoid catastrophe.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Investment Gate
programme.desc: Mike Holmes helps a couple pick up the pieces after getting conned out of $300,000 by a contractor friend who has conned millions from other families.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Money for Nothing
programme.desc: After a contractor holds Laura and Greg's new kitchen hostage for four months, even threatening to put a lien on their home, the desperate couple turn to the one contractor they can trust.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: WildAid Save The Tigers
programme.desc: It's going to get wild in the kitchen as four bakers fight for the chance to serve their cupcakes at a huge celebrity gala honoring Jackie Chan and his work with animal conservation group, WildAid. Actress Minnie Driver judges.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Rose Bowl
programme.desc: Four bakers battle for a place at the VIP party for the 2012 Rose Bowl.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Girl Scouts 100th Birthday
programme.desc: Four bakers compete for the ultimate merit badge: their cupcakes at the 100th birthday bash for the Girl Scouts of America.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Hollywood Christmas Parade
programme.desc: 'Tis the season for cupcakes as four talented cupcake bakers battle for a place among the stars at the Hollywood Christmas Parade.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Tree Lighting
programme.desc: Four talented cupcake bakers compete for the chance to have their delicious displays featured at a star-studded holiday tree lighting ceremony in the heart of Hollywood.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: The Nutcracker
programme.desc: Four talented bakers compete to have their cupcakes featured at the opening night party for the New York City Ballet's performance of 'The Nutcracker.'

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Cupcakes on Parade
programme.desc: 'Tis the season for cupcakes as four bakers compete for the opportunity to serve their cupcakes at a VIP party for the Magnificent Mile Lights Festival Parade in Chicago.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Fancy Flower and Farm Cakes
programme.desc: A baker designs an epic pop culture wedding cake with a massive dragon, and customers in a coffee shop are pleasantly surprised by a sweet creation with an edible mug.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Flying and Golden Cakes
programme.desc: Bakers make penguins fly on a snowy cake filled with special effects, and savory turns sweet when po' boys are made out of cake.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Savor the Flavor
programme.desc: Savor the flavor of some tasty treats, from Eli's scrumptious Bavarian Apple Tart to Necco's classic bite-size Mary Jane. Then, the mystery of the orange-colored, banana-flavored Circus Peanuts is solved.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Go Nuts
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro and Unwrapped 2.0 go nuts for nuts! Tumbled in sugar, nestled in chocolate, whatever you do with nuts, it's hard to go wrong. Find out how one candy bar did active military duty in WW1.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Let It Roll
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro finds there just about anything can be rolled in La Chiquita's Tomato and Basil Tortilla. He also discovers how Stuckey's Pecan Log Roll evolved from a sweet treat sold from the trunk of a car, into a roadside classic.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Can't Eat Just One
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro dives into Hot Tamales and their addictive cinnamon snap, Nathan's irresistible chili cheese fries and finds out how Dum Dums lollipops got their name. Finally, he finds out about Annie Chun's flavor-packed Mini Wontons.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Crunchy
programme.desc: Host Alfonso Ribeiro explores snacks that know how to put that little crunch in your munch, like See's Candies peanut brittle and Snak King's crispy Taco Litos.

programme.title: Unwrapped 2.0: Cheese Glorious Cheese
programme.desc: Alfonso Ribeiro proves that no matter how you slice it, cheese just makes everything better. Find out how TGI Fridays' cheddar bacon potato skin appetizer gets turned into a yummy chip and how Mom Made Cheesy Mac tastes.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Bacon
programme.desc: Roger Mooking showcases the towering BLTs, juicy bacon burgers, pizzas, pies, pancakes and more with the 12 tastiest bacon dishes in America.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food: Desserts
programme.desc: Roger Mooking skips straight to the sweets as he dives headlong into the 15 best desserts offered in the United States. From the rich and chocolatey to the fruity and flavourful.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Pizza, Burgers and Cookies
programme.desc: Brad Miller visits the Mile High City, Denver, where the family-run Simply Pizza Truck is cranking out crowd-pleasing Neapolitan-style pizzas in 90 seconds flat thanks to a massive wood-burning oven.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation: Biscuit Sandwiches, Smoked Wings and Sweet Hand Pies
programme.desc: Brad Miller travels to Atlanta, Georgia, where he finds the Deep South Biscuit Co. truck delivering fried chicken biscuit with bourbon-bacon jam and a brisket biscuit sandwich with cherry cola barbecue sauce.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: The Shape of Things
programme.desc: Michael McKean cracks open the old geometry book and studies the shapes of some of our favourite foods.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Diner Delights
programme.desc: Grab your greasy spoon and see how the milkshake gets mixed up and how the Cobb Salad became a Hollywood icon.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Rainbow Connections
programme.desc: Somewhere over the rainbow, Host Michael McKean's dreams come true as he discovers some of our tastiest technicolor treats.

programme.title: Food: Fact or Fiction?: Street Foods
programme.desc: Host Michael McKean prepares to get his hands dirty as he flexes his street food, street smarts.

programme.title: Good Eats: Myth Smashers

programme.title: Good Eats: Crustacean Nation 2: Claws
programme.desc: Despite immense popularity, nine out of ten chefs say they're afraid to cook lobster, leading Alton to demystify the buying, handling and cooking of lobster. Featured recipe: stuffed lobster.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Great Dime Chase!
programme.desc: Louie accidentally spends Scrooge’s Number One Dime and turns to mad inventor Gyro Gearloose for help to get it back.

programme.title: DuckTales: Beware the B.U.D.D.Y. System
programme.desc: Feeling menaced by tech genius Mark Beaks' newest invention, Launchpad recruits brilliant young scientist Fenton.

programme.title: DuckTales: Who Is Gizmoduck?!
programme.desc: When Fenton accidentally uses the Gizmoduck armor to save Huey from a bank robbery, Mark Beaks convinces him to leave McDuck Industries to become a crowd-funded superhero.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Dangerous Chemistry of Gandra Dee!
programme.desc: With Huey and Webby’s help, Fenton woos a punk rock scientist, only to uncover her dangerous plans for Gizmoduck.

programme.title: DuckTales: Timephoon!
programme.desc: When Louie uses Gyro's Time Tub to steal lost treasures from the past, a mysterious storm in the present sends all of space and time crashing down onto the mansion.

programme.title: DuckTales: GlomTales!
programme.desc: Glomgold forms his own team made of all of Scrooge’s greatest villains to defeat Scrooge’s family once and for all.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Turbo: Time to go Turbo!
programme.desc: After two years as World Champion, Valt is ready to take Valtryek to the next level: Turbo! On his journey, Valt meets Aiger Akabane.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Turbo: Achilles Vs. Forneus
programme.desc: Determined to grow stronger and battle the best, Aiger transfers to Beigoma Academy. His sights are set on battling Valt’s successor, Fubuki Sumiye.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Turbo: Duel at Sunset
programme.desc: The match between Aiger and Fubuki continues. Aiger finds out his little sister, Naru, is transferring to Beigoma Academy too. Ranjiro Kiyama, the Wild Bey Gang Captain, decides to battle Aiger for himself.

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Turbo: Land it! Z Breaker!
programme.desc: The world watches on as Valt battles against Kurt Baratier in a match that leaves Aiger more motivated than ever! As word of Aiger’s strength travels around the school, he gets another shot at battling Fubuki. Will Aiger be able to redeem himself?

programme.title: Beyblade Burst Turbo: Turbo Match! Valtryek vs Lúinor!
programme.desc: Lui Shirosagi arrives in Japan to challenge Valt to a title match. Naturally, Aiger can’t resist the chance to challenge Lui for himself.

programme.title: Pokémon: Sun & Moon - Ultra Adventures: Getting Down to The Ire!
DuckTales: Treasure of the Found Lamp!
programme.desc: Donald Duck and his nephews are reunited with Scrooge after moving into McDuck Manor.

programme.title: Big Hero 6: The Series: Write Turn Here
programme.desc: Hiro is forced to write a story for his class and decides to write a Big Hero 6 story. Meanwhile, strange versions of Noodle Burger Boy attack the team.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Dungeons, Dungeons and More Dungeons
programme.desc: Dipper finds an unlikely friend to join him with his newest obsession, a board game called 'Dungeons, Dungeons & More Dungeons.'

programme.title: Big City Greens: Rated Cricket / Homeshare Hoedown
programme.desc: On the trip to Big City movie multiplex, Cricket thinks he’s too mature for a kids’ movie, so he sneaks into a grown-up movie. Cricket registers his house on a homeshare website.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Photo Op/ Remy Rescue
programme.desc: Bill promises his family a trip to the mall food court but tricks them into going to a family portrait studio. Remy skips his violin lesson to hang out with Cricket.

programme.title: Gravity Falls: Tourist Trapped
programme.desc: Dipper and Mabel arrive to spend the summer in Gravity Falls and soon discover that something is amiss with the remote town.

programme.title: Amphibia: Civil Wart/ Hop-Popular
programme.desc: Anne exposes Wartwood to a teen romance film, and the town is split on the movie's love triangle. After losing his stand, Hop Pop decides to run for mayor of Wartwood.

programme.title: DuckTales: Happy Birthday, Doofus Drake!
programme.desc: Louie and Goldie crash Doofus' birthday party to con their way into some million dollar gift bags as Della trains Huey in her favourite online game.

programme.title: The Greatest: What-Ifs?

programme.desc: After wet cement ruins Molly and the gang's plans for a basketball rematch, they head over to the Trading Post. While looking through a travel guide of different Alaskan villages, Molly discovers that Qyah isn't included!

programme.title: Let's Go Luna!: The Big Squeeze/ Meet the Presses
programme.desc: Follow the hilarious adventures of three friends; Leo, Carmen, and Andy.

programme.title: Clifford the Big Red Dog: The Kibble Crook/ Screaming for Ice Cream
programme.desc: T-Bone eats all of Cleo's new dog food; Charley helps out at the ice cream shop.

programme.title: Family Travel With Colleen Kelly: Family Travel on the Emerald Isle: Ireland as a Family Getaway
programme.desc: Joined by her daughter Shea and niece Keelin, Colleen embarks on a journey through Ireland's Wild Atlantic Way. In addition to marveling at the stunning landscape of the Irish countryside and Delphi Valley, the family takes on some brand new adventures.

programme.title: Changing Seas: Mystery of the Humpback Whale Song
programme.desc: Each winter, male humpback whales sing in their Hawaiian breeding grounds. Experts are studying the purpose of this song and what it might tell them about the animal's overall fitness.

programme.title: Consuelo Mack WealthTrack
programme.desc: A weekly series that provides an original holistic approach to investing.

programme.title: To the Contrary
programme.desc: A program examining major issues with women of various ethnic and political backgrounds.

programme.title: Freedom Writers: Stories From the Heart
programme.desc: Follow idealistic teacher Erin Gruwell as she tries to reach 150 at-risk students who were labeled 'unteachable' in 1994 in Long Beach, California. Using media and literature relevant to their reality, she is able to get through to them.

programme.title: The Manners of Downton Abbey
programme.desc: Alastair Bruce reveals the secrets of how the aristocratic set dined and dressed, how they married and made money, how they interacted with the servants, and above all why they behaved as they did in 1900s Britain.

programme.title: Masterpiece Classic: Downton Abbey, Series II
programme.desc: Two years into World War I, Matthew and the other young men must choose to go to war or avoid it. Downton Abbey is in turmoil as many couples see their relationships ruined.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Sorcerer's Stone
programme.desc: On his 11th birthday, Harry Potter receives a mysterious letter from the Hogwarts School of Witchcraft and Wizardry, telling him he has been chosen as one of the future students of the renowned school.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Chamber of Secrets
programme.desc: Harry is undaunted when he learns that great danger awaits him if he returns to Hogwarts. When he finally arrives at school, he finds a community in the grips of a mysterious and sinister terror that has literally 'petrified' some of its members.

programme.title: Movie: Harry Potter and the Prisoner of Azkaban
programme.desc: Harry learns that a murderer has escaped Azkaban prison and is believed to be after him.

programme.title: Modern Family: Clean for a Day
programme.desc: Before Claire officially takes over Jay's closet business, she decides she must get the house in order and make the family clean out the clutter; unfortunately, Phil and Luke can't bear to part with anything.

programme.title: Modern Family: Thunk in the Trunk
programme.desc: Jay lets his jealousy get the best of him when a life-size cutout of Gloria for her grocery store hot sauce display solicits all kinds of unsavoury attention from men. He enlists Manny as his accomplice in a poorly orchestrated heist.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Storm
programme.desc: A huge thunderstorm brings wide power outages, and the whole family congregates at Jay and Gloria's to use their generator. Jay has one foot out the door, though, desperately trying to make it to a reunion with some old Navy buddies.

programme.title: Modern Family: I Don't Know How She Does It
programme.desc: Claire has somehow turned into super mom, running Jay's closet business and yet still has time for all the duties at home. The kids could not be happier, but Phil could not be more frustrated.

programme.title: Modern Family: The Cover-Up
programme.desc: Phil has a new client who happens to be 'his type.' Knowing that might get him in trouble with Claire, he tells some seemingly innocent lies, which then lead to more, and soon enough he's in a full spiral.

programme.title: Modern Family: Express Yourself
programme.desc: Phil has the crazy idea of going on a trip to Paris with Claire, however, they are both so ridiculously tired but try to push through it. Meanwhile, Jay has taken over their bathroom remodel, which proves hazardous to the family.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Home
programme.desc: When Intelligence busts a meth lab run by gang leader Marshall Carter, they uncover a rehoming scam in which children adopted from foreign countries are abandoned, then sold online.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Fallen
programme.desc: A picture perfect family is shot dead in their home and the team goes in search of a drug dealer with a likely connection.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Care Under Fire
programme.desc: In the wake of several gang related child abductions, Intelligence must race against time to find a kidnapped boy.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Politics
programme.desc: Voight's friend, Congressman Scott Graynor, is found passed out in his hotel room with a dead Ukrainian girl. Intelligence discovers that the murder is connected to a sting and Burgess must choose between compromising her case or her FBI boyfriend's.

programme.title: CSI: Crime Scene Investigation: The Hunger Artist
programme.desc: The CSIs investigate when the body of an unidentified young woman is discovered stuffed in an overturned shopping cart near a freeway underpass. Her horribly disfigured and partially decomposed face is a nightmare of blood, scabs and scars.

programme.desc: When a navy Admiral's daughter is the prime suspect in double murders aboard a research boat, the team partners with the Coast Guard Investigative Service to work the case. Meanwhile, Lasalle tracks down his estranged brother.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Overdrive
programme.desc: After a marine corporal who is an amateur racecar driver has a fatal crash on the track, the NCIS team investigates when they suspect foul play.

programme.desc: Pride must protect a beloved family friend who is engaged to the number one suspect in the ongoing NCIS and FBI cartel case.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Let It Ride
programme.desc: Sebastian is sent undercover and Patton exercises his former gambling skills, as Pride and the team attempt a dangerous operation to trap Garcia.

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Hell on the High Water

programme.title: NCIS: New Orleans: Return of the King
programme.desc: After thousands of classified government files are stolen, the team searches for an underground group of hackers co-founded by Pride's old contact, Elvis Bertrand. Also, Sebastian joins the team as a newly minted NCIS Special Agent.

programme.desc: Nick and an A-list celebrity lead a team of improv comedians as they compete.

programme.desc: Nick Cannon, Blac Youngsta, and Cordell Broadus battle it out in games: Eat That Ass Up, Plead The Fifth, Remix and the Wildstyle battle. Blac Youngsta performs.

programme.title: Martin: The Life You Save May Make You Rich
programme.desc: Martin is rewarded by an African Prince after saving his life, but the Prince wants Gina.

programme.title: Martin: Snow White
programme.desc: When the gang goes skiing, everything goes downhill.

programme.title: Martin: Come on Over to My Place
programme.desc: Cole's new girlfriend Shanise forces him to move into his own apartment.

programme.title: Martin: Waiting, Debating and Ovulating

programme.title: Martin: Goin' Overboard, Part 1

programme.desc: While on a cruise, Tommy finds Pam in bed with Cole.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas in Rome
programme.desc: An American tour guide working in Rome agrees to give a tour to a businessman. The two quickly learn that when in Rome, love prevails.

programme.title: Movie: Christmas Getaway
programme.desc: A recently single travel writer is forced to share a cabin due to a mix up on her holiday vacation. What is an annoyance at first quickly changes to a new romance.

programme.desc: A man poses as a former boyfriend for a woman when she returns home for the holidays. As her family celebrates Christmas, he requests they also celebrate Hanukah and a merry ruse is born.

programme.title: Movie: Marry Me at Christmas
programme.desc: A bridal boutique owner finds out she'll be working closely with her crush.

programme.title: Movie: Once Upon a Holiday

programme.title: Movie: A Dream of Christmas

programme.title: Movie: The Nine Lives of Christmas
programme.desc: A handsome bachelor sees his life change before his eyes when he adopts a stray cat.

programme.title: Movie: The Christmas Club

programme.title: Movie: My Christmas Dream

programme.title: Movie: Meet the Parents

programme.title: Movie: The Internship

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Movie: The Killer Next Door
programme.desc: After a woman's husband dies in a car crash, she moves across the country to build a relationship with her late husband's sister. Little does she know her sister-in-law is out to get her.

programme.title: Movie: Seduced by a Killer
programme.desc: A single mother becomes estranged from her teenage daughter over a man. The mom discovers that her daughter has fallen in love with a sadistic killer and must try to save her before it's too late.

programme.title: Movie: My Stepfather's Secret
programme.desc: A college student returns home for the summer only to find her mother has a new boyfriend with has some devious behaviour.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Case of the Flue
programme.desc: In 1993, when an 83 year old woman was found dead in her home, investigators used clues like flecks of paint, t-shirt fibres, and a cellular phone to work out just how, and why, she died.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Chief Suspect
programme.desc: The wife of a police officer is murdered in her own home. After a decade a newly formed cold case unit took a new look at the case, and using a fragment of a 911 call, they caught the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Army of Evidence
programme.desc: A mother of two children is found dead near suicide notes and a pistol. At first it is assumed to be a suicide, but when police learn she had nearly been killed in a fire three years earlier, new suspicions are raised.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shear Luck
programme.desc: Investigators have to reassemble a computer disk that has been cut to pieces with shears, in order to determine the guilt or innocence of an Air Force serviceman suspected of brutally murdering his wife.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Safe Place
programme.desc: A wealthy man is gunned down outside his Louisiana home. His wife tells a tale of three masked men emerging from the shadows, but she may know more than she's saying.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shell Game
programme.desc: A tiny clue, no bigger than a thumbtack, held all the information investigators needed to put a trio of cold-blooded killers behind bars.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: Til Death Do Us Part
programme.desc: On the surface, Shannon and Eddie Baugus seemed to have the perfect marriage until a deadly confrontation exposed a dark history of domestic abuse.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: Fatal Love Triangle
programme.desc: A teen rivalry turns deadly when Rachel Wade and Sarah Ludemann both fall in love with charismatic bad boy Josh Camacho.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: In Cold Blood
programme.desc: Sandee Rozzo is preparing to face her attacker at court when she’s gunned down in her garage. The culprit seems obvious, but as detectives dig deeper, they learn nothing about this case is cut and dry.

programme.title: Vengeance: Killer Lovers: Burning Betrayal
programme.desc: When Mary Ann Langley finds her husband James nearly burned to death in their home, investigators must race to determine if it was an accident or assault before they lose him.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tagging a Suspect
programme.desc: Bomb attacks typically pose a difficult problem for investigators to solve due to the absence of the attacker and a damaged crime scene, but forensic scientists manage to uncover miniscule pieces of plastic that lead straight to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cereal Killer
programme.desc: Police must search for a boy who goes missing mysteriously after his home burns down and are disheartened when they find his body, but the killer left behind numerous clues.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Writer's Block
programme.desc: An architect became ill and died just before she was to testify in a criminal trial.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Clean Getaway
programme.desc: An employee of a dry-cleaner was raped and murdered in the store with two eyewitnesses.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Picture This
programme.desc: A teenage girl is found dead 20 miles from her home after police believed she ran away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Oily in the Morning
programme.desc: Police recover a submerged car, but don't find the missing man they were looking for.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Leg Up on Crime
programme.desc: The case of a decomposed body found in an irrigation canal goes unsolved until shoe prints left by the careless criminal while dumping the body of his second victim give authorities the evidence they need.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tight-Fitting Genes
programme.desc: A behavioral profile is helpful in a murder investigation, but it's not an answer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sole Survivor
programme.desc: A college student vanished without a trace, and dirt on a pair of shoes reveals the extent of one man's deception.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Insignificant Others
programme.desc: A man's wife had taken her own life, and his college sweetheart had killed herself in much the same fashion fourteen years earlier. Investigators had to determine if this was a coincidence or an attempt to get away with murder twice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Cinderella Story
programme.desc: A woman is found sexually assaulted and stabbed to death on a beach, a mere 10 yards from her hotel. Police use the tennis shoes left at the scene of the crime to find her killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pressed for Crime
programme.desc: Investigators have few suspects when a young waitress is mysteriously murdered in her apartment. A call from a pawn shop miles away shifts the investigation southward.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Finger Pane
programme.desc: Texas City police fear the work of a serial killer after two young women are found dead in the same field. They have little to go on until a third woman comes forward claiming she's the one who got away.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Good as Gold
programme.desc: Two young women are killed by a mysterious intruder. Investigators hope that his unusual brand of cigarettes and new advances in DNA technology can paint a picture of a killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Freedom Fighter
programme.desc: 15 years after a murder and conviction, a letter from prison sets off a chain of events that has investigators exhuming a body and looking for evidence to find out if they convicted the real killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All 'Butt' Certain
programme.desc: A woman is convinced her husband is innocent of murder and conducted her own investigation to prove it.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: HLN Weekend Express
programme.desc: News of the day mixed with lifestyle segments, plus weather, sports and enlightening guests.

programme.title: Forensic Files: In Harm's Way
programme.desc: A woman's butchered body is found, and the medical examiner preserves her rib cage bearing a mortal wound and containing the identifying microscopic marks of the blade used; miles away, a knife is found that will be compared to her bone markings.

programme.title: Forensic Files: No Corpus Delecti
programme.desc: A woman disappears without a trace, and even though foul play is suspected the trail goes cold. After twenty years a group of volunteer forensic scientists locate her body and bring the killer to justice.

programme.title: Forensic Files: News at 11
programme.desc: Authorities believe that the death of a news anchor is the result of a tragically overzealous fan, but when a police dog tracks the killer back to the crime scene, officers are forced to include the crowd of onlookers in their list of suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Burning Desire
programme.desc: Investigators initially believed a house fire that killed a woman was unintentionally caused by a cigarette, but a closer look by scientists uncovers more to the story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cloak of Deceit
programme.desc: Forensic scientists study video surveillance of a trio of men who have been robbing banks for 7 years. They are eventually caught because of the forensic team's expert skill.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Medicine
programme.desc: A woman becomes critically ill, leaving her unable to walk. As her symptoms worsen, she gets a bone marrow test. The results reveal arsenic. Investigators now have to determine if she was poisoned by water contamination, or something far more sinister.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dockter Visit
programme.desc: The investigation into the murder of a World War II veteran is impeded when detectives' prime suspect provides a solid alibi, but forensic scientists are able to make a key discovery due to the killer's preference for a distinctive style of footwear.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Murder, She Wrote
programme.desc: A woman suffering from depression apparently took her own life. But her sister told police, that a year before her death, she said if anything were to happen to her, there was a note in the china cabinet. Investigators found the note and the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Fired Up
programme.desc: When a woman's charred remains are found in the rubble of a burned house, investigators have to determine if it is an unfortunate accident, or arson and murder.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Two in a Million
programme.desc: A millionaire and his family are executed in their own home. For three years the murders went unsolved, until a 30-year-old box of bullets and some iridescent fibers revealed the ultimate betrayal.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Concrete Alibi
programme.desc: An aspiring model turns up dead and the suspect is obvious. But when things don't turn out quite the way police planned, they have to dig a little deeper. Leaving no stone unturned, a forensic geologist points police to some unlikely suspects.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Key Evidence
programme.desc: An Illinois community is outraged when an off-duty police officer is shot and killed. Police are able to key in on a suspect and with the help of a gunshot residue expert and trace evidence expert make sure their killer pays for his crime.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Devil's Cut
programme.desc: Deckhands pay in blood as captains make up for time lost to the storm. On the Cornelia Marie Josh takes the wheel as Casey conducts surgery at sea. Brenna A tests the mettle of a former Marine. And a call from home has Sig facing a worst case scenario.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Unbreakable
programme.desc: The fleet battles a freight train of back to back storms. Sig's crew pays a price for stuffed pots, while Harley risks gear on an elusive hoard under the ice. Freddy attempts self-surgery on the Wizard, and the Summer Bay crew gets news on Nick's future.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Hell or High Water
programme.desc: Monte returns to co-captain the Wizard just as a freight train of storms slams the fleet from the south. Jake battles the risk of hauling pots in 30 foot seas to return to his family. Wild Bill drives farther north into the icy Arctic than any other boat.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Unholy Alliance
programme.desc: As crab turn elusive, veterans Sig Hansen and 'Harley' Davidson form an unlikely alliance, but trust doesn't come easy for old school captains. Freddy pays a price for Keith's decision to haul in intense seas, and Jake tempts fate to become a boat owner.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Dark Ship
programme.desc: As smoke fills the Wizard, the Colburns face a dark ship nightmare. Towering breakers shatter Jake's steel anchor forcing him to fight to avoid the rocks of St. Paul Island. Battered by relentless seas Sig turns to family to fill the Northwestern's tanks.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Winter Collision Course
programme.desc: Each captain prepares for the final winter dash but rookie mistakes, fatal flaws and Mother Nature's brute force has each crew scrambling to finish the season strong and alive.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Through Angry Seas
programme.desc: With Mandy alone at the helm, a freak accident threatens the Northwestern crew. Jake faces a life and death decision during the biggest storm of the season. Then, see how Greenhorns are trained.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Blood in the Water: Part 1
programme.desc: The Bering Sea takes a brutal toll on captains and crew. Wild Bill calls the Cornelia for help. Jake confronts a disorderly crew, forcing his toughest decision yet as captain.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Blood in the Water: Part 2
programme.desc: Josh mans the helm as Casey makes a risky ship-to-ship transfer in high seas.

programme.title: Deadliest Catch: Sean Dwyer Special
programme.desc: The fleet's youngest captain was born into chaos - a family crab boat lost at sea, a beloved father gone too soon. But Capt. Sean turned tragedy into triumph, transforming the family business into a fishing empire, raising the bar for a new generation.

programme.title: Homestead Rescue: Shaky Ground
programme.desc: With just three days to preserve the legacy of a fourth generation Alaskan homesteading family, the Raneys must fix an earthquake-ravaged foundation and revive a dormant garden before hitting the lower 48 for another year of incredible rescues.

programme.title: The Tidewater Boats Elite Redfish Series: The Tidewater Boats Championship, South Padre Island, TX
programme.desc: The Tidewater Boats Championship takes place, once again in beautiful South Padre Island Texas. The field of 25 Check It Stik Series top point getters join the 25 automatic berth qualifiers from two Atlas All Star Tour Opens.

programme.title: Operation Fishing Freedom: Jeff Francis and Fox
programme.desc: Marine Jeff Francis made three wills before the age of 25. His tours of duty protected our freedom and created positive change for a country in need.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Human Kannonball
programme.desc: With odds stacked against them, a bodyguard, a firefighter and an ultra-fit football coach take on three massive grizzlies in a gauntlet of challenges. As they fight for a place in the finale, each discovers just how badly bears don't like to lose.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Two Teams, One Dream
programme.desc: Fred and Dustin Hurt decide to split up in their hunt for gold in the raging waters of Alaska's Chilkat mountains. While Fred has an ideal spot picked out, Dustin has a big decision to make about his location.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: The Pound Zone
programme.desc: Dustin's crew finds an ideal claim to mine, but to get down to the gold they have to make it through the waterfall's pound zone. Fred brings in a new miner, only to have his path to bedrock gold is blocked by massive boulders.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: No Guts, No Glory Holes
programme.desc: Fred and his crew return to the glory hole to complete unfinished business. Dustin's crew strikes gold, but are blocked by massive boulders and must engineer an insane system of winches and pulleys to go deeper and get down to bedrock.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Enter the Superclaw
programme.desc: The Dakota boys bank their first gold hauls of the season. Dustin invents a custom super claw to remove massive boulders from his plunge pool. Fred and his crew are confronted by a deadly cable malfunction.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Birthday Gold
programme.desc: Dustin's crew is left shorthanded after an unlikely injury, forcing him to take a calculated risk that nearly turns deadly. After his luck turns, Fred's dives on his 76th birthday to decode a bedrock gold mystery.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: The Gold Cave
programme.desc: Dustin discovers a secret gold cave that could hold millions. Fred and his crew head upstream into a mini-waterfall to find a huge deposit of gold, but first they have to move their 700lb dredge up dangerous rapids.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Why Am I Blue?
programme.desc: An ER doctor can't figure out why his patient has blue skin. A teen girl has suffered for years with abdominal pains that no doctor can explain. A doctor attempts to keep the lone survivor of a plane crash alive.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Never Say Die
programme.desc: A doctor struggles with the decision to revive an older patient after prolonged CPR. Two nurses encounter a stabbing victim on the street and try to save him. A doctor on a cruise ship finds that her dream job has become a nightmare.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: Belly Dancer Mystery
programme.desc: A belly dancer collapses while working at a hookah bar. An ER doctor must quickly learn a new skill to mend an elderly patient and bring his bickering family together. A six-year-old girl is having seizures and no one knows what the cause is.

programme.title: Untold Stories of the ER: When It Rains
programme.desc: A storm strands a critical patient in the ER, but doctors can't perform the life-saving surgery he needs. Two ladies ready to hit the town end up breathless in the ER instead. A bewildered man is brought to the ER by the sheriff after reporting a theft.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Colt and Larissa: Our Continuing Journey
programme.desc: Relive the highs and lows of Colt and Larissa's journey.

programme.title: 90 Day Fiancé: Most Outrageous Moments
programme.desc: Relive the most outrageous moments on the show as we look back at some of our favourite couples. Through unforgettable arrivals, culture clashes, lies, skeptical family and breakdowns, each couple has fought to find lasting love across the globe.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: A Living Trilobite
programme.desc: As a bank teller, Michael proves chipmunks are nature's accountants, and later, Michael stuns a museum worker by bringing a fossilized creature to life.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: House of Horrors
programme.desc: Michael reveals a coffee-making app, gets textually active with the world's thinnest disposable phone, and debuts a new beauty invention that turns ugly.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Incredibly Unsettling
programme.desc: At a health store in Chicago, Michael proves you are what you drink, and later at a Metro station, he utterly derails a commuter's sense of reality.

programme.title: The Carbonaro Effect: Holy Moly Mirror
programme.desc: In a local Chicago diner, Michael brings new meaning to the term 'hold the pickles.' Plus, he discovers an aggressive new breed of fungus at Humboldt Park.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Chicken Heads
programme.desc: Jessimae Peluso does a great impression of God, Matteo Lane has sage advice for when life gives you chicken heads, and Josh Wolf nails Matteo's celebrity look-a-like.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Fun Mob Meeting
programme.desc: Pete Lee knows what not to do in the mafia, Sarah Tiana responds harshly to Pete's parenting proposal, and Sean Patton reveals a scary 80s trend that's making a comeback.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: All Holiday Special
programme.desc: In this all holiday-costumed special, Amir K knows what not to say on April Fools' Day, Dave Hill's cold medication takes its toll, and Julian McCullough 'branches out' with pun-based comedy for the entire show.

programme.title: Comedy Knockout: Thoughts and Prayers
programme.desc: Clayton English knows Mo Mandel's hidden skills, or lack thereof, Sarah Tiana reveals Clayton's favourite superhero, and Mo plays trivial pursuit.

programme.title: Almost Genius: Close But No Cigar
programme.desc: From a banana-wielding Italian, to a literal pop-eye, Chris and April give those who fall short their moment to shine.

programme.title: Almost Genius: Sports Edition
programme.desc: Celebrating the people, places, and things trying hard to succeed but coming up short.

programme.title: Almost Genius: Hardly Working
programme.desc: Learn about a geriatric gymnast and the ultimate wedgie. Plus, see a round of the good old fashioned game of 'Bang, Marry, Kill.'

programme.title: Almost Genius: Falling Short
programme.desc: Chris and April love those who have a recipe for success but are missing a few ingredients. Tonight, they serve up a piping hot bowl of humble soup.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Plate of Nachos
programme.desc: Adam dishes out the facts on the avocado trade being ruled by drug cartels, and big pork making bacon a pop culture hit while covering up its huge health risks. Plus, America's food problems stem from corn.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins a Sitcom
programme.desc: Adam tackles classic television stereotypes, from the racism behind public pools, to the 'model minority' myth of Asian Americans, to the on-screen toxic masculinity that's masking the problems young men face today.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins Games
programme.desc: Adam hits pause on the myth that connects video games to real-life violence, and reveals that Monopoly was a rip-off of an anti-capitalist teaching game. Plus, Olympic organizers get rich while athletes struggle to get by.

programme.title: Adam Ruins Everything: Adam Ruins America
programme.desc: Adam lets his freedom flag fly by examining why America doesn’t have higher rates of social mobility. He then uncovers the flaws within the constitution and examines the country’s progression and regression.

programme.title: World's Dumbest...: World's Dumbest Performers 6

programme.title: Serengeti: Invasion
programme.desc: The anticipation of the annual Great Migration is being felt by all of the Serengeti's families as they wait with great desperation for it to arrive. The land continues to get hotter and hunger starts to bite as food becomes even more scarce.

programme.title: Serengeti: Misfortune
programme.desc: The long-awaited arrival of the Great Migration brings opportunities and food in abundance, but it also increases conflict as every one of the Serengeti's families is put to the test.

programme.title: Serengeti: Exodus
programme.desc: The dry season turns the waterhole into a death trap for herds. But for some, this is a gift.

programme.title: Serengeti: Rebirth
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the fire, tensions are high and family members are still missing. Torrential rain brings new life, turning the scorched earth into a green paradise.

programme.desc: Dom's mission in Kenya, track down the very aggressive and deadly giant spitting cobra.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Wardens vs. Poachers
programme.desc: Poachers: the worst kind of wildlife criminal. In this special episode, Sgt. Simmons leads the chase for night hunters who left five deer to rot. Warden Parker hunts for a grandfather who's passing down a legacy of poaching.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Fatal Attraction
programme.desc: Lt. Bill Boudreau investigates a complaint about a man illegally feeding bears. Officer Jon Demler pulls over a swerving car, only to find himself in the middle of a domestic dispute. The dive team searches for a man who may have drowned in Kingston.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Boiling Point
programme.desc: Officer Canfield meets a feisty swimmer looking for a fight. Anger reaches a boiling point when Officers Pushee and McKee ticket a dozen unruly ATV violators at once. And as Officer McKee monitors a sleeping bear, it becomes dangerously aggravated.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Midsummer Mayhem
programme.desc: Officer Holmes and trainee Frye respond to an ATV accident in which a man's head has been run over. Officer McKee helps relocate a rare rattlesnake. Officer Courtney assists a dog locked inside a car. On Mt. Willard, a collapsed student needs rescuing.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Stranded and Abandoned
programme.desc: Officers Lucas and Cyrs attempt a treacherous rescue on Mt. Washington, while Lt. Boudreau tracks down the owner of an abandoned vehicle. Officer Hannett and Trainee Crouse investigate a man shooting squirrels. Officer Fluette responds to a bear call.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Invisible Evidence
programme.desc: Officer Egan investigates the mysterious death of a deer. Officer Courtney and Lt. Cheney help a seal stuck in a tidal creek. Officer Bronson catches a young fisherman in a lie. And Officers lead the search for a woman with a head injury.

programme.title: North Woods Law: The Fast and the Curious
programme.desc: Newly promoted Sgt. Lucas shows Trainee Frye the ropes during a busy ATV weekend. Hannett attempts to rescue an injured heron and later faces off with a moose. And lost hikers turn to Holmes for help as the sun goes down and temperatures drop.

programme.title: North Woods Law: A Test of Strength
programme.desc: Officer Demler helps a hiker with a severe shoulder injury. Officer Fluette and K-9 Moxie take their certification test. Officer Holmes and trainee Frye look for evidence of an illegal deer kill. Officer MacFadzen bonds with his son on a hunting trip.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Hit and Run
programme.desc: Lieutenant Boudreau and trainee Crouse investigate a man who shot someone while hunting illegally. Sergeant Lucas responds to a porcupine wreaking havoc. Later, when a seriously ill hiker is trapped on Mount Garfield, Officer Holmes races to the scene.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Triple Threat
programme.desc: Up north, Sgt. Lucas checks duck hunters. Down south, Officer Benvenuti and Trainee Crouse question a man suspected of hunting over bait. Later, Sgt. Lucas and Officer Holmes attempt to free a cub stuck inside a trap before its mother returns.

programme.desc: A gang robs the ticket booth at the Los Angeles Coliseum. After the caper, the gang leader hides the money at his ex-wife's place, but her landlord steals the cash. The gang then suspects they were double-crossed by one of their own.

programme.title: Movie: Repeat Performance
programme.desc: After killing her husband, a woman is transported back in time to before the murder.

programme.title: Movie: Gunfighter
programme.desc: A gunfighter seeks vengeance for the deaths of innocent victims at the hands of an outlaw.

programme.title: Movie: Captain Horatio Hornblower
programme.desc: The famed 19th century hero defeats enemy fleets and courts an admiral's widow.

programme.title: Movie: Between Two Worlds
programme.desc: The ultimate destination of two dead emigrants is to be determined on a strange ship.

programme.title: Movie: Waterloo Bridge
programme.desc: A ballerina turns to prostitution when her fiancé is reported killed in the First World War.

programme.title: Movie: Repeat Performance
programme.desc: After killing her husband, a woman is transported back in time to before the murder.

programme.title: Movie: Roman Holiday
programme.desc: A princess escapes palace life to visit Rome on her own and ends up meeting a journalist.

programme.title: Movie: The Purple Rose of Cairo
programme.desc: The dreams of a woman are realized when her favourite film star steps out of the screen.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: You've Got Female
programme.desc: Sydney organizes a school protest about being more inclusive of women. Young Max befriends a skater girl, but is conflicted because the Dog Boys don't allow girls in their crew.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: The Lyin' King
programme.desc: Sydney and Olive's bond is tested when they both become friends with the new girl and keep it behind each other's backs. Young Max and Leo try out for the basketball team.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Smoky Flow
programme.desc: The kids form a band called the Chi-Lectives and film a video in Tess’ apartment. When things get out of hand with a smoke machine, Raven discovers they were home alone.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Dress to Express
programme.desc: When Levi makes a documentary to see how a person's style influences people's perception of them, he has Nia, Tess and Booker change up their style of dress which leads to surprising results.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Diss Track
programme.desc: Nia, Tess and Booker are ecstatic over the popularity of their Chi-Lective music video that has gotten thousands of likes on MeTube, until Levi shows them a diss track that’s been posted by a rival group.

programme.title: Movie: Sing
programme.desc: In order to save his failing theatre, a koala attempts to hold the world's greatest singing competition. A sea of hopefuls arrives, but five lead contestants soon emerge. Each of the animals believes the competition could change their lives.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Reckoning Ball/ Clubbed
programme.desc: Chip Whistler returns to take revenge on the Greens, but is forced to apologize. Andromeda and Tilly follow Gloria to a club where they must 'cure' her of her amnesia.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Urban Legend/ Wishing Well
programme.desc: When Bill learns that Gramma has been purposely creating a frightening reputation around town, he throws a barbeque to befriend the neighbors. Cricket makes a wishing well to cash in on people making wishes.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Night Bill/ Cheap Snake
programme.desc: When Bill sneaks out at night with a mysterious duffel bag in tow, the kids hide in his truck to see where he goes. Cricket impulsively decides to buy a giant pet snake.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Skunked/ Axin' Saxon
programme.desc: Cricket stages a crisis by letting skunks into the café, but it gets out of control. Nancy accidentally destroys Saxon, but Tilly mistakenly directs her wrath at Gramma.

programme.title: Gabby Duran and the Unsittables: The Darkness
programme.desc: When Gabby discovers Swift is still on earth, she's determined to get him back as principal because his replacement is a nightmare.

programme.title: Gabby Duran and the Unsittables: The Party King and Timbuk, Too
programme.desc: When Gabby decides to throw a party for Jeremy at the Duran house, things quickly get out of hand with some unexpected guests.

programme.title: Raven's Home: Friday Night Tights
programme.desc: Booker joins ballet club to win over Danni, but when Logan, the coolest kid in school, makes fun of it, Booker quits.

programme.title: Just Roll With It: The Tutor
programme.desc: Owen volunteers to tutor the school's star basketball player, Big Jim, so that he can pass an upcoming test and be eligible to play in the game.

programme.title: Jessie: Capture the Nag
programme.desc: When the kids are snowed in at the penthouse, an epic game of capture the flag ensues. Allegiances are tested, tricks are pulled and everyone goes a little overboard.

programme.title: Jessie: Four Broke Kids
programme.desc: The Ross family faces an unexpected dilemma when they find out their parents have lost all their money and must learn to live without it.

programme.title: Jessie: Dance, Dance Resolution
programme.desc: It's school dance time, and the Ross family pulls out all the stops to score dates. Meanwhile, Jessie helps Bertram prepare for his first solo at the Metropolitan Opera.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Cali Style: Voice-a-Rooney
programme.desc: Liv undergoes vocal surgery and is unsure if she'll ever be able to sing again, so Karen and Maddie call in reinforcements to help.

programme.title: Liv and Maddie: Cali Style: End-a-Rooney
programme.desc: The Rooney house is finally rebuilt and Karen can't wait to have the family reunite in Wisconsin. However, when exciting opportunities arise for each of the Rooney kids, their summer plans are suddenly thrown into jeopardy.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Hot Spring Friend Machine
programme.desc: Lou helps Gwen build her confidence when she learns that her parents plan to send her to school at the end of the summer. Ava discovers a hot spring at Camp Kikiwaka and enlists Noah to keep it a secret.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Water Under The Dock
programme.desc: Destiny organizes a square dance to raise money to clean up Lake Kikiwaka and invites Noah's arch-acting rival, Austin Justin. Meanwhile, Lou and Finn offer Matteo advice after learning he wants to ask Gwen to dance.

programme.title: Bunk'd: Inn Trouble
programme.desc: Camp Kikiwaka gets a surprise visitor...Hazel! Hazel says she's changed, so Lou agrees to let her hang out for a few days. The boys attempt to earn the camp’s highest honour.

programme.title: Jessie: 101 Lizards
programme.desc: When Ravi realizes he can't care for Ms. Kipling and 12 baby lizards, a slew of misunderstandings ensues, leading Jessie and kids to think that Ms. Chesterfield hired someone to turn them into belts and purses.

programme.title: Jessie: The Trouble With Tessie
programme.desc: Jessie is concerned that Tony has become controlling, clingy and insecure in their relationship. After Tony invites her out for a 'very special night' to meet his parents, she is terrified that he is going to propose.

programme.title: Jessie: Say Yes to the Messy Dress
programme.desc: When NBA player Chris Bosh needs somewhere to stay, Jessie volunteers the penthouse.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Gorizilla
programme.desc: Adrien's bodyguard gets akumatized into Gorizalla. Endowed with extraordinary strength and an acute sense of smell, he tracks Adrien all through Paris. Ladybug and Cat Noir can't monkey around if they want to stop him.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: The Puppeteer
programme.desc: A misunderstanding while babysitting Manon leads to a young girl becoming akumatized as The Puppeteer.

programme.title: Miraculous: Tales of Ladybug and Cat Noir: Antibug
programme.desc: After an argument with Ladybug, Chloe gets akumatized and turns into Antibug. For the first time ever, Ladybug must battle a villain with the same powers as her. Can she defeat her perfect opposite?

programme.title: DuckTales: The Most Dangerous Game...Night!
programme.desc: When Louie’s quiet family game night goes wrong, the family deals with shrink rays, a secret civilization and an unhealthy competition.

programme.title: DuckTales: The Ballad of Duke Baloney!
programme.desc: Louie and Webby investigate a friendly dockside fisherman who may or may not be Flintheart Glomgold.

programme.title: Amphibia: Hop Luck / Stakeout
programme.desc: To win a village cooking contest, Anne leads the family on a quest to make pizza; Sprig tricks Anne and Hop Pop into going on a stakeout in order to make them get along.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Trailer Trouble/ Mansion Madness
programme.desc: Nancy's trailer is stolen by her old biker gang, and the kids resolve to get it back. Cricket house-sits for Remy, but things go awry when the rest of the Greens visit.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Park Pandemonium / Cricket's Biscuits
programme.desc: Follow the adventures of a boy whose curiosity and enthusiasm lead him on journeys.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Skunked/ Axin' Saxon
programme.desc: Cricket stages a crisis by letting skunks into the café, but it gets out of control. Nancy accidentally destroys Saxon, but Tilly mistakenly directs her wrath at Gramma.

programme.title: Big City Greens: Reckoning Ball/ Clubbed
programme.desc: Chip Whistler returns to take revenge on the Greens, but is forced to apologize. Andromeda and Tilly follow Gloria to a club where they must 'cure' her of her amnesia.

programme.title: Bunk'd: MoSquito Mo Problems
programme.desc: Mosquitoes are rampant, so Matteo looks to science to create a repellent. However, he ends up taking credit for something that Gwen invented.

programme.title: Coop & Cami Ask the World: Would You Wrather Live in an Igloo?
programme.desc: Cami and Ollie try to prove that they are responsible enough to choose their own bedtime by moving out of the house and into a giant igloo in their backyard.

programme.title: Just Roll With It: Owenfest
programme.desc: Owen has to decide whether to cancel a fundraising event he planned for the school and refund all the money he's raised, or let the party (and his reputation) go up in flames.

programme.title: Gabby Duran and the Unsittables: The Darkness
programme.desc: When Gabby discovers Swift is still on earth, she's determined to get him back as principal because his replacement is a nightmare.

programme.title: Gabby Duran and the Unsittables: The Party King and Timbuk, Too
programme.desc: When Gabby decides to throw a party for Jeremy at the Duran house, things quickly get out of hand with some unexpected guests.

programme.title: Jessie: Jessie's Big Break
programme.desc: Jessie gets her big break as a stunt double to popular Australian actress Shaylee Michaels and the two become fast friends.

programme.title: Jessie: Coffee Talk
programme.desc: Jessie gets two wristbands to a Bruno Mars concert so Emma and Zuri battle to be her guest, only to learn there's only one ticket. Bertram bonds with a talking coffee maker who Luke tries to steal to help him study for his Spanish test.

programme.title: Sydney to the Max: Caved and Confused
programme.desc: Judy enlists Grandma Judy to help her redesign the basement into their very own 'girl cave.' Max starts to feel left out when Sydney cancels their plans together to throw a 50s-themed party with her friends to celebrate her new space.

programme.desc: Syd thinks she's too old for the father-daughter dance, but she's afraid to hurt Dad's feelings. Young Max is bummed when his Dad isn't around for a father-son event.

programme.title: Coop & Cami Ask the World: Would You Wrather Have Potato Pants?
programme.desc: Charlotte enlists the help of Coop and Cami in an effort to become a member of the school's popular a capella group, The Glamtronics.

programme.desc: A look at how technology is changing transportation. The tech inventors are sometimes big companies - like For, VW & Airbus and sometimes smaller tech start-up companies.

programme.desc: A weekly program focusing on the politics of telecommunications through conversations with the people who shape the digital future.

programme.title: Public Affairs Events

programme.title: Public Affairs Events

programme.title: Washington Journal
