programme.title: Newsmakers: Brandon Judd, Stephen Dinan and Rebecca Morin
programme.desc: The president of a union representing U.S. border patrol agents discusses border patrol policy in the Trump Administration and efforts to rein in illegal migration into the U.S.

programme.title: Snapped: Eric Copple
programme.desc: On Halloween night a knife-wielding intruder attacks and kills two roommates and leaves another lucky to be alive. Although the story is reminiscent to the plot of a horror film – for this California town the terror is all too real.

programme.title: Snapped: Barbara Garcia
programme.desc: Trick-or-treaters in a small Indiana town have no idea that the sweet grandmother passing out candy is also hiding a deadly secret in her garage.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions: She Never Came Home
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Kenia disappears, her family immediately begins conducting their own investigation to find her. As the police join them in their efforts, they follow alarming leads that cause them to believe Kenia won't be found alive.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: Death in Santa Claus
programme.desc: After a family is found massacred inside their Santa Claus, Georgia home, the hunt for their killer hinges on the eyewitness testimony of the three young surviving daughters.

programme.title: Snapped: Verginia Turner
programme.desc: A possible love triangle has deadly consequences for a prominent California lawyer.

programme.title: Snapped: Melissa Napier
programme.desc: When a determined son urges police to investigate the disappearance of his father, he is met with a storm of family tragedy and betrayal.

programme.title: Snapped: Joanna McElrath
programme.desc: The investigation into the murder of a fellow officer plunges detectives into a cavern of secrets and lies.

programme.title: Snapped: Eve Nance
programme.desc: When a beloved Wisconsin father disappears, his wife blames drugs, but close friends suspect a violent confrontation that ended a marriage filled with secrets.

programme.title: Criminal Confessions: She Never Came Home
programme.desc: When 19-year-old Kenia disappears, her family immediately begins conducting their own investigation to find her. As the police join them in their efforts, they follow alarming leads that cause them to believe Kenia won't be found alive.

programme.title: Homicide for the Holidays: Death in Santa Claus
programme.desc: After a family is found massacred inside their Santa Claus, Georgia home, the hunt for their killer hinges on the eyewitness testimony of the three young surviving daughters.

programme.title: Snapped: Martha Ann McClancy
programme.desc: A churchgoing southern woman loses her husband to tragedy, but a cloud of suspicion haunts her new marriage and leads investigators to a new conclusion.

programme.title: Dateline: Deadly Trust
programme.desc: A millionaire is found dead in his home and following the investigation, the case went cold. Years later, a woman and an ex-football player were arrested for the murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Double Lives
programme.desc: After a mother of three vanishes in Colorado, police discover she was living a dangerous double life.

programme.title: Dateline: Double Lives
programme.desc: After a mother of three vanishes in Colorado, police discover she was living a dangerous double life.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Deadly Conspiracy
programme.desc: Jack Jessee was a family man who didn't seem to have an enemy in the world, up until the night he was killed. The case went cold but a relentless detective was determined to catch Jack's killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Confession
programme.desc: Soon after Angie Dodge was murdered, Christopher Tapp admitted he was one of her killers. Police captured his confession on videotape so why would the victim's mom, who once campaigned to put Tapp in prison fight to free him.

programme.title: Snapped: Daniel Clay
programme.desc: After a massive Halloween bash ends with a young woman’s mysterious disappearance, a tiny farming town fears that evil stalks its fields.

programme.title: Snapped: Helen Moore
programme.desc: Helen's boyfriend goes missing just as authorities find a dismembered torso, but is it case closed or 20 years later, is Helen's new story a game changer.

programme.title: Snapped: Danielle Parker
programme.desc: The death of a police officer leads to a search for her killer.

programme.title: Snapped: Emma Raine
programme.desc: The family of a former soldier questions whether or not his death was a tragic coincidence when they learn of a suspicious detail from his wife's past.

programme.title: Snapped: Karen Sanchez
programme.desc: A missing man’s body is found, his wife finds herself under a microscope.

programme.title: Snapped: Keanna Barnes
programme.desc: Two deceased men both helped out a damsel in distress. Playing the good samaritan may have cost them their lives, and authorities are worried that she could put someone else at risk.

programme.title: Snapped: Alaina Mercer
programme.desc: Devoted to raising her daughter's child, a loving grandmother is found executed in her own home. Police unfold an ongoing custody battle which leads to suspicions towards those nearest to her grandchild.

programme.title: Snapped: Tameshia Shelton
programme.desc: A young man ends up dead while out hunting.

programme.title: The Simpsons: A Test Before Trying
programme.desc: When Springfield Elementary is threatened with closure because of low standardized test scores, the fate of the school rests on one student who missed the test, and who must raise the average above the minimum threshold: Bart Simpson.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Changing of the Guardian
programme.desc: After surviving a tornado, Marge and Homer seek out guardians for the kids, in case the worst should happen. They first turn to friends and family, including Homer's half-brother.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Love Is a Many Splintered Thing
programme.desc: Bart's heart strings are pulled once again when Mary Spuckler returns to Springfield. But his failure to pay her enough attention strains their relationship.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Hardly Kirk-ing
programme.desc: Bart and Milhouse explore the perks of being an adult when a shaving experiment leaves Milhouse looking exactly like his father.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Gorgeous Grampa
programme.desc: Homer's obsession with the TV show 'Storage Battles' leads the family to discover Grampa's past identity as 'Gorgeous Godfrey,' the most feared, villainous man in pro-wrestling history.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Black-Eyed, Please
programme.desc: Flanders becomes jealous when his laid-back parents start to prefer Homer's company over his and he faces unbearable guilt after punching Homer in the eye, as he desperately tries to reconcile with him.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Dark Knight Court
programme.desc: Bart is falsely accused of pulling a prank on Easter involving the school marching band and stuffing rotten eggs in the brass section's horns, and Lisa must step in as his attorney to defend her brother.

programme.title: The Simpsons: What Animated Women Want
programme.desc: Once again, Homer must save his marriage when Marge gets fed up with his behavior. Meanwhile, after watching 'A Streetcar Named Desire,' Milhouse takes on a Marlon Brando-inspired bad-boy persona to attract Lisa.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Pulpit Friction
programme.desc: Homer is recruited to be a church deacon by the trendy new reverend in town. But Bart asks Flanders to help him track down their former pastor, Reverend Lovejoy, when Homer starts to embrace the faith a little too seriously.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Whiskey Business
programme.desc: Grampa injures himself while babysitting Bart, and quickly discovers he prefers being cared for by his grandson than the staff at the nursing home.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Fabulous Faker Boy
programme.desc: Marge encourages Bart to explore his creative side, and his initial resistance quickly subsides when Marge hires Slava’s beautiful daughter, Zhenya, as his new piano instructor.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Saga of Carl Carlson
programme.desc: When Homer and his friends win $200,000 in the Springfield lottery, Carl takes off to Iceland with all the winnings.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Dangers on a Train
programme.desc: On a trip to 'Dizzneeland,' the Simpons board the wrong ride and are transported to Kang and Kodos' home planet.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homerland
programme.desc: In a nod to the hit cable series 'Homeland,' Lisa suspects Homer may have been 'turned' when he returns a changed man from a nuclear power plant operating convention. So she enlists the services of the FBI.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXIV
programme.desc: Homer rides around Springfield wreaking havoc as 'The Fat in The Hat' in a rhyming Dr. Seuss-ian tale. In 'Dead and Shoulders,' Bart is beheaded during a kite accident and his head is attached to Lisa's body.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Four Regrettings and a Funeral
programme.desc: Four Springfielders are prompted to try to right past regrets following the funeral of a beloved neighbour.

programme.title: The Simpsons: YOLO
programme.desc: Marge encourages Homer to embrace his 'You Only Live Once' spirit by inviting an old pen pal to stay with him and cross items off of his 'to-do' list from when he was a 10-year-old. Meanwhile, Lisa institutes a new honour code at Springfield Elementary.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Labor Pains
programme.desc: Homer remembers his Lamaze skills when he's forced to deliver a baby in an elevator. When the mother names the child Homer Jr., he quickly develops a deep emotional bond with the kid. Lisa is recruited by the cheerleaders of the local pro football team.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Kid Is All Right
programme.desc: Lisa finally makes a new best friend, Isabel Gutierrez, only to discover that she's a Republican and her opponent in the campaign for second grade class representative.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Yellow Subterfuge
programme.desc: Principal Skinner promises the students that the best-behaved among them can take a ride in a submarine. When Skinner gives all the kids a clean slate, Bart believes even his own past indiscretions will be forgotten.

programme.title: The Simpsons: White Christmas Blues
programme.desc: Springfield is inundated with holiday revellers after the nuclear power plant springs a radiation leak, causing snow to fall all over town. When the tourists drive up Christmas shopping prices, Marge opens up the Simpsons' house to boarders.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Steal This Episode
programme.desc: Homer becomes annoyed with movie theatres, so Bart teaches him how to download movies illegally. Homer is delighted with his discovery of free movies until he's caught for piracy.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Married to the Blob
programme.desc: Comic Book Guy realizes his comics are nothing if he can't share them with anyone. Then he meets Kumiko, a Japanese woman writing an autobiographical manga, and he seeks out Homer's advice on how to date her, ending happily for everyone.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Specs and the City
programme.desc: Mr. Burns gives high-tech eyeglasses to all of his employees in order to spy on them. Homer loves the enhanced reality of his new gadget, that is, until Marge tries them on and he finds out she's seeing a marriage counsellor.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Diggs
programme.desc: Bart is rescued from a confrontation with Springfield Elementary's bullies by Diggs, a recent transfer student and aspiring champion in the niche sport of falconry. But, Bart soon discovers that Diggs wants to do more than just wrangle falcons.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Man Who Grew Too Much
programme.desc: On a research trip, Lisa is shocked to discover that Sideshow Bob is now the chief scientist at a massive chemical engineering company, but her fears are allayed as she becomes enamoured with his likeminded appreciation of high-culture.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Winter of His Content
programme.desc: Marge invites Grampa and two other octogenarians to live at the Simpsons’ house after the Retirement Castle is closed for health violations, but she quickly becomes frustrated with Homer when he starts embracing the 'old person lifestyle.'

programme.title: The Simpsons: The War of Art
programme.desc: After Lisa's new pet guinea pig destroys the Simpsons' living room art, Marge falls in love with a beautiful painting at the Van Houten's yard sale that Homer snaps up for $20.

programme.title: The Simpsons: You Don't Have to Live Like a Referee
programme.desc: Homer is recruited as a World Cup referee after Lisa extols his integrity on the youth soccer field in a Springfield Elementary speech contest. But when the Simpsons travel to Brazil, Homer finds his honesty tested by a gangster in the bribing business.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Luca$
programme.desc: Marge is concerned that Lisa is dating below her station when she brings home competitive-eater-in-training Lucas Bortner, and she enlists Homer to help Lisa explore other options.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Days of Future Future
programme.desc: Set in the future, Homer has a new clone for every time he dies. Lisa is married to a zombie version of Milhouse, while Bart deals with custody issues with his ex-wife, Jenda. Each defines what love means to them.

programme.title: The Simpsons: What to Expect When Bart's Expecting
programme.desc: Bart can't stand art class, so he makes a voodoo doll of his art teacher. But when his spell makes her pregnant instead, he becomes a saviour to Springfield couples trying to conceive. Then, he's kidnapped to help conceive a thoroughbred racehorse.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Brick Like Me
programme.desc: Homer wakes up in a world where his family and everyone in Springfield are made of Legos. Can he 'put together' how he got there and figure out how to get home before he's stuck in a world of bricks forever?

programme.title: The Simpsons: Pay Pal
programme.desc: Marge swears off befriending any more couples when Homer offends their charming new British neighbours. But when Lisa declares that she, too, doesn't need friends, Marge reconsiders.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Yellow Badge of Cowardge
programme.desc: Bart is plagued with guilt when he wins the annual 'Race Around the School,' with an assist from Nelson, who beats up frontrunner Milhouse. Meanwhile, Homer tries to bring back the annual Fourth of July fireworks display.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Clown in the Dumps
programme.desc: The unthinkable happens: a Springfield resident dies. Also, Krusty retires after he's offended by a comedy cable channel roast of him, and Lisa tries to protect Homer from getting hurt.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Wreck of the Relationship
programme.desc: When Bart disrespects Homer's authority, Homer makes a point to try his hand at parenting. This proves fruitless, so Marge signs them up for the Relation Ship, where they’ll resolve their conflicts at sea.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Super Franchise Me
programme.desc: Marge opens a sandwich franchise store after her sandwiches become a huge hit at Springfield Elementary. But running the day-to-day at the store proves challenging, especially when the same franchise opens another location across the street.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXV
programme.desc: On the annual spooktacular Halloween special, Bart and Lisa are transported to a demon-filled alternate universe after Bart reads a set of Aramaic symbols he finds on the underside of his desk.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Opposites A-Frack
programme.desc: Lisa brings in Assemblywoman Maxine Lombard to put a stop to Mr. Burns' fracking operation, but is taken aback when the two political opponents find themselves attracted to one another.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Simpsorama
programme.desc: 'Futurama's' Planet Express crew comes to present-day Springfield to prevent the Simpsons from destroying the future.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Blazed and Confused
programme.desc: Bart faces a tough test at school when he gets a new teacher, Mr. Lassen, who vows to crush his spirit.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Covercraft
programme.desc: Homer has a mid-life crisis, takes up bass guitar and forms a cover band with some of the other dads in town. But the band's modest early success is soon overwhelmed by the breakout potential of their most unlikely star, Apu.

programme.title: The Simpsons: I Won't Be Home for Christmas
programme.desc: After Moe convinces Homer to stay out drinking on Christmas Eve, Marge tells Homer not to come home. This leads to Homer's sad trek through lonely Springfield, where he learns that the only place where one should truly get drunk on Christmas is home.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Man Who Came to Be Dinner
programme.desc: During a trip to 'Dizzneeland' the Simpsons board the wrong ride, Rocket To Your Doom, and are transported through the galaxy to Kang and Kodos’ home planet, where they are held captive at the local zoo.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart's New Friend
programme.desc: Bart has a new accomplice and best friend when Homer is hypnotized at the circus and believes he is a young boy again.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Musk Who Fell to Earth
programme.desc: When inventor Elon Musk lands in Springfield, he and Homer become fast friends and revolutionize the town's nuclear plant. But when Musk goes overboard and Mr. Burns wants him removed, Homer must figure out a way to break up with him.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Walking Big and Tall
programme.desc: When Lisa learns Springfield's anthem was stolen from another town she writes a replacement. Meanwhile, Homer learns the meaning of 'Wide Pride.'

programme.title: Doctor Who: Day of the Moon
programme.desc: The Doctor is locked in the perfect prison. Amy, Rory and River Song are being hunted down by the FBI. With the help of President Nixon and Neil Armstrong, the Doctor is able to mount a rebellion against an alien invasion.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Curse of the Black Spot
programme.desc: The TARDIS is marooned onboard a 17th-century pirate ship whose crew is being attacked by a mysterious and beautiful sea creature. Becalmed and beset by cabin fever, the pirates have numerous superstitious explanations for the Siren's appearance.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Doctor's Wife
programme.desc: By following a Time Lord distress signal, the Doctor puts Amy, Rory and his beloved TARDIS in grave danger.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Rebel Flesh
programme.desc: A solar tsunami liberates doppelgangers from their human 'originals' in a futuristic factory.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Almost People
programme.desc: The Doctor must convince terrified factory-workers to work with their doppelgangers to overcome a monster of their own making.

programme.title: Doctor Who: A Good Man Goes to War
programme.desc: The Doctor assembles an army to face the Battle of Demons Run. River Song has something to tell him.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Let's Kill Hitler
programme.desc: The TARDIS crash lands in 1930's Berlin, bringing the Doctor face to face with the greatest war criminal in the Universe. And Hitler.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Night Terrors
programme.desc: Every child is scared of monsters, but George's terrified pleas for help reach the Doctor because George's monsters are real.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Girl Who Waited
programme.desc: Amy is trapped in a quarantine facility for victims of an alien plague—a plague that will kill the Doctor in a day. Rory is left on his own and rushes to her aid before she is killed by kindness.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The God Complex
programme.desc: The TARDIS lands in a hotel where every visitor's room contains their deepest, darkest fears.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Closing Time
programme.desc: The Doctor's final days are upon him, but when he drops in on an old friend, the Cybermen are waiting.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Wedding of River Song
programme.desc: All of time and space hangs in balance by the shores of Lake Silencio in Utah; for this is the day the Doctor dies.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Return of Doctor Mysterio
programme.desc: Nardole and the Doctor join forces with a masked hero known as 'The Ghost' to fend off brain-swapping aliens.

programme.title: Doctor Who: A Christmas Carol
programme.desc: Amy and Rory are trapped on a crashing space liner and the only way the Doctor can rescue them is by saving the soul of a lonely old miser.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Night Terrors
programme.desc: Every child is scared of monsters, but George's terrified pleas for help reach the Doctor because George's monsters are real.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Asylum of the Daleks
programme.desc: The Doctor is kidnapped by an old foe and forced on an impossible mission to a place where even Daleks are too terrified to enter.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Dinosaurs on a Spaceship
programme.desc: An unmanned spaceship hurtles towards certain destruction unless the Doctor can save it and it's cargo of dinosaurs.

programme.title: Doctor Who: A Town Called Mercy
programme.desc: The Doctor finds himself the reluctant sheriff of a western town under siege by a relentless cyborg.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Power of Three
programme.desc: When millions of sinister black cubes fall from the sky overnight, the Doctor and the Ponds consider it an unlikely invasion of Earth.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Angels Take Manhattan
programme.desc: They race against time through the streets of Manhattan as New York's statues come to life around them.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Bells of Saint John
programme.desc: The Doctor's search for Clara brings him to London, where Wi-Fi is everywhere. Humanity lives in a Wi-Fi soup but something dangerous is lurking in the signals, picking off minds and imprisoning them.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Rings of Akhaten
programme.desc: On the rings of the planet Akhaten, the Festival of Offerings is in full swing. Clara meets the Queen of Years but something is stirring in the pyramid, and a sacrifice will be demanded.

programme.title: The '90s: The Last Great Decade?: The Countdown
programme.desc: The world falls in love with a heartbroken Princess Diana and grieves her passing. Americans are shocked by the senseless killings at Columbine, and surprised by the 1998 midterm elections. 'The West Wing' reaches TV screens; Lewinsky affair continues.

programme.title: MythBusters: Supersonic Ping Pong/ Ice Cannon
programme.desc: In this ballistics bonanza, Adam and Jamie ask if supersonic ping pong can go lethally wrong, while Kari, Grant and Tory light the frozen fuse on a cannon made of ice!

programme.desc: It's wall-to-wall automotive mayhem as the MythBusters drive through glass, plough through traffic and fire an RPG at an SUV to take aim at classic Hollywood crash clichés.

programme.title: MythBusters: Cannonball Chemistry
programme.desc: Jamie and Adam test to see if a mattress can cushion a watery wipeout. Kari, Tori and Grant shoot stones out of cannons.

programme.title: MythBusters: Accidental Ammo
programme.desc: Stand by for some ballistic backyard bedlam and a gruesome glass guillotine in an episode devoted to accidental ammo.

programme.title: MythBusters: The Star Wars Special
programme.desc: The MythBusters tackle the most iconic myths in 'Star Wars' history, and using the latest science and cutting-edge tech, they reveal the truth behind the greatest mysteries of a galaxy far, far away.

programme.title: MythBusters: Duct Tape: The Return
programme.desc: The MythBusters build a trebuchet and attempt to save Buster's life with their favorite mechanical cure all: Duct Tape.

programme.title: MythBusters: Tanker Crush
programme.desc: In their farewell season Adam and Jamie take on their biggest ever experiment ever in an attempt to crush a giant tanker train car by creating a vacuum.

programme.title: MythBusters: Star Wars: The Myths Strike Back
programme.desc: The myths strike back when Adam and Jamie once again confront the dark side of science in a workshop not so far, far away.

programme.title: MythBusters: Duct Tape: The Return
programme.desc: The MythBusters build a trebuchet and attempt to save Buster's life with their favorite mechanical cure all: Duct Tape.

programme.desc: In their farewell season Adam and Jamie take on their biggest ever experiment ever in an attempt to crush a giant tanker train car by creating a vacuum.

programme.desc: The team tests if Luke really could swing himself and Leia across a chasm with only his belt-rigged grappling hook, could an Ewok log swing crush an Imperial "Chicken Walker" and could Luke survive in a tauntaun's belly?

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Terror Tunnels
programme.desc: A vast system of tunnels built almost three thousand years ago was the site of the greatest battles of antiquity, and these disorienting passages could be the deadliest weapon in war. Experts reveal what made this underground world so terrifying.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: The Renegade's Lair
programme.desc: A strange underground system known as the Black Cave is connected to a fairytale castle and was home to an infamous nobleman on the run from the law; today, experts investigate the secrets he left here to discover new parts of this mysterious network.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Mystery of the Lost Labyrinth
programme.desc: A strange, centuries-old labyrinth built into an abandoned quarry was built by an eccentric millionaire, and no one knows why; but now, a new excavation into this mysterious 9,000-foot tunnel system might finally reveal its dark secrets.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Treasures of the Lost Mine
programme.desc: Caverns hidden deep inside a remote mountain are home to a precious mineral found nowhere else on earth, and experts and treasure hunters use cutting-edge technology to follow rumours of a mysterious long-lost mine in search of a payday.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Ghosts of the Hell Maze
programme.desc: A labyrinth of vast tunnels in the French countryside has served as a secret hideout during wartime for centuries, and on its walls, experts have discovered the final confessions of soldiers who fought here during one of the deadliest days of World War I.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Conspiracy in the Buried City
programme.desc: Residents devised an ingenious trick to keep the location of buried ancient city hidden five stories underground secret from invaders; experts reveal what it was, and using the latest tech, they reveal the truth behind this strange place.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: World's Biggest Labyrinth
programme.desc: The world's biggest labyrinth is a 1,553-mile cave system that's home to some of history's darkest mysteries, and new discoveries at this strange place reveal the long-lost secrets of Nazi occupation, Soviet revolution, and Cold War subterfuge.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Cave of the Body Snatchers
programme.desc: An eerie system of underground vaults in Scotland was once the hideout for thieves who stole newly-buried bodies and sold them; today, experts are excavating these rubble-filled caves to reveal the secrets of what these bandits left behind.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Rock
programme.desc: A hidden, subterranean city built within the Rock of Gibraltar was an immense fortress to control the seas during World War II, and new discoveries reveal the secrets of a long-lost chamber with evidence of high-stakes espionage.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Curse of Cannibal Caves
programme.desc: A mysterious cave system is home to some of the oldest human remains ever discovered, and today, the explorers and researchers investigating this site are uncovering shocking evidence of cannibalism among its Ice Age denizens.

programme.title: Unexplained and Unexplored: Hunt for the Ark of the Covenant
programme.desc: New clues taken from long-lost maps offer fresh leads in the hunt for the Ark of the Covenant, and using the latest hi-tech archaeological methods, experts retrace its steps through the Holy Land, Egypt, and Ethiopia to make a game-changing discovery.

programme.title: My Evil Sister: Lose a Sister, Gain a Husband/ The Sinner and the Saint
programme.desc: When a friendly neighbor marries barely legal Linda, he rescues her from abject poverty, and invites her sister, Patti, into their twisted relationship.

programme.title: My Evil Sister: Murder by Minivan/ Lose a Sister Gain a Baby
programme.desc: When Teresa's brother marries Betty Jo, the young bride becomes the sister Teresa was always dying for.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Bail Out, Bail Out
programme.desc: An officer gets involved in a foot chase across the highway; the force uses a man's cigarettes to arrest him for theft.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: I Just Wanted My Burger
programme.desc: The A.T.T.F. is on the prowl in Newark, New Jersey and they have plenty to keep them busy. First they get a work out when a perp takes off running, later they recover a stolen tractor trailer and a stolen car at a drive-thru window.

programme.title: Shattered: No Way Out
programme.desc: In 1993, a child in need of help leads to a shootout in broad daylight, and an officer down. The gunmen flee the scene, but Alabama police are not about to let them get away.

programme.title: Shattered: Requiem for Murder
programme.desc: In 1992, when a woman in Harrisburg, Pennsylvania is attacked, police eye a local family man as the suspect. But one detective thinks everyone's got it all wrong: this attack isn't a one-off - it's the work of a serial killer.

programme.title: Shattered: The House on Hamilton Avenue
programme.desc: In 2006, Officer Mike Kermon is the first to arrive at a house on Hamilton Avenue where neighbors believe shots have been fired. As he enters the quiet home, he has no idea that what he'll find inside will change his life forever.

programme.title: Shattered: The Green Light
programme.desc: In 1991, a single mother takes her daughter to a busy electronics store to buy a boom box. Nearly nine hours later, she walks out as a battered survivor of one of the largest hostage crises in U.S. history.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Boom Town
programme.desc: A new family learns how tight-knit their new community is when a slight against one turns the entire street against them leading to an explosive conclusion.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID Investigates: Black Widow
programme.desc: Stacey Castor has lost not just one, but two, husbands. Then someone leaves a suicide note saying they are responsible for their deaths. And a mother and daughter become pitted against each other as jurors must determine who is telling the truth.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Deadly Reunion
programme.desc: John Walsh investigates a whirlwind romance and the accusation that Lamont Stephenson strangled his fiancé and her dog. Later, Callahan Walsh explores police claims that Gloria Schulze is a freeloading drunk driver who repeatedly cheats the legal system.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID Investigates: Black Widow
programme.desc: Stacey Castor has lost not just one, but two, husbands. Then someone leaves a suicide note saying they are responsible for their deaths. And a mother and daughter become pitted against each other as jurors must determine who is telling the truth.

programme.title: In Pursuit with John Walsh: Deadly Reunion
programme.desc: John Walsh investigates a whirlwind romance and the accusation that Lamont Stephenson strangled his fiancé and her dog. Later, Callahan Walsh explores police claims that Gloria Schulze is a freeloading drunk driver who repeatedly cheats the legal system.

programme.title: Fear Thy Neighbor: Boom Town
programme.desc: A new family learns how tight-knit their new community is when a slight against one turns the entire street against them leading to an explosive conclusion.

programme.title: American Monster: Live by the Sword
programme.desc: Outside Los Angeles, sword collector Neal Williams is the house-husband while his wife Manling keeps the family afloat. It's a tough but happy life, as their home videos attest. Until Manling returns home to find her family slaughtered - at sword point.

programme.title: American Monster: Anything for You
programme.desc: The Snyders are thrilled when their 34-year-old son Mike finally starts a family with his sweetheart - as seen in these home videos. But after being diagnosed with a terrible illness, Mike vanishes. Only years later does his horrific fate comes to light.

programme.title: American Monster: The Wrong Man
programme.desc: In Pennsylvania, Kevin and Joanne Dowling like to capture their kids' milestones on videotape in their modest suburban home. But when a woman in a nearby town is gunned down - and Kevin is accused of murder - his fate hangs on that same home video camera.

programme.title: American Monster: Watch Your Back
programme.desc: US Air Force sergeant Nathan Paet and his family appear to live a blissfully normal life - as these never-before-aired home videos attest. But blind greed would bring about the destruction of this loving family.

programme.title: American Monster: Just Out of Frame
programme.desc: A fun-loving couple, both business-owners, share a close relationship with their grown daughters. So when the mother is found gruesomely bludgeoned to death in her own home, no one suspects the unthinkable. But unlike guilty people, video doesn't lie.

programme.title: American Monster: Falling Down
programme.desc: Alene and George Jenkins are the perfect couple living a perfect life. When their desire for children leads them to adopt a son and a daughter it seems their family is complete. But instead it triggers a dark spiral ending in an unspeakably awful crime.

programme.title: American Monster: Life of the Party
programme.desc: Doug and Rose quickly strike up a romance and later marry. But behind the perfect façade seen in these exclusive home videos, lies and deceit begin to surface. A no show at Thanksgiving and a box on the roadside lead to a shocking discovery.

programme.title: American Monster: Twice Shy
programme.desc: Carol-Ann and James Sharp seem like a match made in heaven, but behind the veneer of happiness hides a monster in plain sight. Loved ones close to the couple sit down for the first time on camera to make sense of a murder that none of them saw coming.

programme.title: American Monster: An Open Relationship
programme.desc: Brent Cotta's popular wife, Cassie, has mysteriously disappeared on New Year's Eve in Fort Smith, Arkansas. When family and friends conduct a search, the discovery of a shallow grave soon leads to the horrific truth emerging.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: Our House of Horrors
programme.desc: Alice Swanson was always envious of the perfect life her childhood neighbor, William Jennings Choyce, and his family seemed to have. But after she married him, she slowly realized that nothing under the surface was as perfect as it seemed.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: We Looked Happy
programme.desc: Brooke Lehman was raised to believe Kevin Dunlap was her father. Her mother, Stephanie, kept the truth a secret, but neither of them realized that Kevin was keeping other, far more deadly secrets of his own.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Face of My Torturer
programme.desc: William Knorr's mother, Theresa, always threatened that if she ever went to jail for what she had done, she would take him down with her. After years spent helping her keep the horrors secret, could he ever escape or would he wind up like all the others?

programme.title: Meyer Lansky and the Crime Syndicate
programme.desc: The story of Meyer Lansky, an associate of Lucky Luciano who was linked to criminal financial operations, but the FBI struggled to pin anything on him, or find his riches.

programme.title: The Mafia's Banker
programme.desc: A close associate of long-time Teamsters President Jimmy Hoffa and associated with the Chicago Outfit, Allen Dorfman embezzled millions for the mob and himself until he was violently murdered in 1983.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Tony Spilotro
programme.desc: The story of Tony Spilotro, who protected the Chicago Mafia's interests in the casinos of Las Vegas and became a target for the FBI.

programme.title: Mafia Drug King: Carmine Galante
programme.desc: The story of Carmine Galante, who made money from selling heroin, and still profited from his drug empire while locked in prison.

programme.title: The Mob's Assassin
programme.desc: As the head of Murder Inc. Albert Anastasia would oversee the American Mafia's most violent period in history. As Luciano's go-to killer, Albert and his hitmen committed murder wholesale.

programme.title: Mafia's Killing Machine: The DeMeo Crew
programme.desc: The story of Roy DeMeo, a member of the infamous Gambino family who was suspected of heading a crew that killed and dismembered dozens of people.

programme.title: Al Capone: Public Enemy #1
programme.desc: America's first superstar gangster, Al Capone, dominated headlines and is said to be responsible for the bloody St Valentines' Day Massacre. After being made the face of organized crime by US government Capone's public image brings about his downfall.

programme.title: Mafia's Day of Reckoning
programme.desc: What happened when the FBI pursued the five families who ran organised crime in New York, and the fate of two informers is revealed.

programme.title: Mafia's Killing Machine: The DeMeo Crew
programme.desc: The story of Roy DeMeo, a member of the infamous Gambino family who was suspected of heading a crew that killed and dismembered dozens of people.

programme.desc: America's first superstar gangster, Al Capone, dominated headlines and is said to be responsible for the bloody St Valentines' Day Massacre. After being made the face of organized crime by US government Capone's public image brings about his downfall.

programme.title: Mafia's Day of Reckoning
programme.desc: What happened when the FBI pursued the five families who ran organised crime in New York, and the fate of two informers is revealed.

programme.title: The Mob's Assassin
programme.desc: As the head of Murder Inc. Albert Anastasia would oversee the American Mafia's most violent period in history. As Luciano's go-to killer, Albert and his hitmen committed murder wholesale.

programme.title: Mafia Drug King: Carmine Galante
programme.desc: The story of Carmine Galante, who made money from selling heroin, and still profited from his drug empire while locked in prison.

programme.title: Mafia's Greatest Hits: Tony Spilotro
programme.desc: The story of Tony Spilotro, who protected the Chicago Mafia's interests in the casinos of Las Vegas and became a target for the FBI.

programme.title: The Mafia's Banker
programme.desc: A close associate of long-time Teamsters President Jimmy Hoffa and associated with the Chicago Outfit, Allen Dorfman embezzled millions for the mob and himself until he was violently murdered in 1983.

programme.title: Meyer Lansky and the Crime Syndicate
programme.desc: The story of Meyer Lansky, an associate of Lucky Luciano who was linked to criminal financial operations, but the FBI struggled to pin anything on him, or find his riches.

programme.title: The Renegade Mobster
programme.desc: Crazy Joey Gallo psychopathic killer, beatnik hipster and renegade mobster. Burning with rage and determined to make his way to the top, he wages all-out war against the US and sparks a revolution in the mafia before going down in a hail of bullets.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Peace and War
programme.desc: By the mid 1970s, the Cold War has remained a fact of life for decades. But 30 years into the war, and the doctrine of mutually assured destruction doesn't feel like a roadmap to peace. It's an arms race, a propaganda and at times, a deadly game.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Falling Dominoes
programme.desc: The USSR pulls out of Afghanistan and the last remaining proxy conflict of the Cold War ends. A new era emerges as brutal barriers are broken down. A peaceful transition is what the watching world prays for, but is by no means a sure thing.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Rise of the Superpowers
programme.desc: For four decades ago, two global superpowers faced off, threatening to annihilate one another with the push of a button. It is an arms race, a propaganda battle and at times, a deadly game.

programme.title: Cold War Armageddon: Paranoia
programme.desc: As the propaganda war and the arms race rage on, the 1950's becomes the decade of paranoia. The stalemate between democracy and communism reaches a fever pitch as the world descends further in chaos.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Pearl Harbor Cover Up
programme.desc: History says that this was the ultimate sneak attack, but conspiracists are convinced that the U.S. President knew it was coming and decided to sacrifice their own troops to give the country an excuse to join the war against Germany.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The UFO Cover-Up
programme.desc: Discover the truth behind the UFO cover up. Attempt to discover if there is a hidden 'shadow government' that guards the truth, even from the President.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Cold War in Space
programme.desc: July 21st, 1969 saw one of the iconic events of the 20th century when the Apollo 10 crew set foot on the moon. However, some claim the moon landings were faked. A hacker claims to have found evidence of a U.S. space fleet fueled by alien technology.

programme.title: Sunday Mornings With Pat and Dan

programme.title: In the Kitchen With David
programme.desc: Cook with David Venable.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: To Mike, From Aggie
programme.desc: A nurse who works countless hours at a brain injury center is too busy supporting her family to fix the many problems in her new house. Her mother-in-law Aggie is so desperate to help she delivers a letter straight to Mike's mailbox.

programme.title: Holmes Makes It Right: Retooled: Broken Record
programme.desc: Mike and his team come to the rescue of Sheila and Val, a couple scammed out of their money, their kitchen and their trust by a notorious contracting criminal who would occasionally do one good job to lure other unsuspecting clients.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: One Good Deed Deserves Another
programme.desc: A woman who lost her husband, the neighborhood 'Good Samaritan,' needs help completing many of the DIY projects he had started around the house. So Next Generation is stepping in, and stepping up, to 'Make Things Right' for the widow.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Hiding in Plain Sight
programme.desc: A single homeowner is too proud to ask for help with the maintenance issues and repairs that come with living in an older home. When neighbors begin complaining, Next Generation steps in to help her improve the curb appeal and remove the backyard pool.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Far From Home
programme.desc: A couple relocating to a different part of the city needs help updating their kitchen before putting their house on the market. After a local contractor let them down and drained their budget, Next Generation swoops in to 'make things right.'

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: And Baby Makes Three
programme.desc: Mike Holmes and his kids tackle a renovation that has fallen off the tracks for expectant parents. Next Generation is on a time-sensitive mission to finish the nursery and only working bathroom in the house prior to the baby's arrival.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Old Is New Again
programme.desc: John and Tanya purchased a 171-year-old home after a contractor guaranteed it had been totally updated. They're concerned someone is going to fall through their family room floor. Mike and his kids step in and work to make the space safe again.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Nightmares and Dreams
programme.desc: A marathon runner hired a contractor to design her perfect kitchen, but he was unqualified and ended up compromising the home's structure. Now it's up to Mike and his kids to make things right and restore her peace of mind.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: And Baby Makes Three
programme.desc: Mike Holmes and his kids tackle a renovation that has fallen off the tracks for expectant parents. Next Generation is on a time-sensitive mission to finish the nursery and only working bathroom in the house prior to the baby's arrival.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Old Is New Again
programme.desc: John and Tanya purchased a 171-year-old home after a contractor guaranteed it had been totally updated. They're concerned someone is going to fall through their family room floor. Mike and his kids step in and work to make the space safe again.

programme.title: Holmes: Next Generation: Nightmares and Dreams
programme.desc: A marathon runner hired a contractor to design her perfect kitchen, but he was unqualified and ended up compromising the home's structure. Now it's up to Mike and his kids to make things right and restore her peace of mind.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Heritage Hunters: Wine Stave Porch Railing
programme.desc: Bug and his team attempt a large, stubborn tear down that could be their biggest score ever, if the materials are even salvageable. Then, the gang takes on a front porch renovation that forces them to get creative with 18th-century Victorian materials.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Noland Sign Company
programme.desc: The Black Dog Salvage team works in Roanoke, Virginia, at the Noland Sign Company. On a windy day, they salvage metal lettering, copper cupolas and vintage plumbing.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Pickle Mansion
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs head to Knoxville, Tennessee, in hopes of salvaging the crumbling Pickle Mansion. The main items of interest are a copper frieze and columns. Mike discovers a fuel drop tank and he and Tay build a dresser kitchen island.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Rural Retreat Historical Society
programme.desc: Mike, Robert and the team travel to the Rural Retreat Historical Society in Rural Retreat, Virginia. Mike sets up rigging from the rooftop for an outdoor clock while Robert salvages a vault door and bank teller station.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: St. Agatha's Catholic Church
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs travel to snowy Ellwood City, Pennsylvania, to reclaim pieces of St. Agatha's Catholic Church. In the bitterly cold weather, they salvage stained glass, spiral ducting and lights.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Texas Tavern Sign
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs work at home in Roanoke, Virginia, where they salvage a sign for the Texas Tavern and learn the history of the local restaurant over burgers and bowls of chili.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Burlington Wall Unit
programme.desc: The teams visits Burlington, NC, to save an old apothecary unit from a 1930s pharmacy. Then, Mike and Robert search for some new patterns for the shop in West Virginia, while Grayson builds a console.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: St. Agatha's Church Rectory
programme.desc: The Black Dog Salvage team heads back to snowy Ellwood City, Pennsylvania, to salvage the rectory of St. Agatha's Catholic Church. Robert, Mike and the crew brave snow and ice to salvage a triple sink, glass blocks and storm door.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Vaughan Furniture Company
programme.desc: Mike and Ted struggle to salvage a heavy furniture press while Robert is slowed down by explosion-proof lights. Mike and Grayson build a chair with pieces from an old suitcase and Robert discovers a vintage TV and radio.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: 19th Century Corncrib
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs go to Hamburg, PA, to carefully deconstruct a corncrib being sure to take plenty of notes and pictures so they can reassemble it accurately.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: St. Michael's Catholic School
programme.desc: The Salvage Dawgs team head to the St. Michael's Catholic School in Pittsburgh, Pennsylvania, where they brave high-wire heights in order to save elements of the past. The team also builds a ladder console and discovers a vintage army record player.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: 14-Mile House
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis juggles two projects in Detroit, and since both were built in 1928, she uses one house as inspiration for the other's renovations. When a car crashes into the house next door, she makes an unexpected discovery.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: 25th Street Project
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis works to restore a 1920s bungalow and must tackle a ton of brickwork. Then, she transforms the unfinished attic into a one-of-a-kind master suite and restores the kitchen cabinets to create one of the home's most dazzling features.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: 4th Street House
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis takes on a boarded up, previously condemned 1880s duplex and restores it into a single-family home.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Campbell Street Project
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis returns to her hometown of Detroit to save a 1920s home that suffered severe damage from a fire next door.

programme.title: Good Eats: Crustacean Nation III
programme.desc: Alton investigates the art of cooking shrimp and takes viewers around a shrimp boat and a shrimp shop.

programme.title: Good Eats: Crustacean Nation IV: Crawfish
programme.desc: Alton Brown discovers the sustainable alternative to lobster, the crawfish.

programme.title: Good Eats: Down and Out in Paradise
programme.desc: A freak fishing accident leaves chef Alton Brown all washed up on a deserted tropical island. Armed with little more than a pocket knife and a will to survive, Alton gets by on coconuts, pineapples, mangos, papayas and one very feisty pig.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Izard Vs. Battes
programme.desc: Chef Erik Battes applies modern takes to an ancient ingredient in a battle against Iron Chef Stephanie Izard.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Symon vs. Hearst
programme.desc: Chef Emma Hearst, the youngest challenger ever, vs. old pro Iron Chef Michael Symon.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Winter Ice Battle
programme.desc: Iron Chefs Bobby Flay and Jose Garces take on Iron Chefs Masaharu Morimoto and Geoffrey Zakarian in a frozen wonderland.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Forgione vs. McClain
programme.desc: Iron Chef Marc Forgione faces off against challenger Shawn McClain, the executive chef at Sage, at Aria Resort and Casino in Las Vegas. Martin Yan, Ching-He Huang and Adam Richman are the judges for this battle.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Flay vs. Christensen
programme.desc: Raleigh-based Chef Ashley Christensen battles Iron Chef Bobby Flay.

programme.title: Iron Chef America: Morimoto vs. Cohen
programme.desc: New York based Vegetarian Chef Amanda Cohen enters Kitchen Stadium to take on Iron Chef Morimoto. Will her vegetarian delicacies win over the judges, or will Morimoto take home the win?

programme.desc: Iron Chefs Bobby Flay and Jose Garces take on Iron Chefs Masaharu Morimoto and Geoffrey Zakarian in a frozen wonderland.

programme.title: Unique Eats: Hot Lunch Spots
programme.desc: The lunch hour just got a little longer because the dishes at these restaurants are meant to be savoured.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Classic Twists
programme.desc: We discover classics desserts that have been pushed into uncharted territory.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: After School Favorites
programme.desc: Cupcakes, brownies, toaster pastries, ice creams and chocolates.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Breakfast Pastries
programme.desc: Experience breakfast pastries from Oregon, California, New York and Connecticut unlike anything you've had before.

programme.title: Unique Sweets: Then and Now
programme.desc: We visit pastry chefs who take time-honoured traditions from their past and turn them into something new and unique.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Pigging Out
programme.desc: From sweet and salty Cuban sandwiches and zesty whole hog barbecue to mild kielbasa and melt-in-your-mouth cured ham, Andrew Zimmern explores all the best ways we pig out on the world's most popular meat - pork.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mumbai
programme.desc: Andrew unveils Mumbai's multicultural flavors and addictive ingredients. A city built on chaos and hard work, Mumbai showcases its history through its delicious eateries. The city's edible icons include deep-fried fish and prawns and saucy goat.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Dominican Republic
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern takes a culinary tour of the Dominican Republic, a meat-lover's paradise. From whole roast pig and crispy, Lebanese-inspired fried dough pockets to beef and plantain casseroles, Dominican gastronomy is full of surprises.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Savannah
programme.desc: Andrew dives into the flavour-packed favourites of Savannah, Georgia, like creamy shrimp and grits, briny oysters in a half shell, upscale crab bisque and down-home barbecue stew so thick it'll make your spoon stand up.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Crystal Crazy
programme.desc: Nastassja has free reign designing a towering gemstone birthday cake and sugar artist Suzanne uses her talents to bring succulent plants to life. Meanwhile, cake maker Molly tires to please her mom with a neon '80s-fitness-themed birthday cake.

programme.title: Extreme Cake Makers: Cake and Cocktails
programme.desc: For extreme cake maker Nastassja Lusengo, the sky's the limit when it comes to her cake designs.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Dazzling Dragon and Bear Cakes
programme.desc: A music festival calls for a totally awesome cake that's ready to drop some beats, and then a baker draws inspiration from fashion designers for a dazzling metallic stunner.

programme.title: Crazy Cakes: Magical Character Cakes
programme.desc: Cake artists sculpt the tallest state fair icon out of chocolate for a Texas cake that proves bigger is better. Fairies come to life in an epic, Fantasyland-themed birthday cake.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Rose Parade
programme.desc: Four champions battle to have their delicious displays featured at the coronation of the 2011 Rose Queen and in the Rose Parade.

programme.desc: When Bob loses his lucky shirt before an important meeting, the pups stage a heist to get it back. The pugs are left at Bob's mother's house when he goes out of town.

programme.desc: Pip and Freddy have to deliver a monkey; K.C. cooks something for a baby hippo.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Frozen Face Off
programme.desc: Everyone in Bikini Bottom is participating in a worm-sled race to the South Pole.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: SpongeBob vs. the Big One
programme.desc: SpongeBob, Patrick, Squidward and Mr. Krabs are swept away by a giant wave.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Free Samples / Home Sweet Rubble
programme.desc: Mr. Krabs is forced to give out free Krabby Patties to win back customers after Plankton drives them away.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: MuscleBob Buffpants
programme.desc: SpongeBob finds Sandy Squirrel's rigorous physical training program too tough and chooses the easy way out by ordering a pair of fake 'bulky arms' as seen on TV.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Sweet and Sour Squidward/ The Googly Artiste
programme.desc: Plankton tries to befriend Squidward so he can get the Krabby Patty formula. When an art critic deems Patrick a true artiste for his rocks-with-googly-eyes creations, everyone in Bikini Bottom clamours for a Patrick original.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Grandpappy the Pirate/ Cephalopod Lodge
programme.desc: With SpongeBob's help, Mr. Krab attempts to fool his granddad into thinking he's a pirate.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Barnacle Face/ Pet Sitter Pat
programme.desc: The night before the big school dance, Mr. Krabs asks SpongeBob to help Pearl get rid of a barnacle on her face.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Patrick-Man!/ Gary's New Toy
programme.desc: Patrick becomes Patrick-Man, a superhero intending to clean up Bikini Bottom.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Bubble Trouble / The Way of the Sponge
programme.desc: Sandy's air supply is destroyed; SpongeBob wants to earn his karate belt.

programme.title: SpongeBob SquarePants: Little Yellow Book/ Bumper to Bumper
programme.desc: Squidward finds SpongeBob's diary, and starts reading it out loud in the Krusty Krab.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Kiss Conspiracy/ House Guest
programme.desc: Simon is too embarrassed to kiss his co-star in the school play. So in a moment of desperation, he agrees to allow Alvin to switch identities with him. Alvin secretly decides to rent out their house for a Hawaiian home-swap.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Viral/ Brothers of Dagarack
programme.desc: After Brittany and the girls release a video that goes viral, Alvin, Simon, and Theodore try to top it. Simon falls ill and asks Alvin and Theodore not to go see a new movie without him, but Alvin just can't resist.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Baby Mama Drama/ Ballet Boys
programme.desc: Alvin and Brittany learn parenting isn't easy when they have to care for a robot baby for a school assignment.When Alvin's soccer team struggles, the coach makes the team learn ballet to help with their conditioning.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Man vs. Sewer/ The Mutant Menace
programme.desc: Ralph is separated and left alone during the Turtles' lazy river ride through the sewers. And, all of New York is turned against the Turtles after failed attempts to do good deeds.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: The turtles are back and this time they've got awesome powers.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Longest Fight/ Hypno! Part Deux
programme.desc: The Turtles have a hard time watching their idol skateboard while stopping a burglary. Hypno-Potamus returns and causes havoc at April's homecoming dance.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: The Purple Jacket/ Pizza Pit
programme.desc: An evil tech club lures Donnie with a purple jacket. And, it's Pizza Week and the Turtles' favourite pizza joint keeps getting taken out.

programme.title: Rise of the Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles: Insane in the Mama Train
programme.desc: The turtles are back and this time they've got awesome powers.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Toy/ Bloodlines
programme.desc: A favourite toy of Theodore's is lost on a rafting trip but then mysteriously shows up at the house. Alvin wants Dave to take a DNA test to see if he's a famous explorer or king, but maybe it's a person much scarier.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Sister Act/ Lil' T
programme.desc: Following a fight with Brittany, Eleanor decides to move in with Alvin and his brothers. When his brothers won't listen to Theodore's song, he posts a video of himself rapping on the Internet and it becomes a mega-hit.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Missing Miss Smith/ Monster Madness
programme.desc: When Alvin finally pushes Miss Smith too far, she quits and her replacement is a nightmare. Alvin and Simon tease The Chipettes about being scared by a movie.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: The Fugitives/ Sherlock Chipmunk

programme.title: The Greatest: Upsets
programme.desc: College football has always been a game of Davids and Goliaths. Some of the most indelible results have been the ones that were least expected. These are the top 11 upsets, and the stories behind them.

programme.title: The American Game: Games of the Century
programme.desc: The greatest games in college football history – the so-called games of the century – are remembered forever as contests where stars were born, legends were made and sport's chronicle was indelibly transformed.

programme.title: The American Game: Bowls, Polls and Champions
programme.desc: For generations, America was at least somewhat content to agree to often vehemently disagree. Controversies arose from the polls to computers to the creation of the BCS. At last, the College Football Playoff has offered a more decisive solution.

programme.title: The Greatest: What-Ifs?
programme.desc: Part of the fun is wondering what might have happened if a call went one way instead of another, or a key figure made a different decision or the rules were just a little different. These are the top 11 hypotheticals of all time.

programme.title: The Greatest: College-to-Pro Coaches
programme.desc: The best coaches can lift their programs to great heights, but not every great college coach can also succeed in the pros. These are the top 11 of all time who've succeeded in both the college and pro ranks.

programme.title: The American Game: College vs. Pro
programme.desc: As football professionalized, the college game was deeply impacted and forever changed. The two sports are closely connected, and the conflict between amateur and pro will always undeniably shadow the college game.

programme.title: The American Game: The Heisman
programme.desc: It's as famous and debated as any award anywhere in sports, which means that winning the Heisman Trophy will define a player's career – and in many ways his life – forever.

programme.title: The Greatest: Heisman Debates
programme.desc: It's one of the most famous awards in sports, and also one of the most controversial. Every year, the arguments rage all season and then continue as soon as the winner is announced. These are the top 11 Heisman debates in history.

programme.title: The Greatest: Uniforms
programme.desc: In college football, uniforms are at the core of a team's identity and its pride. These are the top 11 colors, combinations, and flourishes of all time on uniforms, helmets, and more, all across the country.

programme.title: The Greatest: Voices
programme.desc: As college football has played out, the voices who've told the stories have become an indelible part of the tale themselves. These are the top 11 of those voices – at the typewriter, at the microphone and in front of the camera.

programme.title: The Greatest: Walk-Ons
programme.desc: There's a difference, it turns out, between impossible and improbable. In college football's long history, there have been a handful of incredible stories of walk-ons who became stars. These are the top 11 of all time.

programme.title: The Greatest: Innovations
programme.desc: College football has continually evolved and innovated in ways that have made the game safer, more entertaining, and more exciting. These are the top 11 innovations that have impacted the sport's history.

programme.title: The Greatest: Inspiring Moments
programme.desc: If the best parts of sports are how they can inspire people, college football has enjoyed a wealth of unforgettable moments that fans will cherish forever. These are the top 11 of those highlights, on the field and off.

programme.title: The Greatest: Mascots
programme.desc: In college football, mascots are an unlikely piece of serious business. These are the top 11 live animals, cartoon creations, and everything in between, in a fun breakdown of one of the sport's most enjoyable traditions.

programme.title: The American Game: Recruiting
programme.desc: Everything starts with the quality of the players that a school is able to recruit. Since college football's earliest days, recruiting has been one of the most critical and controversial aspects of the sport.

programme.title: The American Game: Evolution
programme.desc: College football has evolved in so many transformative ways. All throughout its history, the sport's constant evolutions have had common threads, with officials and coaches striving to make it safer, more exciting and more entertaining.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Seven: 2000-2009
programme.desc: Nick Saban comes to LSU in 2000 and eventually wins the Tigers' first national championship since 1958 - a feat matched by Les Miles. At Florida, Tim Tebow becomes a cult hero and wins two national titles with Urban Meyer's Gators.

programme.title: Saturdays in the South: A History of SEC Football: Part Eight: 2010-2019
programme.desc: The SEC has a run of seven straight national titles, and nine in 12 years. Expansion in 2012 gives the conference 14 schools. Meanwhile, Nick Saban arguably becomes the greatest coach in the history of college football.

programme.title: SEC Storied: Shaq & Dale

programme.title: Basketball
programme.desc: Basketball. Midland vs. Creighton

programme.title: Magnify: Q-Ball
programme.desc: As the inmates of the San Quentin Warriors basketball team search for redemption from their troubled pasts, the game provides a path forward. In a place where freedom is taken away, basketball gives a little bit back.

programme.title: Magnify: Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: Tyquone's a teenage basketball star, but beyond a championship he wants to see the world. This finds him grappling with dreams bigger than the game.

programme.title: Magnify: They Fight
programme.desc: Following a long prison term and the tragic murder of his teenage son, recovering drug addict Walter Manigan steers the youth of his Southeast D.C. neighborhood in a positive direction through an after school boxing program.

programme.title: Magnify: Nossa Chape: Our Team

programme.title: Joyce Meyer: Enjoying Everyday Life
programme.desc: Joyce Meyer, one of the world's leading practical Bible teachers and New York Times best-selling author, shares encouragement and advice to help us enjoy our daily lives.

programme.title: Movie: My Husband's Secret Life
programme.desc: A woman questions her marriage after suffering a miscarriage, catches husband in lies. But when a sudden accident throws him into a coma, she is left to pick up the pieces.

programme.title: Movie: His Double Life
programme.desc: Five years after her husband dies, a woman is remarried to her deceased husband's business partner. Her daughter discovers that he is having an affair, and the following day, the mysterious other woman also turns up dead.

programme.title: Movie: Unforgettable
programme.desc: When Julia gets engaged to the man of her dreams, she is excited to finally leave her troubled past behind her. However, when she meets his unhinged ex-wife Tessa, she must fight for her future after the other woman begins to torment and stalk her.

programme.title: Movie: When the Bough Breaks
programme.desc: A young woman acting as surrogate for a couple becomes infatuated with the soon-to-be father.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sharper Image
programme.desc: After a girl was killed, investigators learn that cutting-edge technologies from NASA prove that the arrested suspect was not the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Quite a Spectacle
programme.desc: In possibly the strangest case in the history of forensic science, investigators must solve a murder case with a list of evidence consisting entirely of a single squashed tomato left at the crime scene, and tiny reflections of light in a photograph.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Memory of Murder
programme.desc: A small-time Ohio drug dealer sits on death row for murdering a family, until a rookie attorney unearths long-hidden case records that shed new light on the case.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Blood and Water
programme.desc: Army vet Joe D'Ambrosio is sentenced to death for a 1988 murder. No one listened to his pleas of innocence until Father Neil Kookoothe began investigating the case and discovered a shocking coverup.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Caught on Tape
programme.desc: When a Spaniard is sentenced to death for the murder of a young Florida couple, his family appeals to the international media to fight his conviction.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Rough Justice in the Big Easy
programme.desc: A businessman is shot dead during a mugging in New Orleans. Cops pursue a criminal named John Thompson and secure his conviction on the charges. Two successful lawyers agree to represent him and soon discover prosecutors weren't playing by the rules.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Ride to the Rescue
programme.desc: A Sacramento law student is convicted after a brutal home invasion and murder. Her cause seems lost until Joyce Ride, mother of Sally Ride, becomes intrigued with the case.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Body of Evidence
programme.desc: A small-town electrician sits on Texas death row for the murder of a 19-year-old college student, but forensic science could exonerate him.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Murder In Broad Daylight
programme.desc: Sentencing a reformed Chicago gang member to death reveals corruption at every level of the criminal justice system.

programme.title: Death Row Stories: Two Brothers
programme.desc: After an eleven-year old girl is found suffocated with her own underwear, two step-brothers, ages 15 and 19, confess to the murder. But with IQs each under 60, they maintain their innocence and claim their confessions were coerced.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Catch 22
programme.desc: When a woman is shot to death in her driveway, police suspect a younger co-worker whose advances she spurned of killing her.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shattered Innocence
programme.desc: When a prominent criminal defence attorney is found murdered in his own home, police suspect it may have come at the hands of one of his questionable clientele.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Hunting
programme.desc: When a successful real estate agent is brutally murdered, panicked townspeople begin looking over their shoulders and locking their doors.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Political Thriller
programme.desc: When a Nevada politician dies in the midst of a cutthroat re-election campaign, the only clue investigators have to go on are the tiny punctures on her skin. As they dig deeper, they hone in upon the deceased's husband, a critical care nurse.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Jean Pool
programme.desc: When new DNA technology becomes available, cold case investigators in Tennessee think they'll finally be able to find out who killed a local college student.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Traffic Violations
programme.desc: When a young woman is found dead police immediately focus their attention on her husband. Not until they examine cell phone records and a unique shoe print do they realize the real killer has been a bit too close for comfort the entire time.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Brotherly Love
programme.desc: A young man devotes his life to law enforcement after his sister is brutally murdered. In the end, a brother's love - and a new scientific tool - unlocks the mystery behind an age old case.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Driven to Silence
programme.desc: An attractive young hairstylist is murdered in her South Carolina salon, and police are at a loss. A tiny hair and a DNA test force police to take another look nearly a decade after the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Printed Proof
programme.desc: The murders of two publicly known gay activists led investigators to believe they were victims of a hate-crime. The police soon were able to uncover the real motive behind the murders, and it wasn't hate.

programme.title: Forensic Files: About Face
programme.desc: A skeleton is found on an abandoned plot of land, but before investigators can figure out who killed her, they have to figure out who she is.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Horror at the Campground
programme.desc: A family camping trip to the remote Idaho mountains turns into something out of a horror movie when two-year-old DeOrr Kunz disappears. At first it looks like he may have been abducted, until other disturbing theories start to emerge.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Mystery in the Closet
programme.desc: Newlyweds Jessica and Matthew Boynton seemed like the picture-perfect couple until the young mother is found unresponsive and covered in blood inside her locked bedroom closet, and doesn't remember how she ended up there.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Mom of Three Vanished
programme.desc: Beautiful mom Michelle Parker appears on an episode of' The People’s Court', fighting with her ex-fiancé over a luxury, diamond engagement ring. But hours after that episode airs, Michelle mysteriously vanishes.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Pinned by the Evidence
programme.desc: A street fight takes the life of a wrestler. A jury believes the accused killed in cold blood. He gets sentenced to twenty years in prison. Six years later, he is granted another trial when a forensic animator offers a different explanation.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cries Unheard
programme.desc: When a 19-year-old girl is first found dead in her car, it seems to be an apparent suicide. Unsatisfied investigators probe the case further and discover the girl was involved in a complicated love quadrangle, giving several people a motive to kill her.

programme.title: Gold Rush: White Water: Nugget Heaven
programme.desc: Dustin Hurt hits bedrock and a pile of nuggets at Rainbow's End. Fred chases the gold upstream into a dangerous new spot, forcing him to rethink his plans.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Dangerous Waters
programme.desc: Eivin and Eve discover a tangle of old nets endangering fish in a nearby river, and launch a risky clean-up operation. Charlotte and Otto rebuild their rotting deck, leaving Jane and Jewel to pitch in elsewhere. And Atz Sr. goes on a solo hunt for moose.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier Exposed: Preserving the Old Ways
programme.desc: With insider facts and Frontier Extras: Eivin takes August on his first-ever deer hunt, in an attempt to keep old traditions alive. Atz Sr. and Otto try to tear down and rebuild a historic barn.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier Exposed: Fall Scramble
programme.desc: With insider facts and Frontier Extras: The Kilchers get to work on outdoor projects to prepare for the winter months. They scavenge for lumber, mill wood, build an enclosed camper and create a stunning, creative coop.

programme.title: Alaska: The Last Frontier: Making Kilcher History
programme.desc: Otto unearths and restores a homestead relic once used by Yule Kilcher himself. Jane is dropped into the harsh and unforgiving Arctic Circle with only a rifle and a backpack in her first ever solo hunt.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Off the Grid: Bearing Down
programme.desc: A hungry bear spooks the livestock when he breaks into Noah's tent. The first major storm of the season threatens the Browns' progress as they prepare for a big bush wedding. The family scrambles to protect their water tanks.

programme.title: Fast N' Loud: Fast and Furious Fairmont
programme.desc: An ugly 1978 Ford Fairmont is turned into a cool, mirrored drift car. Richard flips a rare 1967 Corvette Stingray.

programme.desc: Richard and Aaron pick up a rare 32 Ford 3-Window but can't agree what to do with it but they can agree that a gifted 1989 Shelby pickup must go.

programme.desc: The guys get a '64 Galaxie ready for auction. A 1949 F-1 Ford is stuck on a car hauler.

programme.desc: The crew dig out a '64 Impala that's been buried for 10 years and bring it back to life. Sparks fly between a former firefighter and a 1951 Bruco Fire Truck.

programme.title: Losing One of My Giant Legs
programme.desc: Mandy Sellars lives with legs three times the average size, but a near-fatal infection forces her to have one leg amputated.

programme.title: Tallest Teens
programme.desc: Meet three of the tallest teenagers in America and learn how they fit into a society designed for people several feet shorter and how will their size impact their future.

programme.title: 30 Inches Tall and Turning 18
programme.desc: Georgia Rankin is an average teenager at the height of an average two-year-old. Measuring 2 feet 7 inches tall, she's charismatic, and happy, despite suffering constant pain in her joints. We follow Georgia for a year as she seeks medical treatment.

programme.title: Conjoined Twins: Sister Bond
programme.desc: Kendra and Maliyah Herrin were born conjoined, attached at the abdomen and pelvis. Doctors embarked on a groundbreaking surgical procedure to separate the girls.

programme.title: Conjoined Twins: Separation Anxiety
programme.desc: When they were born to their Dominican mother, conjoined twins Maria and Theresa Tapia were declared doomed in the delivery room, and now, one twin's life hangs in the balance.

programme.title: My 40 Year Old Child
programme.desc: Nicky Freeman is 40 with the body of a 10-year-old. Gabby Williams is 6 years old but no different to a newborn. Both age one year for every four and doctors have no idea why.

programme.title: Girls Who Don't Age
programme.desc: Follow the incredible story of three girls who have stopped ageing. Frozen in time and destined to live their lives as toddlers, what is affecting these girls, how are they cheating time and could they help us unlock the secrets of the ageing process?
