programme.title: The Golden Girls: Like the Beep Beep of the Tom-Tom
programme.desc: Blanche knows she needs a pacemaker, but she fears it'll halt her sex life.

programme.title: The Golden Girls: An Illegitimate Concern
programme.desc: A young man identifies himself as the illegitimate son of Blanche's late husband George.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Pole Lox
programme.desc: At Doug's encouragement, Carrie reluctantly agrees to start taking pole dancing lessons, but quickly starts to enjoy the classes and begins feeling better about herself. However, when Carrie puts on a show for him, he is shocked by how badly she dances.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Vocal Discord
programme.desc: In an effort to save money, Doug and Carrie ask their neighbour Glenn for counselling since he happens to be a marriage counsellor. Glenn agrees to help out only to have his problem-solving techniques backfire, causing their arguments to get worse.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Consummate Professional
programme.desc: Carrie discovers that Doug lied to her about getting a job at IPS ten years ago.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Like Hell
programme.desc: When Doug is conspicuously not invited to Jared's barbecue, Doug and Carrie begin to feel insecure about their less-than-popular social standings at work. They both decide to overcompensate in an effort to rectify the situation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Sandwiched Out
programme.desc: When the guys' neighbourhood restaurant names a new sandwich 'The Deacon,' Doug gets angry. He claims that Deacon is taking credit for his sandwich creation.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Shear Torture
programme.desc: When Carrie bans Doug from going to his hair salon, her friend points out that she's just as guilty as Doug, since she flirts with her attractive personal trainer.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Inn Escapable
programme.desc: When Ed and Betty, the owners of a bed and breakfast where Doug and Carrie are staying for a romantic weekend, become too overbearing for them, Carrie forces Doug to tell them they are going to stay at the new Hyatt Hotel across town.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Move Doubt
programme.desc: When the couple next door decides to sell their home, the Heffernans try to persuade Deacon and Kelly to buy it. Doug and Carrie realize something is wrong when the two are completely disinterested in the home. Danny and Spence try to impress a girl.

programme.title: The King of Queens: G'Night Stalker
programme.desc: When Doug starts receiving fan mail from someone who saw his performance at a karaoke club, he lets the attention go to his head, only to have his ego shattered when the emails suddenly stop.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Raygin' Bulls
programme.desc: After a quick shopping spree for some snazzy new clothes, Doug and Ray decide to check out the new nightclub in town. Confident that they still have the moves, they make a small wager to see which one can convince a girl to dance with him first.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Alan Harper, Pleasing Women Since 2003
programme.desc: Alan befriends Lyndsey’s boyfriend in an effort to find out what he has that Alan doesn’t. Meanwhile, Walden helps Jenny be more proactive in pursuing her acting career.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Justice in Star-Spangled Hot Pants
programme.desc: When Alan learns Walden knows Lynda Carter, he asks him to set him up on a date with her. Against his better judgment, Walden agrees to invite her to the house for dinner.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Some Kind of Lesbian Zombie
programme.desc: Walden and Alan find themselves on dates with two ideal women until Lyndsey’s jealousy throws a wrench in their evening.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Mr. Walden, He Die. I Clean Room
programme.desc: Alan and Lyndsey's illicit affair puts Walden in danger, forcing him to accept Rose's help.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: Numero Uno Accidente Lawyer
programme.desc: Walden's date with an accident-prone model goes longer than expected. Meanwhile, Alan dates a woman who shares some surprising personal information with him.

programme.title: Two and a Half Men: On Vodka, on Soda, on Blender, on Mixer!
programme.desc: Walden helps Jenny get a second date with a one-night stand. Alan receives a Japanese delicacy from Jake for Christmas, and Walden's Malibu house is alive with questionable Christmas carol lyrics.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Fresh Brood
programme.desc: In order to help convince Carrie it's time for a child, Doug borrows the baby from Danny so they can give parenting a test run. Doug quickly adjusts to being a dad, but the transition isn't as smooth for Carrie.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Gambling N'Diction
programme.desc: When Doug's mother beats him and the guys in a friendly game of poker, Doug sees an opportunity to capitalize on her poker skills and help him win a high stakes poker tournament.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Apartment Complex
programme.desc: In need of a place to hang out, Doug and the guys decide to rent an apartment above their favourite Chinese restaurant. Meanwhile, in order to keep her new client, Kirstie Alley, happy, Carrie is forced to consume large quantities of food in front of her.

programme.title: The King of Queens: Buggie Nights
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie discover their house is infested with bedbugs but Doug doesn't want to spend money on an exterminator. Meanwhile, Spence and Danny struggle to decide where they are going on vacation.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: A Christmas Story
programme.desc: Disappointed with her unenthusiastic family during the holidays, Beverly creates 'Super Hanukkah' to get them into the spirit but it's too similar to Christmas.

programme.title: The Goldbergs: Han Ukkah Solo
programme.desc: After finding out there is only going to be one Hanukkah song in the holiday pageant, Beverly convinces Erica to create the perfect song to bring some excitement to the holiday.

programme.title: Roseanne: Here's to Good Friends
programme.desc: Roseanne and Jackie console a broken-hearted Crystal by taking her out on the town. Jackie notices Booker with another woman.

programme.title: Roseanne: Dan's Birthday Bash
programme.desc: Dan goes head to head with a barroom bully at his birthday party. Becky awaits a dinner invitation from Chip.

programme.title: Roseanne: Saturday
programme.desc: Roseanne bets Dan that he can't stop wasting time long enough to fix his truck. If she loses, she'll have to do all the snow shoveling for the rest of her life. If she wins, Dan has to clean the oven for the rest of his life.

programme.title: Roseanne: Canoga Time
programme.desc: Roseanne and Dan are at odds over which of their possessions to save and which to donate to the PTA rummage sale.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Decoy Detail
programme.desc: Officer Egan sets up a decoy and checks hunters at a popular bird hunting site. Officers Towne and Bronson help rescue an injured hiker on Mount Kearsarge. Plus, Lt. Boudreau and Officer MacFadzen investigate a hunting on private property call.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Rules of the Game
programme.desc: Officer Canfield responds to a call about an orphaned bear cub. Sgt. Lucas pays an unexpected visit to a hunter suspected of illegal baiting. And Officer Cyrs investigates a large buck shot by a young, nervous hunter during muzzleloader season.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Dawn Patrol
programme.desc: Pre-dawn on opening day of rifle season, Lt. Boudreau and Officer Hannett pursue a night hunter. While up north, Officers Canfield and St. Pierre battle the snow to work a deer decoy. And in the city, Officer Frye wrestles an aggressive wild turkey.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Winter Is Coming
programme.desc: Officer Fluette and Moxie attend their graduation. Officer Holmes and trainee McDermott investigate a possible illegal bait site and run a decoy operation with Officer Egan. Sergeant Lucas checks on a moose with odd behavior.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed: Reckless Rider
programme.desc: At the state's largest ice fishing derby, Officer MacFazden patrols a drag race on ice, while Major Juneau takes charge of a rescue operation. Meanwhile, Officers Bronson and Towne have a troubling encounter with a snowmobiler.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Spring Training
programme.desc: Officer Lucas sends a trainee to wrangle his first angry raccoon. Officer Fluette untangles a trapper's web of lies. Officer Benvenuti tries to rescue an injured gosling. Officers Boudreau and Hannett question father and son turkey hunters.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Turkey Trouble
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau, K9 Ruby and Officer MacFadzen investigate a hunter suspected of shooting a turkey from the road. Officer McKee searches for a baby owl that fell from its nest. And Officer Hannett rushes to lead a carryout when a hiker is injured.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Uncuffed: Reckless Rider
programme.desc: At the state's largest ice fishing derby, Officer MacFazden patrols a drag race on ice, while Major Juneau takes charge of a rescue operation. Meanwhile, Officers Bronson and Towne have a troubling encounter with a snowmobiler.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Spring Training
programme.desc: Officer Lucas sends a trainee to wrangle his first angry raccoon. Officer Fluette untangles a trapper's web of lies. Officer Benvenuti tries to rescue an injured gosling. Officers Boudreau and Hannett question father and son turkey hunters.

programme.title: North Woods Law: Turkey Trouble
programme.desc: Lt. Boudreau, K9 Ruby and Officer MacFadzen investigate a hunter suspected of shooting a turkey from the road. Officer McKee searches for a baby owl that fell from its nest. And Officer Hannett rushes to lead a carryout when a hiker is injured.

programme.title: North Woods Law: In the Thick of It
programme.desc: At the state's largest ice fishing derby, Officer Canfield looks for the owner of a frozen fishing line while Major Juneau takes command of a mountain rescue. Officer McKee runs radar for snowmobiles. And Officer Cyrs checks on a moose in a bog.

programme.title: Wild Things With Dominic Monaghan: Belize
programme.desc: Dom arrives in Belize on a mission to find Latin America's most deadly snake, the Fer-de-Lance: a venomous pit viper with a reputation for lying in wait and attacking unprovoked.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Alaskan Grit: Winter's Approach
programme.desc: With the departure of Bam, the Browns are down a pair of hands. Winter is on the way which means there will be a mad race to prepare Browntown for the cold.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Alaskan Grit: Predator Season
programme.desc: With the collapse of the Brown's turbine, resources and morale are at all-time low. An early winter creeps and with comes advancing predators.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Alaskan Grit: Brink of Disaster
programme.desc: The family's barter for their wind turbine is threatened when they can't salvage enough wood. The goal of generating their own power for Brown Town hangs in the balance as the freeze settles in.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Basic Instinct
programme.desc: An Army veteran, an ultra-marathoner, and a world record weightlifter face the biggest battles of their lives as they take on Bart, Honey Bump, and Tank in challenges of strength, speed, and strategy, but it's the underdog who shocks Bear Mountain.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Human Kannonball
programme.desc: With odds stacked against them, a bodyguard, a firefighter and an ultra-fit football coach take on three massive grizzlies in a gauntlet of challenges. As they fight for a place in the finale, each discovers just how badly bears don't like to lose.

programme.title: Man Vs. Bear: Boomer vs Millennial
programme.desc: When a Boomer, Millennial, and Gen Xer find themselves face to face with three grizzly bears in a never-before-attempted competition of speed, strength, and strategy, one human finds out the hard way what it means to have skin in the game.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Alaskan Grit: The Price of the Bush
programme.desc: Living in the bush always comes with a price, and for the Browns the harsh existence may be taking its toll on one family member.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Alaskan Grit: Browntown Closedown?
programme.desc: Ami's health is still in question which means the Browns are still away from Browntown in order be near the proper facilities. The further they are away from home, the less likely it seems to return.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Alaskan Grit: Worst Case Scenario
programme.desc: The Brown's worst fears are realized when Ami's biopsy results come back. The wolf pack will be divided so that some can care for Ami, while others keep Browntown alive.

programme.title: Alaskan Bush People: Alaskan Grit: Browntown Boom
programme.desc: Shorthanded in Browntown, the family fights to salvage their dream, but a major accident puts another member of the Wolfpack in the hospital.

programme.title: Movie: Kidnap
programme.desc: A single mother takes her son to an amusement park where he gets abducted. She goes to the police, but realizes that she doesn't have the time to wait for their help. Taking her son's safety into her own hands, she pursues the abductor relentlessly.

programme.title: Movie: Sleepless
programme.desc: A dirty police detective's secret life is exposed when he and his partner steal cocaine from a powerful and ruthless drug lord. They kidnap his son and Vincent is forced to search for him while evading internal affairs. He risks everything for his family.

programme.title: Movie: White House Down
programme.desc: A man recently denied his dream job of protecting the President of the United States ironically finds himself in the middle of chaos as he struggles to save his daughter, the president and the rest of the country.

programme.title: Martin: Boys R' Us
programme.desc: Martin tries to let everyone know that he wears the pants in his relationship.

programme.title: Martin: Dead Men Don't Flush
programme.desc: A plumber that Martin hires dies in the bathroom while on the job.

programme.title: Martin: Forever Sheneneh
programme.desc: Sheneneh wins a date with Christopher Reid on Martin's radio show.

programme.title: Martin: I'm Not Your Superwoman
programme.desc: When Martin is sick with the flu, Gina stays home to take care of him.

programme.title: The Parkers: J.C. Bowl
programme.desc: Nikki helps Professor Oglevee assemble a winning team so he can beat his long-time rival.

programme.title: The Parkers: Whassup With Heyyy?
programme.desc: T, Kim and Nikki decide to try making money by selling T-shirts with a catchy slogan.

programme.title: The Parkers: Scary Kim
programme.desc: A mysterious prankster turns Kim's Halloween birthday bash into the ultimate fright fest.

programme.title: The Parkers: Election 2000
programme.desc: Kim and Nikki become political rivals when both run for president of the student-body.

programme.title: The Parkers: Heir Today, Gone Tomorrow
programme.desc: For a creative-writing project, Kim imagines her family as the Ewings from 'Dallas.'

programme.title: The Parkers: Turkey Day Blues
programme.desc: The gang winds up in a homeless shelter on Thanksgiving Day after Nikki and Kim argue.

programme.title: The Parkers: Cheers
programme.desc: Kim's cheerleading squad auditions Nikki but rejects her, with dire consequences.

programme.title: The Parkers: Mama, I Want to Sing
programme.desc: Nikki grounds her daughter just before a concert and tries to fill in for her.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet Brown Meadows
programme.desc: Brown gets more than he expects as he grants his Daddy's dying wish to 'take care of the old' by opening a retirement home.

programme.title: Meet the Browns: Meet London and the Competition
programme.desc: Brown interviews for prospects for a handyman position and hires Jesus (who's studying to be a lawyer). Meanwhile, Sasha agrees to come and work as a nurse.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Knowledge Is Power
programme.desc: Will and Carlton discover that Hilary dropped out of college without telling her parents.

programme.title: Fresh Prince of Bel Air: Day Damn One
programme.desc: Will gets into trouble during his first day at Bel-Air Prep School.

programme.title: Martin: Woman With a Past
programme.desc: After he finds out that a recent radio guest once dated Gina, Martin becomes jealous.

programme.title: Martin: The Parents Are Coming
programme.desc: Gina wants Martin to meet her conservative parents, but Martin feels uneasy. Wanting to make a good first impression, he takes advice from Tommy and Cole.

programme.title: Martin: Three Men and a Mouse
programme.desc: When Gina is at Martin's house sleeping, she hears noises in the middle of the night. Thinking it's a robber, she begs Martin to check it out. Martin discovers that it's a mouse.

programme.title: Martin: The Great Payne Robbery
programme.desc: When Martin's neighbor is robbed, Martin holds a neighborhood crime watch meeting.

programme.title: Martin: Baby It's Cole'd Here
programme.desc: Cole's mother interrupts his evening with his girlfriend and demands back rent from him.

programme.title: Martin: Radio Days
programme.desc: Stan decides to hire a new female co-host for Martin's show to boost the ratings. At first Martin feels threatened by the move, and is very stand-offish.

programme.title: Martin: Blackboard Jungle Fever
programme.desc: When Martin returns to his elementary school for Career Day, he discovers his favourite third grade teacher, Ms. Trinidad, is still teaching there. As they catch up, she makes a pass at Martin while Gina watches.

programme.title: Martin: The Night He Came Home
programme.desc: On Halloween, Martin and his friends gather at his apartment to share ghost stories.

programme.title: The New Edition Story
programme.desc: The lives of five childhood friends from the projects of Roxbury, Massachusetts will forever change after they form a singing group to win local talent shows and ultimately become the legendary R&B group, New Edition.

programme.title: The New Edition Story
programme.desc: Though New Edition became R&B sensations, their fame came at a steep price, as internal tension and external pressure lead them to put business before friendship.

programme.title: Movie: Star Trek Beyond
programme.desc: Halfway into their five-year mission to explore uncharted space, the USS Enterprise is attacked by a mysterious new enemy. Escaping to the planet below, Kirk must join a stranger in fighting an impressive foe so that he can save his friends and home.

programme.title: Movie: Doctor Strange
programme.desc: When a neurosurgeon loses the use of his hands in an accident, he finds himself at a mystical enclave. Healing his hands, he trains there as a sorcerer. When a new threat emerges, he must decide whether to return to his life or defend the world.

programme.title: Movie: King Arthur: Legend of the Sword
programme.desc: Arthur's father, the King, was murdered when he was a young boy. Though he managed to escape, Arthur grew up in the back alleys of the city. However, once he pulls a mystical sword from a stone, his life is turned upside down as his legacy appears.

programme.title: Futurama: Naturama
programme.desc: Bender and the others are transformed into wild animals in a nature documentary.

programme.title: Futurama: 2-D Blacktop
programme.desc: Professor Farnsworth joins a gang of street-racing punks.

programme.title: Futurama: Fry and Leela's Big Fling
programme.desc: Fry and Leela's romantic vacation goes disturbingly wrong.

programme.title: Futurama: T.: The Terrestrial
programme.desc: After being marooned on a distant planet, Fry is befriended by a young monster.

programme.title: Futurama: Forty Percent Leadbelly
programme.desc: At a maximum-security prison, Bender meets a famous folk singer and attempts to make a copy of his precious guitar.

programme.title: Futurama: The Inhuman Torch
programme.desc: Bender becomes a famous firefighter; however, the crew suspects him of arson.

programme.title: Movie: Resident Evil: Retribution
programme.desc: Alice reveals her past after she wakes up in the Umbrella's operations facility.

programme.title: Movie: Chronicle
programme.desc: After making a shocking discovery, three high school friends find themselves with superpowers.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Bewitchin' Pool
programme.desc: Kids end up in the backwoods when they're coaxed to jump into a pool by a strange child.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: On Thursday We Leave For Home
programme.desc: When a rescue ship arrives to transport space colonists back to Earth there is resistance.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: Passage on the Lady Anne
programme.desc: A couple books a passage on a luxury liner to save their marriage but are amiss onboard.

programme.title: The Twilight Zone: The Bard

programme.title: Movie: Friday the 13th Part 2
programme.desc: Five years after Pamela Voorhees' killing spree, a new set of camp counselors come to Crystal Lake. Unbeknowst to them, her son Jason has survived and stalks them through the woods, seeking revenge for his mother's murder.

programme.title: Movie: Friday the 13th Part 3
programme.desc: Recovering from his injuries of the previous film, Jason takes refuge at a Crystal Lake cottage, only to find more teenagers have arrived for vacation.

programme.title: Movie: Jason X
programme.desc: A team of government scientists working at the Crystal Lake Research Facility have finally captured the notorious, and seemingly indestructible, killer Jason Voorhees. In order to contain Jason, they plan to freeze him in cryogenic suspension.

programme.title: Movie: The Last Witch Hunter
programme.desc: A witch-hunting warrior is doomed to immortality after slaying the Queen Witch. In present times and the last of his kind, the man continues to hunt rogue witches. When the Queen Witch is resurrected, he must once again defeat her to save humanity.

programme.title: Home Town: A Quiet Place to Call Home
programme.desc: After renting his whole life, a local pastor is ready to settle down in a house that will give him enough space for his cooking and gardening hobbies.

programme.title: Home Town: Southern Coastal Style
programme.desc: With an all-in budget of $300,000, a couple is ready to move back home to Mississippi and put down roots after years of moving for work. They need help finding a home with charm and character in a small town.

programme.title: Home Town: An Island for All
programme.desc: A long-time local teacher looks for a house where she can entertain her large family. She has an all-in budget and a wish list that includes a large kitchen and family living area to host her big family get-togethers.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Fan Faves: Families Helping Families
programme.desc: Mike is going back to his roots and helping families, along with his kids, Michael and Sherry. At a home they dub The City Barn, they plan to fix the weathered roof and make the property more accessible for a 13-year-old who is battling cancer.

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Fan Faves: Divide and Conquer

programme.title: Holmes and Holmes: Fan Faves: Not a Dry Eye in the House

programme.title: One of a Kind: Love Letter Walls

programme.desc: Grace Mitchell tackles the home of a chef and her husband where the interior doesn't reflect their Southern roots. To bring in that charm, Grace creates an elegant dining room and gives the homeowner a proper kitchen of her own.

programme.title: One of a Kind: From Groovy to Gorgeous
programme.desc: A couple is moving back into her childhood house and calls on Grace to create a new home that honours the family's memories while fitting their current story, too. Grace creates a home that can be passed down for generations.

programme.title: One of a Kind: The Wine Cellar Bathroom

programme.title: NCIS: Devil's Trifecta

programme.title: NCIS: You Better Watch Out

programme.title: NCIS: Shabbat Shalom
programme.desc: While the NCIS team investigates the link to a dead journalist and a navy petty officer, Ziva is taken aback by the sudden emotional visit by her father, who she hasn't seen in more than two years.

programme.title: NCIS: Shiva
programme.desc: In the aftermath of an event that strikes close to home, the NCIS team unites to seek answers and demand justice in order to protect their most vulnerable colleagues.

programme.title: The Simpsons: My Fare Lady
programme.desc: When Marge gets fed up with the thankless duty of chauffeuring her kids around, she begins working as a driver for a transportation app service. Meanwhile, Homer bankrupts Moe when he watches over the bar for one night.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Princess Guide
programme.desc: Homer is put in charge of keeping Princess Kemi out of trouble while her father, a Nigerian king, works out a uranium deal with Mr. Burns. When Kemi ends up at Moe's, Moe jumps to the conclusion she's related to the prince who scammed him via e-mail.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Sky Police
programme.desc: Chief Wiggum is mistakenly delivered a military jet pack, which he gleefully accepts and uses in order to fight crime. But when the jet pack crashes into the church, the congregation resorts to gambling to collect money for the repairs.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Waiting for Duffman
programme.desc: When Duffman undergoes hip replacement surgery and retires, the company sets up a reality show competition to find his replacement. Homer wins the competition but the job requires him to stay sober.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Peeping Mom
programme.desc: Bart lies about being involved in a bulldozer crash, so Marge decides to follow him everywhere until he confesses. Meanwhile, Homer ignores Santa's Little Helper when Flanders gets a new dog.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Kids Are All Fight
programme.desc: When Homer gets an old film roll developed, the family takes a trip down memory lane to see the origins of how Bart and Lisa first started fighting with each other.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Let's Go Fly a Coot
programme.desc: The Simpsons learn about Grampa's days in the Air Force, and Bart takes up smoking to impress Milhouse's Dutch cousin, Annika.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bull-E
programme.desc: After Bart gets bullied at the school dance, Marge convinces the town to pass anti-bullying legislation. Homer then gets arrested and sent to rehab for bullying Ned Flanders, only to subsequently leave rehab as a hero.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Mathlete's Feat
programme.desc: When a modernized Springfield Elementary has a technical meltdown, Lisa transforms it into a Waldorf school. Meanwhile, Groundskeeper Willie becomes the coach of the mathletes.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Every Man's Dream
programme.desc: Homer is diagnosed with narcolepsy, but instead of returning home with his prescription medication, he returns home drunk. He and Marge visit a marriage counsellor and have a trial separation, during which Homer begins dating a 20-something.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Cue Detective
programme.desc: Scotty Boom, a Chew Network super-chef, challenges Homer to a smoke-off. But when someone steals Homer's secret weapon – a smoker he bought off a mysterious man at a BBQ shack – Lisa and Bart are on the case.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Puffless
programme.desc: Upon learning that their father really died of lung cancer, Selma and Patty agree to quit smoking. When Selma relapses, an angry Patty moves in with Marge and Homer.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Halloween of Horror
programme.desc: When Lisa becomes scared at the Krustyland Halloween Horror Night, Homer is forced to take down his Everscream Terrors decorations. Halloween pop-up employees seek vengeance on Homer for causing them to lose their jobs.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXVI
programme.desc: In the annual frightfest Halloween episode, Sideshow Bob finally kills Bart, only to reanimate him. Homer wakes up with short-term memory loss, and Lisa, Bart and Milhouse get super powers from radiation.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Friend With Benefit
programme.desc: Lisa befriends Harper, a new kid at school who happens to be super-rich. Homer befriends Harper's dad to enjoy the perks of Lisa having a rich friend. Lisa decides Harper is a bully and moves to end the friendship, but Homer tries to smooth things over.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa With An 'S"
programme.desc: When Homer loses $5,000 at a poker game with Broadway legend Laney Fontaine, the only way he is able to settle the bet is if he loans Lisa to Laney for a month.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Paths of Glory
programme.desc: Lisa sets out to restore the tarnished reputation of Springfield's first female inventor. To find her invention, she scours an abandoned asylum and a restaurant that caters to men.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Barthood
programme.desc: Bart's coming of age story, a la 'Boyhood,' chronicles his life from six years old to his time as an accomplished young man.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Girl Code
programme.desc: After a photo Marge posts on social media gets Homer fired, he returns to the best job he ever had, a dishwasher at a Greek restaurant. This same post inspires Lisa to code an app that predicts the real-life consequences of anything you post online.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Teenage Mutant Milk-Caused Hurdles
programme.desc: There is a new teacher at Springfield Elementary, and a captivated Bart tries everything to win her over. Meanwhile, Homer decides to buy a new brand of 'milk,' which causes early puberty, both for Bart and Lisa.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Much Apu About Something
programme.desc: Sanjay passes his stake in the Kwik-E-Mart to his millennial son, Jay, who turns it into a hip, health food market against Apu's insistence on tradition.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Love Is in the N2-O2-Ar-CO2-Ne-He-CH4
programme.desc: Professor Fink uses science to turn himself into a man who women find attractive. Then, overwhelmed by the attention, he invents an algorithm to perfectly pair the lonely men and women of Springfield, realizing scientific exploration is his true love.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Gal of Constant Sorrow
programme.desc: After Bart accidentally sends a sweet homeless woman's cart into the river, he allows her to live in his closet for a small fee. When Lisa discovers that the woman is an incredible folk singer, she offers her own closet and plans a concert.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Lisa the Veterinarian
programme.desc: After performing CPR on a tased raccoon, Lisa discovers her calling to be veterinarian and becomes an intern at the local office, but learns a tough lesson when her neglected class hamster dies.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Marge-ian Chronicles
programme.desc: Lisa volunteers for a future one-way journey to Mars, much to Marge's chagrin. As she searches for a way to convince Lisa not to go, Marge hits upon the most devious strategy of all and volunteers to go along for the ride.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Burns Cage
programme.desc: When Smithers is devastated by Mr. Burns' lack of affection towards him, Homer makes it his mission to find him a boyfriend. Meanwhile, Bart orchestrates the removal of the lead in the school's stage production of 'Casablanca.'

programme.title: The Simpsons: How Lisa Got Her Marge Back
programme.desc: After getting into an argument, Marge takes Lisa on a touristy trip to Capital City, where, after attending a musical, they meet the show's star, Andrew Rannells, who reminds Lisa how lucky she is to have such a great mom.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Fland Canyon
programme.desc: Homer recalls a tense family vacation to the Grand Canyon with the Flanders family. At first, the Flanders' perfection puts the families at odds, but when they get stranded and Ned and Bart go for help, the families finally bond.

programme.title: The Simpsons: To Courier With Love
programme.desc: After promising Marge the trip of a lifetime, frugality gets the better of Homer when he makes a deal with a travel agent to be a courier of a top-secret briefcase in exchange for a discounted family vacation to Paris.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Simprovised
programme.desc: After butchering a speech in front of all of his friends at work, Homer turns to improv comedy to gain back his confidence in his public speaking skills. Meanwhile, Marge decides to rebuild Bart's lacklustre treehouse.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Orange Is the New Yellow
programme.desc: When Marge gets arrested for letting Bart go to the park unsupervised, she serves time only to realize that prison is a welcome break from the demands of her life as a mom and wife. In her absence, Homer tries to manage the parenting responsibilities.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Monty Burns' Fleeing Circus
programme.desc: When Springfield is burned to the ground, the Simpsons beg Mr. Burns to fund its rebuilding. Burns agrees with one condition: he gets to put on a variety show at the Springfield Bowl.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Friends and Family
programme.desc: Mr. Burns hires the Simpsons to play his live-in virtual reality family, but excludes Homer so that he may play dad. Now alone, Homer finds a new best friend in girl-next-door Julia, who eats, drinks and thinks like him.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Town
programme.desc: After Homer catches Bart rooting for Springfield's football rival, the Boston Americans, he plans a family 'hate-cation' trip to Boston in an attempt to show Bart that Boston is a terrible city.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XXVII
programme.desc: Mr. Burns introduces a 'Hunger Games'-style contest in which Springfield's children must fight each other, and Lisa's imaginary best friend becomes jealous of Lisa's real best friends.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Trust But Clarify
programme.desc: Lisa and Bart investigate Krusty's suspicious new 'Krustaceans' candy. Meanwhile, Homer wants a promotion at the nuclear plant and asks Marge to help him dress the part, and news anchor Kent Brockman struggles to find his feet in the changing media world.

programme.title: The Simpsons: There Will Be Buds
programme.desc: Homer gets roped into coaching the kids’ lacrosse team with Milhouse’s dad, Kirk, who is in desperate need of a friend. When Kirk gets too clingy, Homer vents about how much of a loser he is.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Havana Wild Weekend
programme.desc: When the Retirement Castle and the V.A. Hospital can't solve Grampa's health issues, the Simpsons decide to take a family trip to Cuba to get him cheap medical care.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Dad Behavior
programme.desc: Homer finds a new app that makes his life much easier and outsources his father-son bonding. Meanwhile, Grampa finds that he is about to be a father again.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Last Traction Hero
programme.desc: A workplace accident leaves Homer in a cast, and in a position to sue Mr. Burns. This leaves Marge unfulfilled, so she turns to an unexpected source for romance. Meanwhile, Lisa is made 'Bus Monitor' and tries to keep the peace.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Nightmare After Krustmas
programme.desc: Krusty tries to impress his daughter as they spend Christmas with the Simpsons. Meanwhile, Reverend Lovejoy seeks converts after church attendance plummets, and Maggie is haunted by a spooky Christmas toy.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Pork and Burns
programme.desc: When Marge becomes obsessed with a Japanese style of living, the Simpsons must part with any item that no longer brings them joy. For Homer, this means finding a new home for the family pig.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Great Phatsby
programme.desc: Mr. Burns tries to relive his glory days, and crosses paths with a mysterious music mogul. After being conned by him and reduced to bankruptcy, Mr. Burns seeks revenge on the music producer.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Great Phatsby
programme.desc: Mr. Burns tries to relive his glory days, and crosses paths with a mysterious music mogul. After being conned by him and reduced to bankruptcy, Mr. Burns seeks revenge on the music producer.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Fatzcarraldo
programme.desc: When all the fast food restaurants in Springfield become healthy, Homer turns to the last bastion of greasy food for comfort and digs up some childhood memories along the way.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Cad and the Hat
programme.desc: When Bart betrays Lisa, he has to deal with his guilt literally. Meanwhile, Springfield is in awe when Homer is revealed to be a chess savant.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Kamp Krustier
programme.desc: When Bart and Lisa return home abruptly after a traumatic incident at Kamp Krustier, they put an end to Homer and Marge's romantic encounters. Without sex to distract him, Homer becomes a more productive worker and caring husband.

programme.title: The Simpsons: 22 for 30
programme.desc: In this parody of a cable sports show, Bart goes from delinquent with detention to the star basketball player at Springfield Elementary. Lisa covers Bart's success for the school paper, and Homer becomes the team's coach.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Rings of Akhaten
programme.desc: On the rings of the planet Akhaten, the Festival of Offerings is in full swing. Clara meets the Queen of Years but something is stirring in the pyramid, and a sacrifice will be demanded.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Cold War
programme.desc: The Doctor and Clara land on a submarine in 1983 as it spirals into the ocean depths with an alien creature loose. With tempers flaring and nuclear weapons on board, the whole of humanity is at stake.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Hide
programme.desc: Something terrifying is hiding in Caliburn House and the Doctor finds himself part of the ghost hunt.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Journey to the Centre of the TARDIS
programme.desc: When the TARDIS crashes, Clara is lost inside and the Doctor only has 30 minutes before the ship explodes.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Crimson Horror
programme.desc: Something ghastly is afoot in Victorian Yorkshire, as bodies are found with their skin a waxy, glowing red.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Nightmare in Silver
programme.desc: Hedgewick’s World of Wonders: the perfect theme park day out. And ground zero for a deadly silver resurrection.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Name of the Doctor
programme.desc: Clara is summoned to an impossible conference call, alerting her that the deadly Whisper Men are closing in on Vastra, Jenny and Strax. Someone is kidnapping the Doctor's friends, leading him toward the one place in all of time and space he should not go.

programme.title: Doctor Who: A Christmas Carol
programme.desc: Amy and Rory are trapped on a crashing space liner and the only way the Doctor can rescue them is by saving the soul of a lonely old miser.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Doctor, the Widow and the Wardrobe
programme.desc: Evacuated to a house in Dorset from war-torn London, Madge Arwell and her two children, Lily and Cyril, are greeted by a madcap caretaker whose mysterious Christmas gift leads them into a magical wintry world.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Let's Kill Hitler
programme.desc: The TARDIS crash lands in 1930's Berlin, bringing the Doctor face to face with the greatest war criminal in the Universe. And Hitler.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Night Terrors
programme.desc: Every child is scared of monsters, but George's terrified pleas for help reach the Doctor because George's monsters are real.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Girl Who Waited
programme.desc: Amy is trapped in a quarantine facility for victims of an alien plague—a plague that will kill the Doctor in a day. Rory is left on his own and rushes to her aid before she is killed by kindness.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The God Complex
programme.desc: The TARDIS lands in a hotel where every visitor's room contains their deepest, darkest fears.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Listen
programme.desc: Ghosts of the past and future crowd into the lives of the Doctor and Clara and send them on an adventure that takes them to the end of the universe.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Girl Who Died
programme.desc: Captured by Vikings, the Doctor and Clara must help protect their village from space warriors from the future.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Woman Who Lived
programme.desc: The deadly Highwayman, 'The Knightmare,' and his sidekick stalk the dark streets of London in 1651. But when they find loot that's not of this world, they come face to face with the Doctor. He must find out who the Knightmare is in league with.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Face the Raven
programme.desc: The Doctor and Clara, with their old friend Rigsy, find themselves in a magical alien world, hidden on a street in the heart of London. Sheltered within are some of the most fearsome creatures of the universe and Ashildr.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Heaven Sent
programme.desc: Trapped in a world unlike any other he has seen, the Doctor faces the greatest challenge of his many lives. Pursued by the fearsome creature known only as the Veil, he must attempt the impossible.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Hell Bent
programme.desc: Everything has been taken from the Doctor, he's been trapped, betrayed, and had both his hearts broken. Returning to Gallifrey, the Doctor faces the Time Lords in a struggle that will take him to the end of time itself.

programme.title: Doctor Who: The Pilot
programme.desc: A chance encounter with a girl with a star in her eye leads to a terrifying chase across time and space. Bill's mind is opened to a Universe that is bigger and more exciting than she could possibly have imagined.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Smile
programme.desc: The Doctor and Bill find the colonists missing when they visit a spectacular city on a distant planet. The mystery may be connected to a band of 'cute' droids.

programme.title: Doctor Who: Thin Ice
programme.desc: London, 1814. The entire city has turned out for the biggest Frost Fair in decades! But beneath the Thames, revelers are disappearing, snatched through the ice. Will the Doctor and Bill stop the slaughter before they too are dragged into the icy waters?

programme.title: The '80s: The Decade That Made Us: Lift Off
programme.desc: See how the '80s created our modern world including the revolution in personal entertainment brought on by Pac-Man and Sony Walkmans while a new kid on the block defined a new musical era - spelled 'MTV.'

programme.title: The '80s: The Decade That Made Us: The Revolutionaries
programme.desc: Reagan's business mandate leads to a new breed of entrepreneurs, including Steve Jobs, whose '1984' ad helped launch the Super Bowl commercial craze and Ted Turner, who invented the 24-hour news network.

programme.title: The '80s: The Decade That Made Us: Shop 'Til You Drop
programme.desc: Glamour finds a new poster girl in the 1980s, when a young singer is launched to stardom with a shocking performance of 'Like a Virgin' at the first MTV Music Video Awards inspiring girls across the globe to hit the mall.

programme.title: The '80s: The Decade That Made Us: Masters of the Universe
programme.desc: With the motto 'greed is good,' Gordon Gekko desires excess and ambition in 'Wall Street' while traders mirror his bad behaviour in real life. CEOs see their salaries rise while women fight to overcome office boys' clubs.

programme.title: The '80s: The Decade That Made Us: Tear Down These Walls
programme.desc: Though the 1980s were known for its 'greed is good' mantra, the decade also saw its fair share of literal and cultural walls brought down, as Americans united on political, racial and health issues.

programme.title: The '80s: The Decade That Made Us: Super Power
programme.desc: At the end of the 1980s American pop culture goes global and helps bring down the Iron Curtain, leaving America as the world's sole superpower.

programme.title: Brain Games: First Look
programme.desc: Put your brain to the test! Here’s the first look at the new season of Brain Games!

programme.title: When Sharks Attack: Gulf Coast Killers

programme.title: When Sharks Attack: Bedlam in Brazil
programme.desc: Investigators try to uncover the cause behind South America’s deadliest coast.

programme.title: When Sharks Attack: Florida Frenzy

programme.title: When Sharks Attack: Surfers Under Siege

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: How Now Downed Cow?

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Up Sheep's Creek

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Got Your Goat

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: Deja MOO!: Polnado Warning

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: A Fair to Remember

programme.title: The Incredible Dr. Pol: The Cow Jumped Over the Moon

programme.desc: New discoveries at the site of an alleged long-lost gold mine could lead investigators to a 200-million-dollar payday, and using cutting-edge tech, experts investigate clues in long-lost maps and relics to recover the Lost Dutchman's treasure.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Mysterious UFO Earth Landings
programme.desc: New evidence points to the possibility that ancient man was visited by extraterrestrials, which influenced ancient technologies, architecture and art.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Extraterrestrials and Sacred Sites
programme.desc: Startling evidence suggests contact with interstellar travelers in the distant past may have influenced mankind and many of our sacred sites.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Deep Sea Encounters
programme.desc: For decades UFO research has been directed to the skies, but newly declassified documents, along with advances in technology are leading UFO researchers to believe that UFOs may also be inhabiting oceans.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: UFOs in the Past and Present
programme.desc: From the lore and history of ancient Egypt, to the myths of Native Americans, and even the art of the Renaissance period, mankind's past is riddled with the evidence of UFOs.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: UFOs and Temples of Gold
programme.desc: UFO experts investigate whether the value, reverence and desire for gold is the result of extraterrestrial landings in the ancient past.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: UFOs and the Presidents: FDR to JFK
programme.desc: Investigators reveal the secret history between US Presidents and the UFO phenomenon, from FDR's knowledge about a UFO battle over Los Angeles to JFK's alleged plan to share extraterrestrial secrets with the Russians.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Police UFO Files
programme.desc: Using archival audio recordings, official transcripts and incident reports, UFO researchers investigate what really happened during incredible and sometimes life-threatening encounters between law enforcement and UFOs.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Native Americans and Star People
programme.desc: Astonishing new evidence and modern-day UFO sightings have experts rethinking ancient otherworldly Native American myths.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: Nazi UFO Secrets
programme.desc: Shocking evidence reveals the development of secret Nazi weapons not long after an alleged UFO crashed in Germany's Black Forest. UFO experts investigate whether the US government co-opted this technology for our own space and military programs.

programme.title: UFOs: The Lost Evidence: UFO Abduction
programme.desc: Only recently have researchers begun to understand and investigate the phenomenon of alien abduction. While today such claims are dismissed as hoax or delusion, there are time-tested, landmark cases that mainstream scholars struggle to refute.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Nothing Good Happens After Midnight
programme.desc: The Task force realizes that finding cars are not their only job. They take down robbers, and then search for a man with a gun.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: It's Job Security
programme.desc: Task force patrols the streets at night incognito to track down unsuspecting thieves.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Relentless
programme.desc: Detectives search for a 31-year-old male fugitive wanted for first-degree murder and weapons possession.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Predator Pursuit
programme.desc: A twice convicted and particularly dangerous pedophile and sexual predator from Georgia is pursued before he hurts someone again.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Ticking Time Bomb
programme.desc: Detectives are assigned a parolee who's on the most wanted list, and perform a building-to-building search for the man.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: 15 Years Running
programme.desc: In 1993 a man was convicted of selling narcotics in South Carolina. He had already been incarcerated for a similar charge before and, not wanting to return to prison, failed to show up to serve his time.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Hip Hop Homicide
programme.desc: A rising hip-hop star is gunned down in Orlando, Florida and detectives work around the clock to bring closure to the mourning parents.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: I Don't Think I Can Make It in Jail
programme.desc: The Task Force acquires a new piece of equipment and finds it to be very helpful. Later, the A.T.T.F helps the Newark police catch an armed robbery vehicle.

programme.desc: A rising hip-hop star is gunned down in Orlando, Florida and detectives work around the clock to bring closure to the mourning parents.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: 15 Years Running
programme.desc: In 1993 a man was convicted of selling narcotics in South Carolina. He had already been incarcerated for a similar charge before and, not wanting to return to prison, failed to show up to serve his time.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Couple on the Run
programme.desc: After a drug deal goes wrong, a man is shot and collapses behind a dumpster, ending up on life support. A couple are wanted in connection to this attempted murder.

programme.title: Manhunters: Fugitive Task Force: Hot and Cold
programme.desc: Officers nab a parole violator who raped a nine-year old and search for a fugitive wanted for violating parole on a manslaughter conviction.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: I Don't Think I Can Make It in Jail
programme.desc: The Task Force acquires a new piece of equipment and finds it to be very helpful. Later, the A.T.T.F helps the Newark police catch an armed robbery vehicle.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: They're Hitting the Highway
programme.desc: A stolen vehicle is found abandoned, rolling backwards down the street.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: Fastest Feet in the Fleet
programme.desc: The Unit has their busiest night; a break is taken to see who is the fastest in the unit.

programme.title: Jacked: Auto Theft Task Force: These Are the Streets

programme.title: American Justice: Crime Family
programme.desc: A profile of infamous mob boss Vito Genovese and how he built the most ruthless and powerful crime family in the nation. Includes interviews with Genovese's godson, FBI agents and prosecutors.

programme.title: American Justice: Blood on the Staircase
programme.desc: North Carolina author Michael Peterson was convicted of murdering his wife for her insurance money.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Caught You, By Surprise
programme.desc: Police officers pursue suspected drug dealers, while Keeley saves a group of partiers from a violent schizophrenic.

programme.title: Nightwatch: Full Moon Rising
programme.desc: It's a full moon in New Orleans, and sure enough, all night long, the calls for the EMTs seem to get crazier and crazier. There's a machete hacking, a man whose finger is bitten off by a dog and a guy stabbed by a man dating his ex-wife.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: It's a tense situation as Sgt. Paul Hamilton and his squad get caught up in a high-speed car chase to bring down a suspected auto theft ring. Later, Paul's squad joins Huth's to double their efforts and hit two houses at once.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Sergeant Joe McHale and his tactical team are called in to coax an unstable man out of his hotel room after he stabs a hotel employee. But when the man turns the knife on himself, McHale and his squad must act quickly to save a life.

programme.title: Kansas City SWAT
programme.desc: Officer Tim Davis' morning run is interrupted by a barricaded gunman who has taken two women hostages, his sister and his girlfriend. Then the already nerve-racking domestic dispute grows even more tense when gunshots ring out inside the home.

programme.title: Dallas SWAT
programme.desc: When Dallas patrol officers respond to a disturbance call, they find an armed parole violator intent on not returning to jail. The suspect fires at police and barricades himself in a bathroom. A SWAT negotiator is called in to talk the man out safely.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: You Know My Brother's Name
programme.desc: When Karen Kuzma was a little girl, she adored her older brother. As they grew older, she saw changes in him that she didn't understand, but it never occurred to her that he was becoming the most infamous serial killer in American history.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: The Last Blanco
programme.desc: Michael Blanco never doubted the violent things his mother did were to keep their family safe until one day he learned the truth.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: I Was His First Victim
programme.desc: Felecia Collier almost killed Chester Turner once. At the time, she was relieved to hear that he would survive. But years later, that moment would become the biggest regret of her life. If only she had just killed him.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He's Still My Son
programme.desc: Walter Stawicki always tried to protect his son, Ian, from all the evils in the world. But when Ian became a man, and committed an unspeakable crime, Walter realized with horror that he had failed to protect him, and their community, from the true threat.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Friend Request
programme.desc: When single mom Rosita accepts a stranger's friend request, she has no idea he's hiding a terrifying secret that will lead to a deadly game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: Before I Die: Amber Alert
programme.desc: On March 14, 2017, Amanda Mangas is found with a single gunshot wound to her chest. She tells police that her baby son, Winston, has been kidnapped before dying from her wounds. This leads to a tri-state Amber Alert in the hunt to save Winston.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Betrayal in the Mountains
programme.desc: The discovery of the body of a young woman in the tree line of a popular camp site in the Rocky Mountains marks the beginning of a terrifying murder mystery.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Was a Good Man to Me
programme.desc: When Alvin "Bud" Brown was arrested he told an officer that he was just like Hannibal Lecter. But, to his wife, Jackie, the man she shared a bed with for years appeared to be gentle and loving until the Thanksgiving Day when she discovered the truth.

programme.title: Before I Die: Amber Alert
programme.desc: On March 14, 2017, Amanda Mangas is found with a single gunshot wound to her chest. She tells police that her baby son, Winston, has been kidnapped before dying from her wounds. This leads to a tri-state Amber Alert in the hunt to save Winston.

programme.title: On the Case With Paula Zahn: Betrayal in the Mountains
programme.desc: The discovery of the body of a young woman in the tree line of a popular camp site in the Rocky Mountains marks the beginning of a terrifying murder mystery.

programme.title: Evil Lives Here: He Was a Good Man to Me
programme.desc: When Alvin "Bud" Brown was arrested he told an officer that he was just like Hannibal Lecter. But, to his wife, Jackie, the man she shared a bed with for years appeared to be gentle and loving until the Thanksgiving Day when she discovered the truth.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Friend Request
programme.desc: When single mom Rosita accepts a stranger's friend request, she has no idea he's hiding a terrifying secret that will lead to a deadly game of cat and mouse.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Occult Following
programme.desc: Krystal is a teacher and practicing Pagan living happily with her husband Bill. When she takes part in a local Wiccan-themed TV show, she catches the eye of the show's host. As his keen interest turns into obsession, he vows to claim her as his own.

programme.title: Obsession: Dark Desires: Apocalypse Now
programme.desc: 41-year-old single mother Patty is excited about a new chapter in her life when she begins dating one of her customers, Vietnam veteran Dale. But when Dale becomes violent on their first date, Patty is quickly sent into a desperate struggle for survival.

programme.title: Murder Calls: The Slender Man
programme.desc: When a young mother is shot dead in front of her son, horrified witnesses call 911 and describe the shooter as a slender man who disappeared into nearby trees. Though clues are scarce, investigators finally uncover the killer's shocking identity.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Death at the Door
programme.desc: A former cop calls 911, struggling to explain he's been shot multiple times and his girlfriend has been abducted. Investigators race to save the caller--they need his help to find the missing woman and the gunman, who might be a drug cartel hitman.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Death Comes Knocking
programme.desc: In a distressing 911 call, a woman reports someone is breaking into her home. Then the dispatcher hears a scream and a gunshot. Soon, investigators connect the case to a previous home invasion and must solve the crimes before another victim falls.

programme.title: Murder Calls: Lost Angel
programme.desc: Two distraught women call 911 when they discover their sister brutally murdered. Soon, detectives uncover a stunning surprise and struggle to find a killer whose self-hatred drove him to commit the ultimate sin, in a precedent-setting case.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Terror in Philadelphia
programme.desc: In 1998, a gifted Philadelphia graduate student is found murdered in her bed. The hunt for her killer forces police to reevaluate a series of unsolved crimes, turning the city upside down.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Monster in the Desert
programme.desc: In 1992, a 19-year-old woman is brutally assaulted outside of Desert Hot Springs, California. Miraculously she escapes, but lives in constant fear that he will find her again one day. What the victim doesn't realize is she survived a serial killer.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Children of Thunder
programme.desc: In the summer of 2000, panic overwhelms the Bay Area when bags full of body parts start appearing all over the region. Investigators follow the trail of grisly clues and it leads to the discovery of a secret cult carrying out a sinister scheme.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Murder On Newberry St.
programme.desc: In 1969 race riots in York, PA, claim two lives - an African-American mother of two and a young, white police officer. Their deaths are largely forgotten until 30 years later, when their cold cases are reopened, revealing the city's dark past.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: My Father, The Serial Killer
programme.desc: Horror strikes a small Wisconsin town in 1980 after a young couple disappears and is later discovered in a field. Dubbed the Sweetheart Murders, it's almost 40 years before a woman comes forward saying her family holds the key to unlocking the case.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Who Killed Jane Doe 59?
programme.desc: Police search for the name of an unidentified woman murdered in 1969 and the person who killed her. The one lead that keeps coming up is Charles Manson and the Manson Family.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: Sex, Drugs and Rock 'n' Roll
programme.desc: A look at some of the conspiracies surrounding iconic bands such as Led Zeppelin, The Sex Pistols and The Doors.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Lockerbie Plot
programme.desc: An inquiry into whether Iran was really behind the Lockerbie Bombing, if the CIA invented and promoted suicide bombing in the Middle East, why there were no photos of Bin Laden's body and if 9/11 was actually an inside job.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: Alcatraz
programme.desc: The world's most famous prison holds many secrets. We'll explore a conspiracy that helped three inmates escape, reveal the truth behind the dungeon of Alcatraz, and discover the remnants of a mysterious military outpost with links to Abraham Lincoln.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Hitler's Executioner
programme.desc: We reveal the remarkable story of Johann Reichhart, the man who went from German state executioner before WW2 to head up a merciless Nazi killing machine which murdered thousands. In a bizarre twist of fate, Reichhart ended up working for the Allies.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Killing Mussolini
programme.desc: A look at the once all-powerful Mussolini, friend of the Fuhrer, who ended his days hanging upside down like a grotesque animal carcass in Milan's Piazzale Loreto.

programme.title: Forbidden History: Secrets of the Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican Archives hold the personal documents of past Popes, including pieces such as Galileo's trial transcript and King Henry VIII's annulment request. What else is hidden in the Vatican Library a place that is out of bounds even to Cardinals?

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Real Mary Magdalene
programme.desc: A look at the story of Mary Magdalene, a key figure in Christianity.

programme.title: Forbidden History: The Dark Truths of the Templars
programme.desc: Templar fact and fiction have become blurred by their depictions in book and on film. However, we present a very different picture that challenges head on the orthodox beliefs about an order that angered much of Europe, particularly France.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Whitey Bulger: Boston Mob King
programme.desc: In 1995, ruthless murderer and Boston crime boss James 'Whitey' Bulger flees Boston to escape an impending arrest. State police, the FBI and US Marshals all join an international hunt for this violent fugitive.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: American Gangster
programme.desc: Frank Lucas was one of the most successful heroin dealers of the 1970's. His brand of heroin known as 'Blue Magic' was notorious on the streets of New York and New Jersey.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Colombian Rambo
programme.desc: In 1980 the trickle of cocaine coming in to Florida suddenly becomes a flood and drug wars erupt on the streets. Carlos Lehder is behind it all. The DEA must take him down before he destroys the USA with the drug he calls Latin America's 'atomic bomb'.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: El Chapo: Cartel Killer
programme.desc: Joaquín Guzmán Loera AKA El Chapo is America's number one illegal drug supplier. After over a decade of searching, the DEA, Homeland Security and the U.S. marshals combine forces with the Mexican marines to take him down.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: The Black Widow
programme.desc: A cocaine empire triggers a tidal wave of deaths across the United States. Behind this rampage is a bloodthirsty female psychopath who kills for fun. Known as The Black Widow, this is the true story of Griselda Blanco and how she's brought to justice.

programme.title: Manhunt: Kill or Capture: Merchant of Death
programme.desc: The DEA are running an undercover mission codenamed 'Operation Relentless.' This is a multi-million dollar, international sting with one aim, to take down Russian arms dealer Viktor Bout also known as the Merchant of Death.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Butch Cassidy: The Perfect Criminal
programme.desc: Until the day he died, whenever that was, nobody ever outsmarted Butch Cassidy. He always got away. Cassidy was an outlaw who lived more by his wits than by his gun.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Tom Horn: Grim Reaper of the Rockies
programme.desc: As the Wild West becomes settled, this mysterious hit man kills for men who want to preserve the old order where violence rules all. But the law isn't giving in this time.

programme.title: Gunslingers: John Wesley Hardin: The Dark Heart of Texas
programme.desc: In the turbulent aftermath of the Civil War, a volatile gunman wages a bloody crusade against anyone who stands between himself and his notions of freedom.

programme.title: Gunslingers: Wild Bill: Marksman and Marked Man
programme.desc: When the most famous man in the Old West outlives his legend, he becomes the target of gunslingers eager to make legends of their own by shooting him dead.

programme.desc: A creative mountain biking group from Carbondale, Colorado builds a unique mountain retreat that doubles as their very own bike park feature.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Island Oasis
programme.desc: Beth wants a beach getaway on the white sandy beaches of Ambergris Caye, Belize. Ken Grissom and his crew transport building materials to the remote island and construct an off-the-grid luxury getaway with the Caribbean water just steps away.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Bamboo House
programme.desc: Bamboo-home architect David Sands builds a getaway in Hawaii with a luxurious outdoor bath area and a detached, starlit master bedroom. But volcanic eruptions threaten to send the project in smoke.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Bottle Island
programme.desc: John Beal is ready to leave the city behind and embrace a life off the grid in Isla Mujeres, Mexico. He hires Richart Sowa and his son Eden to build an eco-friendly private floating island made from recycled plastic bottles.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Heights Cottage
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis turns her attention to a rundown cottage in Lake Orion, Michigan. Starting in the living room, she rips out an old staircase leading to the kitchen before making her way outside to create a new boardwalk entry, picket fence and back deck.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: 4th Street House
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis takes on a boarded up, previously condemned 1880s duplex and restores it into a single-family home.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: 14-Mile House
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis juggles two projects in Detroit, and since both were built in 1928, she uses one house as inspiration for the other's renovations. When a car crashes into the house next door, she makes an unexpected discovery.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Minnehaha House
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis tackles a 1916 mansion in Minneapolis and builds out its dingy, old cellar by creating a new living space that adds nearly 1,000 square feet to the home. Then, Nicole indulges her most glamorous fantasy in the master suite.

programme.title: Rehab Addict: Detroit Auction House
programme.desc: Nicole Curtis wins a house sight-unseen at auction and plans to revitalize the eyesore with painting, landscaping and restoring the custom woodwork. She faces a challenge when replacing missing details, including original windows and hardwood flooring.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Taking Down a Huge New England Style Barn
programme.desc: Mark and the guys make a rare trip north to dismantle an enormous, 200-year old barn. The barn is so big it takes extra hands to get the barnwood down, and a crane to lift out the valuable beams.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Building the New England Barn in South Carolina
programme.desc: Mark and the guys take on their biggest build yet. They resurrect the massive New England timber frame from last season as a family retreat in South Carolina. It's six days of heavy lifting, precision craftsmanship, and big fun.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Fort Barnwood
programme.desc: Mark challenges his crew to build a log fort on the Boneyard. They use spare logs and some serious hillbilly know-how to construct a pioneer cantilevered fort, but when the temperature takes an unexpected plunge, the job becomes more difficult.

programme.title: Barnwood Builders: Hope Rises in White Sulphur Springs
programme.desc: After the flood waters recede, the Barnwood Builders join the recovery efforts in their hometown of White Sulphur Springs, WV. They build a timber frame pavilion as the centerpiece of a memorial park, and the community builds barn wood picnic tables.

programme.title: Cupcake Wars: Rose Bowl
programme.desc: Four bakers battle for a place at the VIP party for the 2012 Rose Bowl.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Seafood Sampler
programme.desc: Noah Cappe dives into the fairground for some of the yummiest seafood snacks on the midway.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Campfire Creations
programme.desc: Noah follows smoke signals to the fairground. He chows down on midway food inspired by cooking over an open campfire.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Nacho, Nacho Man
programme.desc: Noah Cappe tries some of the wackiest and wildest nacho combinations on the midway.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Bacon 2: The Sequel
programme.desc: Bacon is the star of its own blockbuster sequel and host Noah Cappe is at the front of line to savor even more bacon-tastic fairground favs.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: The Devil Wears Pasta
programme.desc: Noah Cappe gets things started in Florida at the Okeechobee County Fair where he samples the Hot Wing Grilled Cheese, the Sweet Bacon Devil Burger and the made-in-Florida Strawberry Margarita Funnel Cake.

programme.title: Carnival Eats: Bite Club
programme.desc: Noah Cappe celebrates the arrival of spring in Winchester, Va., at the Shenandoah Apple Blossom Festival. He starts the day with the Cowboy Breakfast and ends it with Caramel Apple Tots.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Asheville
programme.desc: Andrew reveals the iconic eats of Asheville, North Carolina. The eclectic food city features tangy barbecue, decadent sweet potato pie, mouth-watering fried chicken, succulent rainbow trout and giant soft-dough biscuits with savory gravy.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Tel Aviv
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern reveals Tel Aviv's most iconic eats, from falafel to hummus to shawarma.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Seattle

programme.title: Brunch @ Bobby's: Bay City Brunch

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Sweet and Smokey

programme.title: Burgers, Brew and 'Que: Build Your Own Burger
