programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Adopt-a-Palooza/ The Legend of Captain Wunderbark
programme.desc: When a puppy gets lost at Adopt-A-Palooza, it's up to the pugs, Keia and their new friend to find it. Bingo, Rolly and Keia go off in search of Captain Wunderbark's long-lost ship.

programme.title: PJ Masks: The Prank Wheelz/ Where's the Wolfie Wheelz?
programme.desc: The Wolfies turn their Wolf Wheelz into Prank Wheelz. Luna Girl and Motsuki are controlling the Wolf Wheelz to wreak havoc causing the Wolfies and the PJ Masks to work together.

programme.title: The Rocketeer: Ground Control to Rocketeer / Save the Statue
programme.desc: Tesh gives his bike an extreme makeover that isn't as helpful as he hoped. Kit, Tesh and Butch raise money to repair the statue of the original Hughesville Rocketeer statue.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Mickey's Mixed-Up Motor Lab/ Wishy Washy Helpers
programme.desc: Mickey invents a new Motor Lab to add new upgrades to the gang's roadsters. The Happy Helpers offer their services to make Bigby Towers' windows sparkle and shine.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: For Lion Out Loud/ Porcupine Panic
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy teach a lion cub the difference between his "indoor" and "outdoor" roar. When a porcupine is scared of the delivery tube, K.C. and the Fliers help him beat his fear.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Welcome to Puppy Playcare!/ The Naptime Chronicles
programme.desc: When Bob's finishing touch for Puppy Playcare breaks, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to find a replacement before Playcare opens! The Pugs help Hissy nap while at Playcare!

programme.title: Vampirina: Vamp-iversary/ Wolf Boy
programme.desc: It’s Boris and Oxana's anniversary, and no one is more excited to celebrate her parents than Vee. The Hauntleys have a new guest at the Scare B&B: a wolf boy named Fangbert!

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Temple of the Tiger/ The Gift-Mazing Birthday
programme.desc: Freddy and Pip try their hardest to keep a baby tiger prince clean; Freddy tries to find the perfect birthday present for one of the new babies.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Mickey's Monstrous Truck/ Minnie's Vacation Home!
programme.desc: Mickey accidentally turns his roadster into a monster truck! Daisy and Cuckoo Loca worry that Minnie is moving out!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: Goofasaur!/ Teahouse Helpers
programme.desc: A tour of Tokyo goes sideways when Goofy accidentally unleashes a robot dinosaur upon the city! Minnie takes her friends to experience a traditional Japanese tea ceremony.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Keia's New Doghouse / The Fang Fairy
programme.desc: After Bob builds a doghouse for Keia, the pugs encourage her to host a puppy housewarming party. Rolly loses his first puppy tooth and can't wait for a visit from the Fang Fairy!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Bob's Dream Vacation/ The Mystery of the Missing Golf Ball
programme.desc: The pugs want to take Bob on his dream vacation to Tahiti; Bingo and Rolly search the golf course for Bob's missing ball.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Puggy-ology/ Squirrels Just Wanna Have Fun
programme.desc: The pugs travel to an archeology site to find artifacts for Bob's sister. Then, when a noisy squirrel keeps Bob from getting work done, the pugs must work together to get the squirrel back to its family.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Clumsy Catboy/ Gekko and the Mighty Moon Problem
programme.desc: Romeo plans to use his newest device to make everyone in the world so clumsy that they can’t stop him. Romeo creates a space laser to carve his face into the moon.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Catboy and the Shrinker/ Owlette and the Moonball
programme.desc: Luna Girl creates a giant moonball and hides all the toys she’s stolen inside.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Super Fabulous vs. Captain Icecube/ Piggy's Time Machine
programme.desc: When Piggy decides to be a superhero, she must learn to share the spotlight with Summer. Piggy accidentally sends the gang on a wild trip through time with a time machine!

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Bunsen Knows All/ Doctor Fozzie
programme.desc: Bunsen is asked a question he doesn't know the answer to so he fibs and the lie grows out of control! While playing pretend hospital, Doctor Fozzie quickly gets too many patients.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Close Encounters of a Pug Kind/ History Mystery
programme.desc: When Bob wants to meet someone from space, the pugs go to a gathering of UFO enthusiasts. When the pups find a doggie toy that isn't theirs, they go on a mission to find its owner.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Windy City/ Sham-pooch
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly go on a mission to the Windy City for Bob's kite! Keia is nervous about going to the groomer, so the pugs make it their mission to help her.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Catboy Squared/ Gekko's Super Gekko Sense
programme.desc: Romeo’s multiplying machine accidentally makes Catboy copies. Night Ninja challenges the PJ Masks to a game of Capture the Flag with the PJ Mask headquarters as the prize.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Owlette of a Kind/ Beat the Drum, Catboy
programme.desc: When Romeo steals Owlette’s powers, he turns himself, Catboy, and Gekko into fliers. Night Ninja plans to turn Catboy's daytime parade into the Night Ninja Parade Spectacular.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: The Total Yodel / Bob's Birthday Wish
programme.desc: After Bob has trouble learning to yodel, the Pugs decide to go on a mission to the Swiss Alps to get yodeling tips. It’s Bob’s birthday and his sister, Bonnie, is acting sneaky.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Keia's New Doghouse / The Fang Fairy
programme.desc: After Bob builds a doghouse for Keia, the pugs encourage her to host a puppy housewarming party. Rolly loses his first puppy tooth and can't wait for a visit from the Fang Fairy!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Daisy-Bo-Peep
programme.desc: Daisy-Bo-Peep loses her 10 sheep and enlists Mickey and the gang to help find them.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Fancy Dancin' Goofy
programme.desc: Goofy is taught how to act like a gentleman when Clarabelle asks him to go to the Dance.

programme.title: The Lion Guard: The Tree of Life
programme.desc: The Lion Guard's journey to the Tree of Life comes to an end, but the Night Pride confuses the Guard for a threat.

programme.title: Muppet Babies: Grandpa Camp / A Backyard Divided
programme.desc: It's grandparent's day and since Fozzie has never met his grandparents, Kermit finds two people to fill in for him, Statler and Waldorf. Later, when Gonzo and Piggy can't seem to get along, they divide the backyard into two separate kingdoms.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Agent Double-O-Goof/ Egg-xasperating!
programme.desc: While everyone prepares for the Queen of England to come for tea, Goofy is mistaken for a secret agent in charge of delivering a top-secret briefcase. The Happy Helpers are charged with watching Clara Cluck's egg while she runs errands.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Super Sweet Helpers
programme.desc: Mickey and the gang participate in high-spirited races around the globe.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Donald's Clubhouse
programme.desc: Mickey leaves Donald in charge of the Clubhouse. But he and Goofy accidentally turn a small mess into a big mess, so the whole gang must work together to tidy up in time for a visit from Mother Goose, Clarabelle and her trio of singing chickens.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Minnie and Daisy's Flower Shower
programme.desc: With the help of Professor Von Drake's special Pitter Patter Glitter, Minnie and Daisy turn normal clouds into rain clouds so they can water their flower gardens in time for the big flower show.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Goofy Goes Goofy
programme.desc: Goofy gets cloned after getting sprayed by Prof. Von Drake's latest experimental goo.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Happy Birthday, Toodles
programme.desc: Everybody wants to give Toodles a surprise birthday party -- but there's a problem. They'll need Mouseketools to prepare for the party.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey and the Enchanted Egg
programme.desc: Mickey finds an egg, which soon hatches a baby dragon.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Minnie's Bee Story
programme.desc: Mickey and pals help Minnie's friend, Buzzby the Bee, find her way back home after a strong wind blows her away from her sunflower in Mickey Park.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Pluto Lends a Paw
programme.desc: When Minnie's kitty, Figaro, wanders off because he feels ignored, Pluto the Rescue Dog saves the day by finding the missing pet.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Mickey's Silly Problem
programme.desc: When the Clubhouse's Silly Switch gets stuck on silly, everything turns silly.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Clubhouse: Oh, Toodles!
programme.desc: Professor Von Drake is working on a surprise invention when he discovers that he is missing four of his very special tools: a shape-wrench, a hammer, a paintbrush and a whistle.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Phantom of the Café / Cuckoo in Paris
programme.desc: During Chef Pierre's café opening, Goofy's famous Goofy Dogs are stolen! When the Happy Helpers return to Paris, Cuckoo Loca discovers new family members!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Super-Charged: The Big Cheesy / Shenannygans!
programme.desc: During the Cooper's Hill Cheese Rolling Chase, a cheese wheel spins out of control! The Happy Helpers work as nannies for two children in London and take them on new experiences!

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: The Grand Food Truck Rally/ Cuckoo La-La
programme.desc: Mickey and his pals race in a grand food truck rally in Paris. While in Paris, the happy helpers help famous fashion designer Cuckoo La-La with a fashion show.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Mixed-Up Adventures: A Gollywood Wedding!/ No Dilly Dally in New Delhi!
programme.desc: Mickey and his pals travel to New Delhi, India, for the wedding of their friends Savi and Raj. The Happy Helpers assist an old friend who runs an auto-rickshaw business by being Tuk-Tuk Drivers for the day.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Double Doggie Dare!/ Empire State of Mind
programme.desc: When a trip to the Empire State Building is cancelled, Bob signs up for a game show; The pugs want to bring the Empire State Building to Bob.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Duck, Duck, Dog / Mr. Bob Goes to Washington
programme.desc: After meeting a duckling that thinks he's a puppy, the pugs must teach him to be a duck. Bob and the pups head to Washington to compete in an environmental invention competition.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Bringing Back Baby/A Penguin In The Desert
programme.desc: Pip and Freddy show Peggy, the Polar Bear, the benefits of having a baby brother when she tries to return him to T.O.T.S. Pip and Freddy brave the desert heat to deliver a camel.

programme.title: T.O.T.S.: Cheetah Chase / Training Daze
programme.desc: When a cheetah is accidentally set loose, Pip and Freddy must play a game of tag to catch it; Pip and Freddy find themselves leading a group of storks on a class trip.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Lemur Play/ How the Dog Park Was Won
programme.desc: The pugs go to Madagascar to learn about lemurs. When a big dog takes Keia's toy at the dog park, Bingo and Rolly make it their mission to retrieve the toy!

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Design-a-dog/ Ice, Ice Puggy
programme.desc: Bingo and Rolly accidentally chew Bob's childhood toy. Then, when Bobo's icemaker breaks, the pugs go to Antarctica to get him ice.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Hi, Jinx!/ Pete's Junkyard Helpers
programme.desc: Emmy Lou meets Jinx the cat and gets the gang to help her find the kitty a new home. The Happy Helpers run Pete's junkyard while he takes his Mama out to lunch for her birthday.

programme.title: Mickey Mouse Roadster Racers: Phantom of the Café / Cuckoo in Paris
programme.desc: During Chef Pierre's café opening, Goofy's famous Goofy Dogs are stolen! When the Happy Helpers return to Paris, Cuckoo Loca discovers new family members!

programme.title: The Rocketeer: Carnival Caper/ Songbird Soars Again
programme.desc: The Great Orsino and his traveling carnival arrive in Hughesville to steal Kit's rocket-pack. Kit befriends a former pilot, May Songbird, and helps her find the courage to fly her plane again.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: No Bones About It/ Bob's Sock Debacle
programme.desc: When Bonnie’s dinosaur bone is lost, the pups team up with a roadrunner to find it. The pups set out to look for Bob's favorite golf socks before he participates in a tournament.

programme.title: Puppy Dog Pals: Cousin Cody/ Hissy's Lost To
programme.desc: The pugs help their nervous puppy cousin, Cody, feel comfortable in a new place. When Hissy’s favorite toy goes missing, the pups go on a mission to find it for their kitty sister.

programme.title: PJ Masks: Villian of the Sky/Protector of the Sky
programme.desc: The PJ Masks discover Romeo's Sky Factory and send PJ Robot as a mole. When the Sky Factory creates a pollution cloud over the city, the PJ Masks have a hard time blowing it away!

programme.title: PJ Masks: Wolfy Powers / Do The Gekko
programme.desc: After their powers are stolen and given to the Woflies, the PJ Masks ally with them to vanquish Romeo. Night Ninja hypnotizes all of the school kids with his special ninja dance!

programme.title: Jimmy Timmy Power Hour: The Jerkinators
programme.desc: Jimmy and Timmy join forces to create a villain to fight; however the villain they create doesn't want to be evil and refuses to fight.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Miss Dimmsdale/ Mind Over Magic
programme.desc: Vicky will stop at nothing to win the Miss Dimmsdale Pageant; Timmy can read minds.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Two and a Half Babies/ Dust Busters
programme.desc: Chet Ubetcha quits his job. Dad becomes the new news man. Timmy must get Chet back in order to save the city. Timmy and the fairies have to rid his home of fairy dust. The basement comes alive. Mom and Dad go to a fake spa.

programme.title: Fairly OddParents: Chin Up/ Dogs Day Afternoon
programme.desc: Timmy wishes his favourite comic book hero into reality; Timmy becomes a dog.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Kiss Conspiracy/ House Guest
programme.desc: Simon is too embarrassed to kiss his co-star in the school play. So in a moment of desperation, he agrees to allow Alvin to switch identities with him. Alvin secretly decides to rent out their house for a Hawaiian home-swap.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Viral/ Brothers of Dagarack
programme.desc: After Brittany and the girls release a video that goes viral, Alvin, Simon, and Theodore try to top it. Simon falls ill and asks Alvin and Theodore not to go see a new movie without him, but Alvin just can't resist.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Baby Mama Drama/ Ballet Boys
programme.desc: Alvin and Brittany learn parenting isn't easy when they have to care for a robot baby for a school assignment.When Alvin's soccer team struggles, the coach makes the team learn ballet to help with their conditioning.

programme.title: ALVINNN!!! and the Chipmunks: Bloodlines
programme.desc: Alvin wants Dave to take a DNA test to see if he's a famous explorer or king, but maybe it's a person much scarier.

programme.desc: Timmy has to have his tonsils removed! And his nurse is Vicky, who's determined to make his stay as painful as possible. The Pirates opening game is today, and everyone except Timmy is going, instead he is on a real Pirate ship.

programme.desc: Anne befriends toad soldiers to gain respect in Wartwood, but must choose between her new respect and her frog family. Far from Wartwood, Anne’s friend Sasha is captured by toads.

programme.title: Amphibia: Croak and Punishment/ Trip to the Archives
programme.desc: When Sprig's Blue Moon Shell is stolen, he and Anne investigate to find the crook. To prepare for Anne's quest, the Plantars go to the archives and accidentally get trapped!

programme.desc: The Plantars stay at an inn for a night, but Polly discovers the caretakers aren’t what they seem. Everyone calls Anne crazy when she claims to have seen the Moss Man.

programme.title: Amphibia: Children of the Spore/ Anne of the Year
